entries.title: Weekly JOI Report #13: Traffic Decline Observed, Yet Engagement Rate Shows Improvement
entries.title_ja: 週間JOI通信 #13: トラフィック急減も、エンゲージメント率は改善傾向
entries.description:
Our weekly analysis for April 6-12, 2026 reveals a challenging 62.5% decrease in active users compared to the previous week. However, the engagement rate improved from 0.64 to 0.70, suggesting potential qualitative enhancement in visitor behavior. Content generation remained stable with 863 new articles.

## 📉 トラフィック動向:注目すべき減少傾向

今週の分析で最も目を引くのは、訪問者数の大幅な減少です。アクティブユーザー数は前週の16名から6名へと62.5%減少し、ページビュー数も103から27へと73.8%の落ち込みを記録しました。

この数字だけを見ると懸念材料ですが、一方でエンゲージメント率は0.64から0.70へと約6ポイント改善しており、訪問してくださる方々の関心度は高まっている可能性があります。

**考えられる要因**
- 季節要因(春休み終了など)
- SEO順位の変動
- SNS拡散パターンの変化

次週は流入元やデバイス別の詳細分析を実施し、この傾向が一時的なものか構造的なものかを見極める必要がありそうです。

## 📝 コンテンツ生成状況:安定した更新体制

週次での新規記事生成は**863件**と、引き続き安定した更新ペースを維持しています。総コンテンツ数は3,417件に達し、着実にアーカイブが充実してきています。

**カテゴリ別内訳**(全体)
- otaku-news: 1,379件(40.4%)
- game: 1,201件(35.1%)
- figure: 711件(20.8%)
- anime: 450件(13.2%)
- その他: event、vtuber、cafeなど

ゲーム、オタクニュース、フィギュアを中心に、バランスの取れたコンテンツミックスを実現できています。

**主要ソース**
- natalie-anime: 432件
- game-spark: 431件
- inside-games-jp: 389件
- 4gamer: 364件
- animeanime-jp: 356件

上位10ソースが分散しており、特定メディアへの過度な依存を避けられている点は健全と言えるでしょう。

## 🤖 Perplexity AI活用の現状

今週のPerplexity AI経由での記事生成は**22件**(全体の2.5%)にとどまりました。これは当初想定していた活用レベルには達していない可能性があります。

現状のサンプル数では、AI生成コンテンツの品質パターンや潜在的なリスク(幻覚、誤カテゴリ分類など)を十分に評価できないという課題があります。特にcafeカテゴリのように生成数が3件程度の少数カテゴリでは、品質検証が実質的に不可能な状態です。

また、**11件の未翻訳マーカー付き記事**が残存しており、これがAI処理の失敗によるものか、ソースデータの問題なのかの特定が急務となっています。

## ✨ 注目のポジティブ指標

厳しい数字が並ぶ中でも、いくつかの明るい兆しがあります:

1. **エンゲージメント率の改善**: 訪問者数は減少しましたが、訪問された方の滞在品質は向上している可能性
2. **コンテンツの多様性**: 6カテゴリでバランス良く記事を配信できている
3. **ソースの分散**: 特定メディアに偏らない健全な情報収集体制

これらは、Japan OTAKU Insiderが目指す「質の高い情報キュレーション」という方向性と合致していると考えられます。

## 🎯 来週に向けたアクション

分析結果を踏まえ、以下の施策を優先的に実施します:

### 1. トラフィック減少要因の特定
Google Analytics 4の詳細データを活用し、以下を精査:
- 流入元別の前週比較(オーガニック検索、SNS、直接流入など)
- デバイス別トレンド(モバイル vs デスクトップ)
- 地域別アクセスパターン

### 2. 未翻訳記事の緊急対応
11件の未翻訳マーカー付き記事について:
- 手動レビューによる内容確認
- Perplexity APIのエラーログ調査
- 必要に応じて再処理フローの実行

### 3. AI活用戦略の見直し
現状2.5%(22件/週)のPerplexity生成比率を、段階的に10%(約86件/週)まで引き上げるための運用計画を策定します。これにより、品質評価に十分なサンプル数を確保できる見込みです。

## 📅 まとめ

今週は訪問者数の大幅減少という課題が浮き彫りになりましたが、エンゲージメント率の改善やコンテンツ生成の安定性など、ポジティブな要素も確認できました。

重要なのは、この数字の変動を一喜一憂せず、中長期的な視点でサイトの価値を高めていくことです。来週の詳細分析で原因を特定し、適切な対策を講じていきます。

次回の週間JOI通信は**2026年4月20日**を予定しています。引き続き、Japan OTAKU Insiderをよろしくお願いいたします!

---

*このレポートは2026年4月13日時点のデータに基づいています*

entries.title: "Rohan Kishibe Doesn't Move: Confession Room" will be broadcast for the first time on NHK, and 3 episodes of the drama will also be rebroadcast

entries.description: The movie "Rohan Kishibe Doesn't Move: Confession Room" based on the original work by Hirohiko Araki will be broadcast for the first time on NHK General TV at 4:10 p.m. on May 3. Some episodes of the drama series will also be rebroadcast.

entries.title: A young lady's hobby is a hero, a romantic comedy about a poor boy who becomes a sidekick and an eccentric young lady.
entries.title_ja: お嬢様の趣味はヒーロー、サイドキックになった貧乏少年＆風変わりなお嬢様のラブコメ
entries.description: Yagi-kun's new series ``The Lady's Servant'' started today, April 13th, on Shonen Jump+.

entries.title: A youthful baseball story about a young girl aiming to become a professional baseball player, “Yuar Slugger”
entries.title_ja: ポンコツ少女がプロ野球選手を目指す、青春野球ストーリー「ゆーあーすらっがー」
entries.description: Roka Mano's new series ``Yu-A-Slugger'', based on the original work by Nametake, started today, April 13th, on Comic DAYS.

entries.title: A selfish genius actor and a costumer who is a former fan are contracted to get married in the new series “Costumeman’s Oshikoto Roman”
entries.title_ja: わがまま俺様男な天才役者と元ファンの衣装係が契約結婚「お衣装係の推し事浪漫」新連載
entries.description: Natsu Momose's new series ``Costume Section's Oshikoto Roman @COMIC'' started today, April 13th, on TO Books' Corona EX. This is a comic adaptation based on Risa Sagawa's novel.

entries.title: The never-ending adolescence of a landmine-type girl who realizes that she still has the sensibilities of “that time” and becomes around 40.
entries.title_ja: “あの頃”の感性のまま気づけばアラフォーに、地雷系女子の終わらない思春期
entries.description: Bunrei Kana's new series ``Satoko is a landmine'' started on Comic DAYS today, April 13th.

entries.title: "If you can overcome the barrier to entry, you'll find the most thrilling competitive game." Summary of overseas reviews of "Pokémon Champions"
entries.title_ja: 「参入障壁を乗り越えれば、最高にスリリングな対戦ゲームに出会えるはずだ」海外レビューひとまとめ『ポケモンチャンピオンズ』
entries.description: We bring you an overseas review of "Pokémon Champions", which will be distributed on April 8, 2026.

entries.title: Introducing "City Masterplan," a realistic city construction sim that lets you recreate your ideal city on a 1:1 scale!
entries.title_ja: 理想の都市を1:1スケールで再現できるリアルな都市建設シム『City Masterplan』発表！
entries.description: It is said to achieve the perfect balance of "ultimate realism" and "smooth operability" and will satisfy any city construction fan.

entries.title: “Solar Expanse,” a space company management sim that mines and terraforms stars in the solar system, starts early access with “very positive reviews.” Leading the development while competing with other companies
entries.title_ja: 太陽系の星を採掘・テラフォーミングする宇宙企業経営シム『Solar Expanse』早期アクセス“非常に好評”スタート。他企業と争いながら開拓指揮
entries.description: Early access starts on April 9th. At the time of writing, it has received 272 reviews and has been rated "very positive."

entries.title: “I had to rework the first “most difficult boss” I created three times, but in the end I was satisfied with the result.” Metroidvania ACT “Solateria” [Developer Interview]
entries.title_ja: 「最初に作った「最難関ボス」は3回も作り直すことになったが、最終的に納得のいく仕上がりに」メトロイドヴァニアACT『ソラテリア』【開発者インタビュー】
entries.description: This project interviews developers of new indie games of interest. This time, we'd like to bring you a mini-interview with the developer of the Metroidvania action game "Solateria" developed by Studio Doodal and released for PC on March 12th.

entries.title: Progress on “Splatoon Raiders” and “Fire Emblem Manshi Senku”! Rating information posted on overseas official website
entries.title_ja: 『スプラトゥーン レイダース』『ファイアーエムブレム 万紫千紅』に進展！海外公式サイトにレーティング情報掲載
entries.description: There are new developments in the two works whose follow-up has been interrupted!

entries.title: Illustrator Melon 22's "Big Too" female knight 3DACT "Decanomos" PV has been released. There was also a message saying, “I hope it can be done within this year.”
entries.title_ja: イラストレーター・めろん22氏による「デカすぎ」女騎士3DACT『デカノモス』PVが公開。「年内にできたらいいなぁ」とのメッセージも
entries.description: A PV of 3DACT for adults with non-standard body parts has been released.

entries.title: Data version of “Daydream”, a magically modified Game Boy software that allows you to interact with AI and Madamisu via Wi-Fi, is now on sale – a giveaway project is also being held
entries.title_ja: Wi-Fiを介してAIとマダミスができる魔改造ゲームボーイソフト『Daydream』データ版販売中―プレゼント企画も開催中
entries.description: It can be played on the Game Boy emulator created by the author.

entries.title: “BitSummit PUNCH” PR supporters announced! Popular streamers such as SPYGEA and Oniya will participate.
entries.title_ja: 「BitSummit PUNCH」PRサポーターズ発表！SPYGEAやおにやら人気ストリーマーが参加
entries.description: Talk sessions and play programs will also be broadcast publicly on public days.

entries.title: [Terukazu Yoshida's picture diary] Necessary building materials are borrowed from ruins! "Pokoa Pokemon" is a slow life sandbox in the Pokemon world where humans are gone.
entries.title_ja: 【吉田輝和の絵日記】必要な建材は廃墟から拝借だ！ニンゲンがいなくなったポケモン世界のスローライフサンドボックス『ぽこ あ ポケモン』
entries.description: In a world where old men once existed...

entries.title: Naruni, a YouTuber who has restarted game production, is currently developing his own mockups while studying. We plan to have it brushed up by professionals in the future.
entries.title_ja: ゲーム制作再始動のYouTuber・なるにぃ氏、勉強しながら自作モックアップを開発中。今後プロの手によりブラッシュアップを予定
entries.description: Senior Knight Naruni seems to be acquiring the skills to create game mockups by himself.

entries.title: [Ogiri] “What are the characteristics of the “game uncle” that is rumored around town? ” Screening results announced!
entries.title_ja: 【大喜利】『街で噂の“ゲームおじさん”の特徴とは？』審査結果発表！
entries.description: This is the announcement of the results of the 798th screening of Game*Spark Ogiri, a fun weekend-only project. This time's topic is ``What are the characteristics of the ``game uncle'' that is rumored around town? 'It was. As a result of reviewing the answers received from everyone based on your evaluation and the "arbitrary judgment and bias" of the person in charge, the following were selected...

entries.title: The movie "Exit 8" ranked 7th in the weekend box office in North America, and Nino was thrilled! ? Ratings on film review sites were also positive, at 95%. “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie” also maintains number one spot
entries.title_ja: 映画「8番出口」北米の週末興収7位でニノさんも感激！？映画批評サイトの評価も95%と好調。「ザ・スーパーマリオギャラクシー・ムービー」も1位キープ
entries.description: Two movies based on Japanese games have entered the box office rankings.

entries.title: Eliminate all NPCs in “Skyrim”! Keizaal Online, an online RP server with mods where all characters in the game are real people, has been well received.
entries.title_ja: 『スカイリム』のNPC全排除！ゲーム内の人物すべて生身の人間、ModによるオンラインRPサーバー「Keizaal Online」が好評を博す
entries.description: Mods that turn Skyrim into an RP-focused online game are gaining popularity.

entries.title: “HoloExpo20XX” will be released for free on Steam on May 12th, with more than 90 people appearing from Hololive, looking for abnormalities and aiming for the exit!
entries.title_ja: ホロライブから90名以上登場、異変を探して出口を目指す『HoloExpo20XX』5月12日Steamにて無料公開！
entries.description: Fan art of almost everyone from Hololive and Hololstars is posted in the game!

entries.title: [Manga Jangema] 516. “Charm of the board” volume
entries.title_ja: 【漫画じゃんげま】516.「板の魅力」の巻
entries.description: Game*Spark's original 4-panel manga series ``Jangema'' depicts the slightly comical, slapstick, and friendly fire life of a female shooter. Lighter operation, reduced file size...Eimu Toromeko finds romance in the ingenuity of developers in creating assets...?

entries.title: I will also recommend MODEROID! “MODEROID Superbia” from “Courage Explosion Burn Brave Burn” will be released in November Equipped with an original toy gimmick devised by director Masami Obari

entries.description: Good Smile Company will release the plastic model ``MODEROID Supervia'' in November. The price is 9,600 yen.

entries.description: “Goddess of Victory: NIKKE” Bran appears in Flew Prize’s “Noodle Stopper Figure”! #NIKKE #Frue Prize

entries.title_ja: ほぼ半額！『ざんねんなクルマ事典』『ますます！ざんねんなクルマ事典』『スーパーカー劇場SPECIAL』などのKindle本が大幅値下げ中！

entries.title: A trial session for the miniature board game "Gundam Assemble" will be held at the "64th Shizuoka Hobby Show"! To participate, in addition to applying for the lottery, you will also need to pre-register for the Shizuoka Hobby Show.
entries.title_ja: 「第64回静岡ホビーショー」にてミニチュアボードゲーム「ガンダムアッセンブル」の体験会が実施決定！参加には事前抽選応募のほか、別途静岡ホビーショーの事前登録も必要
entries.description: Bandai has announced that a trial session for the board game ``Gundam Assemble'' will be held at the ``64th Shizuoka Hobby Show'' event to be held on May 16th and 17th.

entries.title: “Orchid Seed 21st Anniversary SNS Festival” and “Faleno SNS Festival 2026 Spring” will be held from Saturday, April 18th! Event limited products and figures that appeared in the past will be on sale at special prices!

entries.description: “Orchid Seed 21st Anniversary SNS Festival” and “Faleno SNS Festival 2026 Spring” will be held from Saturday, April 18th! Limited quantities of unpainted garage kits and more will be on sale! #Orchid Seed #Faleno

entries.title: The prize figure “FIGURIZMα “Hatsune Miku” -Cosmic-”, which faithfully reproduces the illustration drawn by Fuku Kitsune, will be released at UFO Catcher in autumn!

entries.description: A three-dimensional illustration drawn by Fukukitsune! The prize figure “FIGURIZMα “Hatsune Miku” -Cosmic-” will appear at UFO Catcher in autumn, and the illustration and prototype image will be released in advance! #Hatsune Miku #Sega Prize

entries.title: “Spa Fest 2026 in Akihabara UDX” will be held from April 29th (Wednesday/holiday) to 30th (Thursday)! At the venue, pre-order products such as "Kinnikuman", "Fist of the North Star", "The Great Adventure of Dai", and "Heroaka" will be discounted by 3,000 yen!
entries.title_ja: 「スパフェス2026in秋葉原UDX」が4月29日（水・祝）から30日（木）にかけて開催！会場では『キン肉マン』『北斗の拳』『ダイの大冒険』『ヒロアカ』などの先行予約商品が3,000円割引！
entries.description: "Spa Fest 2026 in Akihabara UDX", an event where figure maker SpiceSeed will display figures released so far and unreleased figures scheduled to be released, will be held from April 29th (Wednesday/Holiday) to 30th (Thursday)! #SpiceSeed

entries.title: Bran in a bunny costume from “Goddess of Victory: NIKKE” will appear in Furyu’s prize “Noodle Stopper Figure”!

entries.description: Furyu announced the prize ``Noodle Stopper Figure Buran''. The deployment date has not been determined.

entries.title: Plastic model “Mat Arrow 2 [Convertible]” from Wave’s “Ultraman Series” will be shipped on April 17th
entries.title_ja: ウェーブの「ウルトラマンシリーズ」よりプラモデル「マットアロー2号 ［コンバーチブル］」が4月17日出荷決定
entries.description: Wave has announced that the shipping date for the plastic model ``Matte Arrow No. 2 [Convertible]'' has been decided on April 17th. The price is 5,940 yen.

entries.title: Celebrate “Superman Day” on April 18th! Official T-shirts with the motif of the new movie “Supergirl” released on June 26th are now available on Amazon “March on Demand”!
entries.title_ja: 4月18日「スーパーマンの日」を祝おう！6月26日公開の新作映画『スーパーガール』をモチーフにした公式TシャツがAmazon「マーチ オン デマンド」に続々登場！
entries.description: T-shirts from the new movie "Supergirl" released on June 26th are now available on Amazon's "March on Demand"! Introducing “movie” designed items! #supergirl #superman

entries.title: Bags and wallets using the Rilakkuma design are now available from the leather goods brand Dakota! Now on sale at Dakota stores and official WEB SHOP
entries.title_ja: 「リラックマ」のデザインを使用したバッグや財布がレザーグッズブランド「Dakota」から登場！Dakotaの取扱い店舗、公式WEB SHOPにて発売中
entries.description: Bags, long wallets, charms, and more featuring Rilakkuma in their designs are now available from the leather brand Dakota! Now on sale at Dakota stores and Dakota official WEB SHOP! #Rilakkuma

entries.title: Gacha machine type 3D sticker maker "Kira★Gacha Seal Pukkuri Drop" will be released on August 1st You can create 3D stickers with a "plump" surface
entries.title_ja: ガチャマシン型立体シールメーカー「キラ★ガチャシール ぷっくりドロップ」が8月1日に発売表面が“ぷっくり”とした立体的なシールを作成できる
entries.description: Takara Tomy will release the sticker maker "Kira★Gacha Seal Pukkuri Drop" on August 1st. The price is 3,999 yen.

entries.title: Doyusha releases resale products in May, including plastic model kit R/C F1 car "Ferrari SF1000"
entries.title_ja: 童友社、プラモデルキットR/C F1カー「フェラーリ SF1000」など5月再販製品を公開
entries.description: Doyusha has unveiled an RC car that will be resold in May.

entries.title: Kindle comics such as ``Psychometler,'' ``Kuitan,'' ``Ginga Sengoku Gun Yuden Rai,'' and ``The Chef'' are on sale at bargain prices! A chance to read together!
entries.title_ja: 『サイコメトラー』『喰いタン』『銀河戦国群雄伝ライ』『ザ・シェフ』などのKindle本コミック格安価格で販売中！まとめ読みのチャンス！
entries.description: On sale at a bargain price! Introducing selected Kindle comics such as ``Psychometler,'' ``Kuitan,'' ``Ginga Sengoku Gun Yuden Rai,'' and ``Hanjuku Ninpocho''! #Kindle

entries.title: Pre-orders for the plastic model “Extreme Sports Bike” from “Sosai Shoujo Teien” begin on April 16th. The 2nd color based on black is also available for pre-order at the same time as a Kotobukiya exclusive item.
entries.title_ja: 「創彩少女庭園」よりプラモデル「エクストリームスポーツバイク」が4月16日に予約開始ブラックを基調とした2ndカラーもコトブキヤ限定アイテムで同時予約
entries.description: Kotobukiya will begin accepting reservations for the plastic model "Extreme Sports Bike" at 11am on April 16th. Release month and price are undecided.

entries.title: May 4th is “Star Wars Day”! Information on the event summary and related goods for 2026, which is about to be released in 7 years for the first theatrical work "The Mandalorian and Grogu", has been released!
entries.title_ja: 5月4日は「スター・ウォーズの日」！7年ぶりの劇場作品『マンダロリアン・アンド・グローグー』の公開を目前に控えた2026年のイベント概要や関連グッズなどの情報が一挙解禁！
entries.description: “Star Wars Day” on May 4th is coming this year! Information on the 2026 event summary and related goods has been released ahead of the release of the long-awaited latest movie "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Groogoo" on Friday, May 22nd! #StarWarsDay

entries.title: "FINAL FANTASY VII" polygon-designed Tifa and Aerith are now available as soft vinyl figures! Now accepting pre-orders on Amazon!
entries.title_ja: 『FINAL FANTASY VII』ポリゴンデザインのティファ、エアリスがソフビフィギュア化！Amazonにて予約受付中！
entries.description: Soft vinyl figures of Tifa and Aerith based on the original deformed designs of ``FINAL FANTASY VII'' are now available for pre-order on Amazon! #FF7

entries.title: "Pragmata" special feature Vol. 1 is now available on the talk show "PLAY! PLAY! PLAY!". We welcome the development team as guests and introduce the appeal of the game with live play.
entries.title_ja: トーク番組「PLAY! PLAY! PLAY!」で「プラグマタ」特集Vol.1を配信開始。開発陣をゲストに迎え，実況プレイを交えてゲームの魅力を紹介
entries.description: SIE today released Volume 1 of Capcom's SF action ADV "Pragmata" special feature on the latest episode of the talk show "PLAY! PLAY! PLAY!". The program welcomes director Cho Yong-hee and producer Naoto Oyama as guests, and introduces the appeal of this work along with MC Hatsune Matsushima. Vol.2 is scheduled to be distributed tomorrow, April 14th at 15:00.

entries.title: Indie game event “BitSummit PUNCH” announces streamers and creators who will participate as official PR supporters
entries.title_ja: インディーゲームイベント「BitSummit PUNCH」，オフィシャルPRサポーターズとして参加する配信者とクリエイターを発表
entries.description: The BitSummit Executive Committee today announced the streamers and creators who will participate as official PR supporters at the indie game event "BitSummitPUNCH" to be held at Kyoto Miyako Messe from May 22, 2026. At the special booth, developers and designers will be invited as guests, and talk sessions will be held where they will hear behind-the-scenes stories about development, as well as live play sessions and more.

entries.title: 200 fans of "Sky: Children of the Stars" gathered. Participated in the beach trash picking event “Light-Spinning Beach Clean in Enoshima”
entries.title_ja: 「Sky 星を紡ぐ子どもたち」ファン200人が集結。海岸のゴミ拾いイベント「光を紡ぐビーチクリーン in 江の島」に参加してきた
entries.description: On April 11, 2026, thatgamecompany's ``Children Who Spin Sky Stars'' and the NPO Umisakura collaborated to hold a cleanup event on the Kanagawa and Enoshima coasts. 200 participants gathered at the event and enjoyed an activity where they picked up trash on the beach.

entries.title: Get to the bottom of the brutal murder of local residents and trace the existence of a cult. ADV "Inkblood" where you take on the investigation as a newly appointed inquisitor, playtest scheduled to start on April 23, 2026
entries.title_ja: 住民惨殺事件の真相に迫り，邪教の存在を追う。新任異端審問官として捜査に挑むADV「Inkblood」，2026年4月23日にプレイテスト開始予定
entries.description: CRITICALREFLEX announced today (April 13, 2026) that playtesting for the new Inquisitor-themed title "Inkblood" will begin on April 23, 2026. The player takes on the role of a newly appointed inquisitor, and uses the investigative equipment installed in the horse-drawn carriage to get to the bottom of an incident in which residents were brutally murdered, and to trace the involvement of xie jiao.

entries.title: Details of the main field ``Sangora Valley'' of ``The Blood of Dawnwalker'', an RPG that manipulates the power of vampires, have been released. A fictional region inspired by the Carpathian Mountains
entries.title_ja: 吸血鬼の力を操るRPG「The Blood of Dawnwalker」，メインフィールド「サンゴラ谷」の詳細を公開。カルパティア山脈をモチーフにした架空の地域
entries.description: Bandai Namco Entertainment today released information on ``Sangora Valley'', which will be the main field of the new open world RPG ``The Blood of Dawnwalker''. The Sangora Valley is a fictional region located in the Carpathian Mountains, and its design was said to be inspired by the nature and culture of Central and Eastern Europe.

entries.title: "SAROS" releases a gameplay trailer that introduces various systems such as the "modifier" function that allows you to change the world
entries.title_ja: 「SAROS」，世界を改変できる“モディファイア”機能など，さまざまなシステムを紹介するゲームプレイトレイラーを公開
entries.description: Sony Interactive Entertainment today (April 13, 2026) released the Japanese version of the gameplay trailer for its new title ``SAROS'', which is scheduled to be released on April 30th. The trailer introduces a skill tree that strengthens the main character and a solar eclipse that engulfs the world in madness.

entries.title: A lonely lighthouse keeper embarks on a dangerous journey to reunite with his family. Mystery-solving ADV “WILL: Follow The Light” to be released on Steam on May 8th
entries.title_ja: 孤独な灯台守が家族に再会するため危険な旅へと出る。謎解きADV「WILL: Follow The Light」，5月8日にSteamでリリース
entries.description: TomorrowHeadStudio announced on April 12, 2026 that "WILL:FollowTheLight" will be released on May 8, Japan time. This is a mystery-solving adventure game from a first-person perspective in which the main character, a lighthouse keeper on an isolated island in the harsh northern waters, sets out on a dangerous journey to save his son in his hometown, which has been hit by a major disaster.

entries.title: [Interview] ``Wan-Wan Battle,'' a fighting game where you compete by barking into a microphone, was inspired by a dog fight he saw at a nearby park - Interview with developer M. Katsu
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］マイクで吠えて勝負する対戦ゲーム「ワンワンバトル」，着想は近所の公園で見た犬の喧嘩ーー開発者M.Katsu氏に聞く
entries.description: The new title ``Wan-Wan Battle'', which is attracting attention for its unique mechanism in which players compete by imitating dog barks through microphones and competing against each other by barking, is scheduled to start early access on May 1, 2026. We interviewed Mr. M. Katsu, the developer of this game, about the impetus for development and the concept.

entries.title: “Karaoke Manekineko” x “Momotaro Dentetsu” collaboration will be held at 8 stores in Tokyo. Get an original sticker by playing at a participating store.
entries.title_ja: 「カラオケまねきねこ」×「桃太郎電鉄」コラボを都内8店舗で開催。対象店舗でのプレイでオリジナルステッカーをプレゼント
entries.description: Koshidaka today launched a collaboration between the ``Momotaro Dentetsu'' series and ``Karaoke Manekineko'' only in Tokyo. The period is until May 12th. During the period, original stickers will be distributed to customers who play "Momotaro Dentetsu - Showa Heisei Reiwa is also a classic! - forE-bo Entertainment Box" at participating stores.

entries.title: Washagana TV's latest video shows the unboxing of "Dragon Quest Wafer ~Lotto Trilogy~"
entries.title_ja: わしゃがなTVの最新動画では，「ドラゴンクエスト ウエハース 〜ロト三部作〜」を開封する様子をお届け
entries.description: Today (April 13, 2026), the latest video of the web program "Washagana TV" by Yuichi Nakamura and Mafia Kajita was released. This time, we will show you the unboxing of "Dragon Quest Wafers ~Lotto Trilogy~". The aim is to complete all 33 types of cards, including those drawn only by Bandai.

entries.title: In a world where electric cars have become mainstream, run a deserted gas station. Story-focused simulation “The Last Gas Station” to be released on April 28, 2026
entries.title_ja: 電気自動車が主流となった世界で，さびれた給油所を切り盛りする。物語重視のシミュレーション「最後のガソリンスタンド」，2026年4月28日に発売
entries.description: Alawar announced on April 10, 2026 that it will release a new title for PC, ``The Last Gas Station,'' on April 28, and also released a release date trailer. Set in a world where electric cars have become mainstream, the story follows the story behind a run-down gas station as you run it.

entries.title: Holo Indie's free walking simulator "HoloExpo20XX" will be released on Steam on May 12th. Aiming to escape from the Hololive EXPO venue
entries.title_ja: holo Indie発の無料ウォーキングシミュレーター「HoloExpo20XX」，5月12日にSteamで配信。ホロライブEXPO会場からの脱出を目指す
entries.description: CCM today announced that it will release a new title under the "holoIndie" brand, "HoloExpo20XX", on May 12th, and opened the Steam store page. It's a walking simulator set in an exhibition hall modeled after Hololive's EXPO, where you look for abnormalities and aim to escape.

entries.title: Residents of the game's setting ``Konogatsu Village'' in ``Honogurashi no Niwa'' have been revealed. If you get along well with him, he will invite you to his house.
entries.title_ja: 「ほの暮しの庭」，ゲームの舞台「彼ヶ津村」の住民たちが公開に。仲を深めると家に招待してくれる
entries.description: Nippon Ichi Software today (April 13, 2026) released the latest information on ``Honogurashi no Niwa'', which the company plans to release on July 30th, and the residents of ``Konogatsu Village,'' the setting of the work. This time, 14 people have been revealed, including ``Rin'', the village chief, and ``Yuta'', a young man who moved from the city. The main character can interact with the residents, and if he gets along well with them, they will invite him to his home.

entries.title: Jump, swing, and glide with pizza in hand. Miniature garden 3D platform game “Pizzapocalypse 2”, gameplay trailer released

entries.description: On April 9, 2026, Dutch indie development studio MonkeyStrikeGames released a gameplay trailer for ``Pizzapocalypse 2,'' a miniature garden-style 3D platform game currently under development. Run around the stage with unique actions such as jumping and gliding using pizza and confront companies aiming to conquer the world.

Held at SHIBUYA (Shibuya Public Hall), Minami Takayama as Rantaro Inaji, Mayumi Tanaka as Kirimaru of Settsu, Sadatomo Ichiryusai as Shinbei Fukutomi, Toshihiko Seki as Hansuke Doi, Ushio Ken Narita who played the role of Bunjiro E, Soichiro Hoshi who played the role of Senzo Tachibana, Shigeru Shibuya who played Nagaji Nakazai, Ennen Kana who played the role of Koheita Nanamatsu, Ryotaro Okiayu who played the role of Isaku Zenpoji, and Chihiro Suzuki who played the role of Ruzaburo Shokumitsu. Amago also made a special appearance.

entries.title_ja: リカちゃん人形にヒゲが生えた…！？「スーパーマリオ」コラボで赤い帽子と青のオーバーオール姿を披露、「ピーチ姫」ドレスも似合ってる
entries.description: Licca-chan doll with cute accessories such as superstars!

entries.title: Experience “Animal Crossing: New Horizons” in real life! ? It looks like an interesting event where you can enjoy fishing, stargazing, DIY, etc. Limited goods such as “trees” will also be on sale
entries.title_ja: 『あつまれ どうぶつの森』をリアル体験！？ 魚釣り、星空観察、DIYなどが楽しめるイベントが面白そう―“木”など限定グッズも販売予定
entries.description: An “Animal Crossing: New Horizons” collaboration event will be held at Tokyu Resort Town Tateshina from April 18th to July 20th, 2026!

entries.title: When it came to the Japanese title, it suddenly became a command, ``Do it!'' ``Maintenance Shop Brothers'' is impressed with the reproduction of the ``interior of the car''! A full-fledged maintenance sim that car enthusiasts will love
entries.title_ja: 邦題になると急に命令形になった『やれ！整備工場ブラザーズ』、“車の内部”の再現度に感嘆！車好きほどハマる本格寄り整備シム
entries.description: It is said to be a "more serious maintenance sim" than the typical car maintenance sim. ...Wow, this looks like it would be fun for users who actually like maintaining cars!

entries.title: “Ichiban Kuji Bread Robo” is on sale again! A lineup that makes breakfast fun, including a hot sandwich machine and plates and mugs that go with it.
entries.title_ja: 「一番くじ パンどろぼう」が待望の再販！ホットサンドマシーンや一緒に使いたいプレート、マグカップなど朝食が楽しくなるラインナップ
entries.description: “Ichiban Kuji Pan Robo ~Ishi no Pan~” will be resold from April 18, 2026!

entries.title: The 40-year trajectory of the "Xanadu" series, which began with Nippon Falcom's legendary hit, has evolved in line with the times, from "Tokyo" to "Tokyo"
entries.title_ja: 日本ファルコムの伝説的ヒットから始まった『ザナドゥ』シリーズ40年の軌跡―時代に合わせた進化は、いよいよ『東亰』から『亰都』へ
entries.description: The Xanadu series, which is still in development, has been around for over 40 years. We look at its history from its origins to the latest developments.

entries.title: “PicoCAD 2” is a low-poly 3D modeling software that “approaches 3D modeling with a game-like feel” [Developer interview]
entries.title_ja: 「ゲーム的な感覚で3Dモデリングにアプローチしている」ローポリ3Dモデリングソフト『picoCAD 2』【開発者インタビュー】
entries.description: This project interviews developers of new indie games of interest. This time, we'd like to bring you a mini-interview with the developer of "picoCAD 2," a low-poly 3D modeling software developed by Johan Peitz and released for PC/Mac on March 16th.

entries.title: A battle where you only follow the rules to win, an encounter for the first time in 20 years - A story of generational change with the new PS5 version of "Shutokou Battle"
entries.title_ja: 「勝つためのルールしか守らない」戦い、20年ぶりの邂逅―PS5版新『首都高バトル』という世代交代のお話
entries.description: This is the first new product for home use in 25 years. I would like to tell you the story of a nameless runner who was fascinated by the Shuto Expressway.

entries.title: The balance between creating a base and fighting attacks is so good... ARPG survival aiming to escape from the dream "The Dream Within" Adventure, eat, and become strong [Craft Survival Directory]
entries.title_ja: 拠点を作って襲撃と戦うバランスが秀逸すぎる…夢からの脱出目指すARPGサバイバル『The Dream Within』冒険して飯を食って強くなれ【クラフトサバイバル名鑑】
entries.description: [Craft Survival Directory] introduces the appeal of classic games by an author who likes games of the same genre.

entries.title: "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure" nanoblocks are cute and cool! Jotaro, DIO and other “part 3 characters” are reproduced with stands
entries.title_ja: 「ジョジョの奇妙な冒険」ナノブロックが可愛くもクール！承太郎、DIOたち“3部キャラ”をスタンドと共に再現
entries.description: Nanoblock will release 5 “JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure Stardust Crusaders” products on April 25th! Characters and stands such as "Jotaro Kujo / Star Platinum" are included in the set.

entries.title: [Memorial] Thank you Yoshihisa Kishimoto! The “Kunio-kun” series was the “master of the secret base” for us!
entries.title_ja: 【追悼】ありがとう岸本良久さん！『くにおくん』シリーズは僕らにとっての「秘密基地の主」だった！
entries.description: Yoshihisa Kishimoto, the game creator and creator of the Kunio-kun series, including Nekketsu Kōha Kunio-kun, passed away on April 2nd.

entries.title: Miniature toy gacha "Gacha Firefighter" will be released in late April. A total of 5 types are available, including "special fire extinguisher" and "warning siren".
entries.title_ja: ミニチュア玩具ガチャ「ガチャ消防」4月下旬発売。「特殊消火器」や「警告サイレン」など全5種がラインナップ
entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts will release the gacha product "Gacha Firefighter" in late April. The price is 300 yen per time.

entries.title: [Amazon Sale] Potensic ATOM 2, a drone with built-in remote ID that allows you to enjoy 8K photos and 4K videos, is now available at a bargain price!
entries.title_ja: 【Amazonセール】8K写真と4K動画が楽しめるリモートID内蔵ドローン「Potensic ATOM 2」がお買い得価格で登場！
entries.description: The drone "Potensic ATOM 2" with built-in remote ID is on sale at a special price on Amazon. The period ends at 23:59 on April 24th.

entries.title: "Macross Delta" Sv-262 Draken III Lloyd machine is now a 1/72 scale plastic model! Hidetaka Tenjin is in charge of the package illustration! Now accepting reservations at Rakuten Books!
entries.title_ja: 『マクロスΔ』Sv-262 ドラケンIII ロイド機が1/72スケールプラモデル化！パッケージイラストは天神英貴氏が担当！楽天ブックスで予約受付中！
entries.description: From "Macross Delta", the Sv-262 Draken III Lloyd machine that appeared in the climax has been made into a 1/72 scale plastic model! Missile pod parts included! Hidetaka Tenjin is in charge of the package illustration! Now accepting reservations at Rakuten Books! #MacrossΔ

entries.title: “Uruca” and “Ras” have joined the desktop figure series of streamers belonging to Crazy Raccoon! Appearing in Banpresto's prize!
entries.title_ja: Crazy Raccoon所属ストリーマーたちのデスクトップフィギュアシリーズに「Uruca」「Ras」が仲間入り！バンプレストのプライズに登場！
entries.description: “Uruca” and “Ras” are now available in the desktop figure series that transforms streamers belonging to Crazy Raccoon into three-dimensional figures! Scheduled to be released as a Banpresto prize starting April 14th (Tuesday)! #Prize #Figure

entries.title: Kabaya Foods will sell minicar “Majorette” at “Toys R Us” from April 11th
entries.title_ja: カバヤ食品、「トイザらス」でミニカー「マジョレット」を4月11日より販売
entries.description: Kabaya Foods will be selling the minicar "Majorette" at Toys R Us from April 11th. Prices start from 999 yen.

entries.title: Gashapon "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Town Adventure Stardust Crusaders 02" released on the 3rd week of April!
entries.title_ja: ガシャポン「ジョジョの奇妙な冒険 まちぼうけ スターダストクルセイダース02」4月第3週発売！
entries.description: Bandai will release Gashapon ``JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Town Adventure Stardust Crusaders 02'' in the third week of April. The price is 500 yen per time.

entries.title: “Ichiban Kuji Tom and Jerry Colorful Funny Time!” will be released from today!
entries.title_ja: 「一番くじ トムとジェリー Colorful Funny Time!」本日より順次発売！
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release the no-lose character lottery "Ichiban Kuji Tom and Jerry Colorful Funny Time!" from April 11th. The price is 750 yen per time.

entries.title: There is a sweet and sour atmosphere! “The Witch’s Journey Elaina Citrus ver.” [Newly taken at AmiAmi Exhibition] The cover illustration of the light novel volume 24 has been made into a figure
entries.title_ja: 甘酸っぱい雰囲気が漂ってくる！「魔女の旅々 イレイナ シトラスver.」【あみあみ展示撮り下ろし】ライトノベル第24巻の表紙イラストをフィギュア化
entries.description: 1/6 scale figure "Elena Citrus ver." scheduled to be released by Furyu in November 2026. This is a three-dimensional version of Elaina, the main character of Shiraishi Shirai's ``Majo no Tabi'', which has been developed in a media mix including light novels, manga, and anime.

entries.title: “S.H.Figuarts Kamen Rider Zets Catastrom” from “Kamen Rider Zets” will be commercialized
entries.title_ja: 「仮面ライダーゼッツ」より「S.H.Figuarts 仮面ライダーゼッツ カタストロム」が商品化決定
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS announced on April 12th the commercialization of the action figure ``S.H.Figuarts Kamen Rider ZET'S Catastrom''.

entries.title: The bones are expressed with colorful clear parts! From “Keroro Sergeant”, the half-body skeleton figure “Skyaraton” is now available in Gashapon!
entries.title_ja: 骨部分はカラフルなクリアパーツで表現！『ケロロ軍曹』より、半身スケルトンフィギュア「すきゃらとん」がガシャポンに登場！
entries.description: “Sergeant Keroro” appears in the Gashapon figure “Skyaraton” with the concept of character x skeleton! The Keroro Platoon, whose half body is a skeleton, is now three-dimensional with a star-shaped pedestal! Scheduled to be released in the third week of April! #Keroro Sergeant #Capsule Toy

entries.title: Gashapon “All Guys Machiboke” released in the third week of April!
entries.title_ja: ガシャポン「All Guys まちぼうけ」4月第3週発売！
entries.description: Bandai will release the Gashapon ``All Guys Machiboke'' in the third week of April. The price is 400 yen per time.

entries.title: Biscuits with “Nijisanji” tin badges are now available! There are 15 types of can badges designed with drivers in concierge costumes!
entries.title_ja: 「にじさんじ」の缶バッジ付きビスケットが登場！コンシェルジュ衣装のライバーたちをデザインした缶バッジは全15種類！
entries.description: Biscuits with “Nijisanji” tin badges are now available! The can badges are designed with Livers in Shokugan's original concierge costumes! Scheduled to be released on April 13th! #Nijisanji #Candy toys

entries.title: I can almost smell the sweet scent! "Uma Musume Pretty Derby Mihono Bourbon [CODE: Grassage] Ver." [Newly photographed at AmiAmi exhibition] Three-dimensional figure in costume inspired by chocolate
entries.title_ja: 甘い香りが漂ってきそう！「ウマ娘 プリティーダービー　ミホノブルボン [CODE：グラサージュ]Ver.」【あみあみ展示撮り下ろし】チョコをイメージした衣装姿で立体化
entries.description: 1/7 scale figure "Mihono Bourbon [CODE: Grassage] Ver." scheduled to be released in September 2026 from Cranel. This is a three-dimensional version of the chestnut-haired horse girl "Mihono Bourbon" that appears in Cygames' training simulation game "Uma Musume Pretty Derby."

entries.title: "Adelia Retro" glasses are retro and cute ♪ A cream soda miniature light that glows with LED is now available in Takara Tomy Arts' gacha!
entries.title_ja: 「アデリアレトロ」のグラスがレトロでかわいい♪LEDで光るクリームソーダのミニチュアライトがタカラトミーアーツのガチャに登場！
entries.description: “Adelia Retro” miniature model is now available in Gacha! When you turn on the switch on the back of the ice cream, it becomes a miniature lamp that lights up with LED! #AdeliaRetro

entries.title: The golden laminate armor is dazzling! "Five Star Monogatari Teiki Magna Palace The Night of Gold" [Newly photographed at AmiAmi exhibition] Non-movable, fully fixed display model made into a plastic model
entries.title_ja: 黄金ラミネートの装甲がまぶしい！「ファイブスター物語 帝騎マグナパレス ザ・ナイト・オブ・ゴールド」【あみあみ展示撮り下ろし】非可動、完全固定ディスプレイモデルでプラモ化
entries.description: 1/144 scale plastic model kit "Teiki Magna Palace The Night of Gold" scheduled to be released in August 2026 from Hour Treasure. This work is a three-dimensional version of the main robot ``Teiki Magna Palace The Night of Gold'' that appears in Mamoru Nagano's science fiction manga ``Five Star Story.''

entries.title: “Atashinchi”’s gashapon “Narabun desu.” is back! The four members of the Tachibana family are three-dimensionalized with a design that looks like they are holding hands!
entries.title_ja: 『あたしンち』のガシャポン「ならぶんです。」が再登場！手を繋いでいるようなデザインでタチバナ家の4人を立体化！
entries.description: Gashapon “Narabundesu” from the anime “Atashinchi” is back! Contains a total of 4 types of three-dimensional versions of the four members of the Tachibana family! When you display them side by side, they look like they are holding hands! Scheduled to be released in the third week of April. #Atashinchi #Capsule toy

entries.title: Mametchi and others are made into Gashapon figures with half skeletons! "Skyaraton Tamagotchi" with the concept of character x skeleton is now available!
entries.title_ja: まめっちたちが半身スケルトンでガシャポンフィギュア化！キャラクター×スケルトンがコンセプトの「すきゃらとん たまごっち」が登場！
entries.description: Introducing the Gashapon figure “Skyaraton Tamagotchi” with the concept of character x skeleton! Also pay attention to the design of the bones with each character's motif! Scheduled to be released in the third week of April! #Tamagotchi #Capsule Toy

entries.title: Comes with a hand-drawn illustration patch of the cast! "Macross Delta" VF-31 Siegfried's Reina Prowler, Mikumo Guinnemer color 1/72 scale plastic model is now available for pre-order at Rakuten Books!
entries.title_ja: キャストの直筆イラストワッペン付！『マクロスΔ』VF-31 ジークフリードのレイナ・プラウラー、美雲・ギンヌメール カラーの1/72スケールプラモデルが楽天ブックスで予約受付中！
entries.description: Reina Prowler/Mikumo Guinnemer color plastic model of VF-31 Siegfried, which appeared in the opening video of Walküre 3rd LIVE "Valkyrie Never Betrays" at Yokohama Arena, is now available for pre-order at Rakuten Books! #MacrossΔ

entries.title: The second edition of the ``STAR WARS'' blister charm collection is now available in Gashapon! A lineup of 5 types including Luke and Princess Leia!
entries.title_ja: 『STAR WARS』のブリスターチャームコレクションの第2弾がガシャポンに登場！ルークやレイア姫たち全5種類がラインナップ！
entries.description: From “STAR WARS”, the second blister charm collection is now available in Gashapon! There are a total of 5 types in the lineup, including Luke, Princess Leia, and Yoda! Blister pack specification that can be displayed as is! #Star Wars #Capsule Toy

entries.title: A three-dimensional version of Kuniyoshi Utagawa's masterpiece, ``Soma no Furudairi''! “Ichiban Kuji Utagawa Ichimon” will be released sequentially from today!
entries.title_ja: 歌川国芳の代表作ともいえる「相馬の古内裏」を立体化！ 「一番くじ 歌川一門」本日より順次発売！
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release the no-lose character lottery “Ichiban Kuji Utagawa Ichimon” from April 11th. The price is 800 yen per time.

entries.title: Pre-orders for the dragon-themed Punimov “PUNI☆MOFU Ron” from “Megami Device” will start from April 15th!
entries.title_ja: 「メガミデバイス」より龍をモチーフにしたプニモフ「PUNI☆MOFU ロン」が4月15日から予約開始決定！
entries.description: Kotobukiya has announced that pre-orders for the plastic model ``PUNI☆MOFU Ron'' will begin on April 15th at 11am. Release date and price are both undecided.

entries.title: Tamiya releases ``1/35 Israeli Army Tank Tyran 5'' and ``1/35 American M60A3 Tank'' resale today!
entries.title_ja: タミヤ、「1/35 イスラエル軍戦車 ティラン5」＆「1/35 アメリカ M60A3戦車」再販分を本日発売！
entries.description: Tamiya will resell the plastic models ``1/35 Israeli Army Tank Tyran 5'' and ``1/35 American M60A3 Tank'' as special sale items around April 11th. The price is 5,060 yen for "1/35 Israeli Army Tank Tyran 5" and 4,400 yen for "1/35 American M60A3 Tank".

entries.title: “Optional Hairstyle & Face Parts Set (Juri Saijo/Natsuha Arisugawa)” is on sale today from the “30MS” x “Shanimas” collaboration!
entries.title_ja: 「30MS」×「シャニマス」コラボより「オプションヘアスタイル&フェイスパーツセット（西城樹里/有栖川夏葉）」本日発売！
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release the plastic model "30MS Optional Hairstyle & Face Parts Set (Juri Saijo/Natsuha Arisugawa)" on April 11th. The price is 2,750 yen.

entries.title: From "Senki Zesshou Symphogear XV", Chris Yukine wearing "Ichiibaru" has been made into a three-dimensional figure. Reservations start from 10am on April 11th
entries.title_ja: 「戦姫絶唱シンフォギア XV」より「イチイバル」を纏った雪音クリスが立体化。4月11日10時より予約開始
entries.description: FURYU will be accepting reservations for the figure ``TENITOL Chris Yukine'' at FURYU HOBBY MALL and other locations from 10:00 a.m. on April 11th to 11:59 p.m. on May 18th. It will be sold to order, and the price is 8,800 yen. Shipping of the product is scheduled for October.

entries.title: Wear “Nyanko Sensei” on your forehead!? Get hair bands with “Nyanko Sensei” and “Black Nyanko” designs from “Natsume’s Book of Friends” with Takara Tomy Arts Gacha!!
entries.title_ja: 額に「ニャンコ先生」を装着!?『夏目友人帳』から「ニャンコ先生」と「黒ニャンコ」デザインのヘアバンドをタカラトミーアーツのガチャでゲットしよう!!
entries.description: The hair band door from the TV anime “Natsume’s Book of Friends” is now available in Gacha! The faces of “Nyanko Sensei” and “Black Nyanko” are designed! #Natsume's Book of Friends

entries.title: "Snack World Reloaded" announced. A “new-class remake” with significantly revised gameplay and control, and an enhanced story.
entries.title_ja: 「スナックワールド リローデット」が発表に。ゲーム性と操作感が大幅に見直され，ストーリー面も強化された“新作級リメイク”
entries.description: Today (April 10, 2026), Level-5 announced the new title ``Snack World Reloaded'' on the official program ``LEVEL5VISION2026 Takumi''. This work is a remake of ``Snack World Treasurers'' released in 2017. In the released teaser PV, you can see new battle scenes and more.

entries.title: Release of the product version of ``Sol Cesto'', a roguelite that explores the underground world in search of the sun. Expanding characters and biomes through early access
entries.title_ja: 太陽を求めて地下世界を冒険するローグライト「Sol Cesto」の製品版リリース。アーリーアクセスを経てキャラクターやバイオームを拡張
entries.description: The retail version of the roguelite ``SolCesto'', whose early access version attracted a lot of attention, has been released. In the product version, the number of characters has increased to 10 and the number of biomes has been expanded to 5. Current Steam user reviews are "very positive," and a 33% off sale is currently underway to commemorate the release.

entries.title: "Collapse: Star Rail", Ver. 4.2 "And the people's laughter echoes" will be distributed on April 22nd. “Ginro LV.999” and “Hiei” appear, and 3rd anniversary event is held
entries.title_ja: 「崩壊：スターレイル」，Ver.4.2「そして、人々の笑いが響き渡る」を4月22日に配信。「銀狼LV.999」「緋英」が登場し，3周年イベントが開催
entries.description: Today (April 10, 2026), HoYoverse released a preview program for Ver. 4.2 of ``Collapse: Star Rail'', ``And the People's Laughter Reverberates,'' and set the distribution date for April 22nd. In the new version, a series of special events will be held for the upcoming 3rd anniversary on April 26th, and "Ginro LV.999" and "Hiei" will appear as new characters.

entries.title: The 2nd visual for the stage play "Gnosia The Live Playing Theater" has been released. Secondary ticket pre-sale begins
entries.title_ja: 舞台「グノーシア ザ・ライブプレイングシアター」，2ndビジュアルを解禁。チケットの二次先行販売もスタート
entries.description: OfficeENDLESS released the 2nd visual of "Gnosia the Live Playing Theater" on April 11, 2026. This performance is a stage adaptation of the TV anime based on the game ``Gnosia''. The second pre-sale of tickets has started, and we have also received comments from the 26 cast members who will appear in this work, so we will post them here.

entries.title: [Interview] "Japanese content is like oil" - Interview with the CEO of Manga Productions about the characteristics of the Middle East market and the purpose of exhibiting at AnimeJapan
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］「日本コンテンツは石油のようなもの」――マンガプロダクションズCEOに聞く，中東市場の特色とAnimeJapan出展の狙い
entries.description: Manga Productions, a company based in Saudi Arabia that sends Japanese anime, manga, and games to the Middle East, was exhibiting at AnimeJapan this year as well. I visited the booth again this time, so I would like to tell you about the situation along with an interview with CEO Bukari Isamu.

entries.title: [Interview] What is the reason behind the “explosion” of indie game events in this historic town?　“Wandering Kawagoe GAME DIGG” aims to be community-based rather than revitalizing the town
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］歴史ある町にインディーゲームイベントが“爆誕”した理由とは？　「ぶらり川越 GAME DIGG」が目指す，町おこしではない地域密着
entries.description: The game event "Wandering Kawagoe GAMEDIGG2" will be held in Kawagoe City, Saitama Prefecture on April 25, 2026. How did this open town event, which you can enjoy while strolling through Kawagoe's traditional townscape, come about, and what is its goal? We spoke to four members of the executive committee.

entries.title: Learn the world of "Crusader Kings III" through manga. Approaching the charm of the addictive time thief with a murky human drama [PR]
entries.title_ja: マンガで知る「Crusader Kings III」の世界。ドロドロ人間ドラマがクセになる時間泥棒の魅力に迫る【PR】
entries.description: “CrusaderKings III” has been extremely popular since its release in 2020. Some people may have heard the name, but don't really know what kind of game it is. In this article, we will provide a digest manga for those people that will give you a quick understanding of the atmosphere and charm of "CK3".

entries.title: Weekly Steam Plaza No. 148: Musical RPG “People of Note” and SF action “Super Alloy Crush” to be released
entries.title_ja: 週刊Steam広場 第148号：ミュージカルRPG「People of Note」や，SFアクション「Super Alloy Crush」が発売に
entries.description: "Weekly Steam Square" delivers information on Steam titles and sales that were released this week. This week, ``People of Note'', a turn-based RPG that explores a world where different cultures live for each music genre, and ``SuperAlloy Crush'', an action rogue-lite depicting the adventures of space hunters, were released.

entries.title: An indie game experience for parents and children to enjoy together. Fun games and the charm of “encounters” found at “TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026”
entries.title_ja: 親子で楽しむインディーゲーム体験。「TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026」で見つけた，楽しかったゲームと“出会い”の魅力
entries.description: An indie game that has become familiar to children. Game events held all over Japan are valuable places where you can enjoy encountering new works and also get to know the thoughts of the creators. We will introduce the discoveries and experiences that can only be made when parents and children participate together through ``TOKYO INDIEGA MESSUMMIT 2026,'' which we visited as a family.

entries.title: "StellaSola" event "A Fox's Shadow Dancing in the Dark" will start on April 16th. Limited tourer “Otoha” also appears at the same time.
entries.title_ja: 「ステラソラ」，イベント「夜暗に踊る狐独な影」を4月16日に開始。限定巡遊者「オトハ」も同時に登場
entries.description: Yostar announced today (April 11, 2026) that it will hold a live broadcast to commemorate the half-anniversary of the company's ``StellaSola,'' and that the event ``A Fox's Shadow Dancing in the Dark'' will be held from after maintenance on April 16th until 4:59 on April 30th. Along with this, ★5 limited cruiser "Otoha" (CV: Ai Kakuma) will also participate.

entries.title: The latest information on the real event “Jantama 7th Anniversary ~Tamatenjin Shrine Festival~” has been released. Event speaker information, commemorative goods, food menu information supervised by professional mahjong players, etc. are now available.
entries.title_ja: 「雀魂-じゃんたま-」リアルイベント「雀魂 7周年記念 〜魂天神社例大祭〜」の最新情報が公開に。イベント登壇者情報，記念グッズ，プロ雀士監修によるフードメニュー情報などが解禁
entries.description: On April 10, 2026, Yostar released the latest information on the "Jantama" real event "Jantama 7th Anniversary ~Tama Tenjin Shrine Reitaisai~" scheduled to be held on May 2nd at Tokyo Big Sight South Hall 1. This time, stage event information, commemorative goods that can be purchased at the venue, food menu, etc. have been revealed.

entries.title: Concentrate, run, shoot. TAMASHIKA, a new arcade-like FPS featuring psychedelic production and an overwhelming sense of exhilaration, is released today.
entries.title_ja: 集中せよ，走れ，撃て。サイケデリックな演出と，圧倒的な爽快感が特徴のアーケードライクな新作FPS「TAMASHIKA」が本日発売
entries.description: EDGLRD released the new title "TAMASHIKA" today (April 11, 2026). This work is a first-person shooting action game featuring psychedelic hand-drawn animation. You can enjoy arcade-like battles where you run through automatically generated hallways and quickly destroy enemies using a handgun in your right hand and a short sword in your left.

entries.title: "Graveyard Keeper" is now available for free on PC (Steam), PS, and Xbox. A medieval graveyard management simulator that allows for inhumane management.
entries.title_ja: 「Graveyard Keeper」がPC(Steam)とPS，Xbox向けに無料配信中。非人道的な経営ができる中世墓場管理シミュレータ
entries.description: GraveyardKeeper, a graveyard management simulation developed by LazyBearGames, is currently being distributed free of charge for PC (Steam), PS, and Xbox. The distribution period for the PS and Xbox versions is unknown, but the Steam version will end at 2:00 on April 14th.

entries.title: ``Holy Horror Mansion'', which inherits the flow of Yo-kai Watch, releases gameplay footage. Recordings of exploring the city looking for things that can be turned into "Mononoke"
entries.title_ja: 妖怪ウォッチの流れを継承した「ホーリーホラーマンション」，ゲームプレイ映像を公開。「モノノケ」にできそうな物を探して，街中を探索する様子を収録
entries.description: Level-5 released a gameplay video of the new project ``Holy Horror Mansion'' on the information program ``LEVEL5VISION2026 Takumi'' broadcast today. This work is a title currently under development as a game that inherits the flow of Yo-kai Watch. In the video, you can see them exploring the city while looking for things that could be turned into "mononoke" and taking photos.

entries.reason_ja: ゲーム枠なのに一般スポーツの実況・国際試合が主題

entries.description: Pre-orders for Kotobukiya's new figure of Pekora Usada will begin this week. It features a dynamic pose and is scheduled to ship in December 2026. Hurry up as the production is limited.

entries.description: The renewed version of ALTER's popular figure "2B (Ver1.1a)" is back in stock and reservations will resume this week. Scheduled to arrive in November 2026 with high quality reproduction of every detail.

Gugenka Co., Ltd. (CEO Masashi Mikami) collaborated with Sanrio Entertainment Co., Ltd. to hold a special event at Sanrio Puroland, "POMPOMPU...

entries.description: Scheduled for resale in September 2026. Reservations will be accepted starting April 10, 2026. Pre-orders start today and can be canceled until June 7th.

entries.title_ja: 魔法少女にあこがれて [描き下ろしイラスト] ホログラム缶バッジ
entries.description: Scheduled to be released in June 2026. Reservations will be accepted starting April 10, 2026. Pre-orders are available starting today, and cancellations are accepted until April 26th.

entries.description: A new anime collaboration pop-up store opens this week at Shibuya PARCO. A large number of limited collaboration products will be available, and a lottery will also be held.

entries.description: A collaboration cafe with a popular anime opens today in Ikebukuro Sunshine City. Special menus and newly drawn illustration goods are now on sale.

entries.description: A new anime pop-up store opens this week near Asakusa Kaminarimon. We are selling goods that are a fusion of tradition and anime.

entries.title: ``The Ascendance of the Bookworm'' OP will be replaced from episode 2, and generation AI will be used in the production process of some cuts

entries.description: It was announced on the anime's official website and the official website of animation production company WIT STUDIO that the opening video will be replaced from the second episode of the TV anime "Bookworm's Ascendance: The Adopted Daughter of the Lord."

entries.title: Osamu Dezaki will be featured on NHK's "I Want to Meet That Person" tomorrow, April 11th, and a video of his interview with Tetsuya Chiba will also be featured.
entries.title_ja: 出﨑統をNHK「あの人に会いたい」で明日4月11日に特集、ちばてつやとの対談映像も登場
entries.description: ``NHK Video File I Want to Meet That Person,'' which features animation director Osamu Dezaki, will be broadcast on NHK General TV tomorrow, April 11th, at 5:40 p.m.

entries.title: Visual & PV depicting the reunion of Goro & Sarina to commemorate the completion of the 3rd season of “Oshi no Ko”

entries.description: The final visual and PV for the third season of the TV anime "Oshi no Ko" based on the original work by Aka Akasaka and Mengo Yokoyari have been released.

entries.title: Will your soulmate be ugly and fat, a good-looking guy in debt, or a married man with a big age difference? "Marriage laundry"

entries.description: Two volumes of Nobuyuki Takahashi's ``Marriage Laundry'' were simultaneously published today, April 10th.

entries.description: The second round of advance tickets for the animated movie ``Expelled from Paradise: Resonance of the Heart'' with special benefits will go on sale on April 24th.

entries.title: My boyfriend is very beautiful. But...School BL that is a hot topic on SNS "A side of my boyfriend that only I know" Volume 1

entries.description: Volume 1 of Niiru's ``A side of my boyfriend that only I know'' was released today, April 10th, by KADOKAWA's Beam Comics.

entries.title: Postcard newly drawn for the second pre-production of the movie “Honokagayohe”, in charge of character design by Yoshitaka Amano
entries.title_ja: 天野喜孝キャラデザ担当の映画「炎かがよへ」、入プレ第2弾に描き下ろしポストカード
entries.description: The movie ``Homura Kagayoe'' has Yoshitaka Amano as the character designer. It has been decided that postcards drawn by Amano will be distributed as the second gift for attendees. At the same time, Amano's character design drawings for the movie were also released.

entries.title: My life changed completely when I decided to adopt the dog that my mother left behind. ``Rather than keep a daughter, I'd rather keep a dog.''
entries.title_ja: 母の遺した犬を引き取ることになって生活が一変「娘飼わんより犬の子飼え」
entries.description: Two volumes of Suzuki Suzuhiro's book ``Rather than keep a daughter and a dog, keep a puppy'' were simultaneously published today, April 10th.

entries.title: Scene cuts from the anime "DARK MACHINE" including machine battles with Kazuyuki Okitsu, Ryota Suzuki, etc.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「DARK MACHINE」に興津和幸、鈴木崚汰ら　マシンバトルなど収めた場面カット
entries.description: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Ryota Suzuki, Genta Nakamura, and Sohei Horikane have been confirmed as additional cast members for the original TV anime "DARK MACHINE THE ANIMATION." At the same time, new scene cuts were released.

entries.title: “KIKI KILL”, a revenge drama drawn by Koji Yamamoto of “Bushisatsu Pink” and Tataba Watanabe, starts
entries.title_ja: 「撲殺ピンク」の山本晃司が渡邉タタバと描く復讐劇「KIKI KILL キキキル」スタート
entries.description: The new series ``KIKI KILL'' by Koji Yamamoto of ``Bushisatsu Pink - Sex Criminal Executioner'' and Tataba Watanabe started in Big Comic Superior No. 9 (Shogakukan), released today, April 10th.

entries.title: Ghost in the Shell x atmos x Reebok collaboration sneakers, as well as T-shirts that recreate the 90s feel
entries.title_ja: 攻殻機動隊×atmos×Reebokのコラボスニーカー、90年代の風合いを再現したTシャツも
entries.description: A collaboration between the theatrical animation "GHOST IN THE SHELL" based on the original work by Masamune Shirow, the sneaker shop atmos, and the sports culture brand Reebok. A "Ghost in the Shell" collaboration model based on Reebok's classic sneaker INSTAPUMP FURY will be released.

entries.title: The first part of the second episode of the official comic version of "Dolls Nest: ORPHANS" will be published in the online magazine "Young Ace UP" today, April 10th (Friday)!
entries.title_ja: 公式コミカライズ「Dolls Nest: ORPHANS」第2話前編、オンラインマガジン「ヤングエースUP」に本日4/10(金)掲載！
entries.description: ``Dolls Nest'' is a customized 3D action game for PC that is currently on sale on Steam and was originally planned by NitroArts, a CG team belonging to Nitroplus. The first part of the official comic version of “Dolls Nest: ORPHANS” Episode 2 “Chuo Cave I/Scavengers and Pilgrims” has been released...

entries.title: A series of murders that occur at a girls' school, a girl's psychological suspense story "Shoujo Kyokoi Folie à Deux"
entries.title_ja: 女学校で起こる連続殺人、ガールズサイコサスペンス「少女狂恋フォリ・ア・ドゥ」
entries.description: Kazuko Karasumi's new series ``Shoujo Kyokoi Folie à Deux'' is now available as a comipo comics work. Distribution began today, April 10th, at various e-book stores.

entries.title: His position is on the bench, and he can only move for 5 minutes... A new series depicting an unconventional volleyball boy, ``5-Minute Ace''
entries.title_ja: ポジションはベンチ、動けるのは5分…異端なバレー少年を描く新連載「5分のエース」
entries.description: Gin's new series, ``5-Minute Ace,'' has started in issue 5 of Comic Zerize, an electronic manga magazine published by Starts Publishing, released today, April 10th.

entries.title: A travel story about a boy whose purpose in life is making maps, mapping everything from dungeons to demon castles.
entries.title_ja: 地図作りが生きがいの少年が、ダンジョンも魔王城もすべてマッピングする旅物語
entries.description: NIMI's new series ``Another World Complete Map - A Journey to Map Villages, Dungeons, Demon Castles, etc.'', originally created by Sora Misaki, is now available as a comipo comics work. Distribution began today, April 10th, at various e-book stores.

entries.title: A “love story” between an adult and a child told in a nursery school “Itai no Tai no Sora wo Tobe” Volume 1
entries.title_ja: 保育園を舞台に紡がれる大人と子供の“愛の物語”「いたいのいたいのそらをとべ」1巻
entries.description: Volume 1 of Fuyuko Kurosaki's ``Itai no Tai no Sora wo Tobe'' was released today, April 10th.

entries.title: The price is 1.32 million yen...! "Ghost in the Shell: S.A.C." Motoko Kusanagi becomes a life-size figure - bonus version limited to 50 pieces also on sale
entries.title_ja: お値段132万円…！「攻殻機動隊 S.A.C.」草薙素子が等身大フィギュアにー限定50体のボーナス版も販売
entries.description: "Ghost in the Shell STAND ALONE COMPLEX" Motoko Kusanagi life-size figure is priced at 1,320,000 yen (tax included).

entries.title: “Another Eden” is finally entering its 10th year of service! Extra-large live broadcast of over 200 minutes “Anaden Festival 2026 Spring” report
entries.title_ja: 『アナザーエデン』がついにサービス10年目に突入！200分超の特大生配信「アナデンまつり2026春」レポート
entries.description: “Anaden” is finally entering its 10th year! There is no stopping the implementation of new content and new characters, and the main character Aldo's line, ``We have no choice but to move forward, right?'' seems to apply to the game as well.

entries.description: It seems that there was a lack of confirmation during the planning stage for the mini-game.

entries.title: Make your summer comfortable! The 2026 model of “refrigerated clothes” is now available from Thanko! Cool your body with a hybrid of a small refrigerator cooling system and a strong fan, and the vest and short sleeves are available in 4 colors each!

entries.description: For summer event preparation! Thanko releases the 2026 model of extremely cold “refrigerated clothes” with a vest and short sleeves! The body is cooled by both the cooling mechanism of a small refrigerator and a strong fan, and with the USB power supply method that can also be used with a mobile battery, it can run for about 3 hours on "strong" and about 7 hours on "weak"! #thanko

entries.title: DISH's bewitching temple priest wearing black gold, "Sibuna", has been made into a movable figure in Otherwhere's "Galactic series"! A deluxe version that allows you to change the costume on the chest is also available.

The ultimate beauty of the figure has been achieved through the thorough modeling and coloring supervision of Tetsuo Hara! Now accepting pre-orders on Amazon #Fist of the North Star #Super Statue Movable

It's a lottery sale item, and the application deadline is 23:59 on Friday, April 10th! #easy easy work #godzilla

entries.title: [Interview] Frozen Glass Opera based on the Otome Game original, ``Foamy Euclonia -Hair-''. Rui Furukawa and Daimu Sakata talk about the charm of the characters
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］乙女ゲーム原作の凍玻璃歌劇「泡沫のユークロニア -帷-」。古川流唯さん，坂田大夢さんが語るキャラクターの魅力
entries.description: We conducted an interview with Yui Furukawa, who plays the role of Kairi, and Daimu Sakata, who plays the role of Tsuyukusa, regarding the frozen glass opera ``Foamy Euclonia -Hail-'', which will open on May 9, 2026. We asked them about their impressions of the work, the charm of the characters, and their enthusiasm for the performance.

entries.title: "FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH" releases video focusing on "Red XIII", a beast that speaks human language
entries.title_ja: 「FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH」，人の言葉を話す獣「レッドXIII」にフォーカスした映像を公開
entries.description: Square Enix today (April 10, 2026) released a video focusing on ``Red XIII'', one of the characters appearing in the RPG ``FINAL FANTASY VIIREBIRTH''. You can check interactions with characters, battle scenes, etc. The Switch2, XboxSeriesX|S, and Microsoft StoreonWindows versions of this work are scheduled to be released on June 3rd.

entries.title: Energy drink brand "Real Gold" and "Street Fighter" collaborate. A campaign to win limited goods by lottery starts on April 13th.
entries.title_ja: エナジードリンクブランド「リアルゴールド」と「ストリートファイター」がコラボ。限定グッズが抽選で当たるキャンペーンを4月13日に開始
entries.description: Coca-Cola System announced today (April 10, 2026) that it will launch a collaboration campaign between the energy drink brand "Real Gold" and the fighting game "Street Fighter" on April 13th. This time, approximately 300,000 people will be entered into a lottery to win limited goods and PayPay points by purchasing eligible products and applying.

entries.title: A comical depiction of a gigantic monster approximately 30m tall, more than 12 times larger than Hachishaku-sama. Adventure game “Hyakushakusama” to be released on Steam in April
entries.title_ja: 八尺様の12倍以上，約30mの超巨大怪異をコミカルに描く。アドベンチャーゲーム「百尺様」，4月中にSteamでリリース
entries.description: Neru Neko announced today that the PC game ``Hyakushakusama'' will be released on Steam in April. This work is an adventure game based on the urban legend of a tall woman, ``Hachishaku-sama,'' and depicts ``Hyakushaku-sama'' on a scale more than 12 times larger. Although the game is based on urban legends, there are few horror elements, making it a comical game.

entries.title: Online pottery battle game "Kiln", open beta test "Throwdown" starts today on Steam. Pre-orders for the product version have also started
entries.title_ja: オンライン陶芸バトルゲーム「Kiln」，オープンβテスト「Throwdown」をSteamで本日開始。製品版の予約受付もスタート
entries.description: Xbox Game Studios today launched the open beta test ``Throwdown'' for the online multiplayer game ``Kiln'' on Steam. This work is a competitive action game with the theme of pottery. The game employs a unique system in which players use clay to form vessels and use them as their "bodies" to fight.

From ``Goddess of Victory: NIKKE'' comes a 1/4 scale figure of ``Mihara: Bonding Chain'', a member of the Rapture capture unit ``Wardless''. Scheduled to be released in December 2026. Below is an excerpt from the press release. “Katsu […]
The post From "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE", "Mihara: Bonding Chain" has been made into a 1/4 scale figure based on the official settings in the work! first appeared on AmiAmi News.

entries.title: "Crimson Desert" update plan for April to June released. New content such as boss rematches, difficulty settings, new pets, etc. will be gradually implemented.
entries.title_ja: 「紅の砂漠」，4〜6月のアップデート計画を公開。ボス再戦や難度設定，新規ペットなどの新コンテンツを順次実装
entries.description: PearlAbyss today released developer notes for the open world action adventure ``Crimson Desert'' and revealed the updates scheduled to be implemented from April to June. In addition to adding new content such as ``Boss Rematch'' and ``Re-Blockdown,'' improvements to operability and convenience will be made sequentially.

entries.title: A live-action Metal Gear Solid movie is currently in production at Sony Pictures. Zach Lipovsky and Adam B. Stein, who worked on “Final Dead Blood,” will direct
entries.title_ja: 「メタルギアソリッド」実写映画がソニー・ピクチャーズで制作進行中。「ファイナル・デッドブラッド」を手がけたZach Lipovsky氏とAdam B. Stein氏が監督に
entries.description: It has been revealed that Sony Pictures Entertainment is proceeding with the production of a ``Metal Gear Solid'' live-action movie. Zach Lipovsky and Adam B. Stein, who worked on ``Final Dead Blood,'' have been appointed as directors.

entries.title: More than 40 Hololive members appear as chibi characters. Slow life RPG "Puchi Holo Village - Swords, Shops, and Countryside Life" will be released on Steam on April 24th
entries.title_ja: 40名以上のホロライブメンバーがちびキャラになって登場。スローライフRPG「ぷちホロの村 - 剣とお店と田舎暮らし」，4月24日にSteamで発売
entries.description: CCMC announced today that it will release the PC game ``Puchi Holo Village - Swords, Shops, and Rural Life'' developed by Mr. Robokuro on April 24th from holoIndie, which is operated by the company. This work is a slow life RPG in which over 40 Hololive members appear as chibi characters. Enjoy dressing up, housing, map adventures, cooking, and more.

entries.title: "Thick as Thieves", the latest work from the "initiator of stealth action", will be released on May 21st. You can check the evolved game system with the latest video
entries.title_ja: “ステルスアクションの仕掛人”が贈る最新作「Thick as Thieves」，5月21日に発売決定。最新映像で進化したゲームシステムを確認できる
entries.description: MegabitPublishing has released the latest trailer for the new stealth action game "Thickas Thieves" and announced that it will be released on May 21, 2026 Japan time. In the trailer, you can see the original world view that this work is set in, and the game system that has been changed from PvPvE format to single play and two-player cooperative play (Co-op).

entries.title: The farm grows as you type. Healing idle sim “Fingertip Farm” released on April 20, 2026
entries.title_ja: タイピングにあわせて農園が育っていく。癒し系放置型シム「指先農園」，2026年4月20日発売
entries.description: MilkwayStudio has announced that it will release the relaxing idle sim "Fingertip Farm" on April 20, 2026. The supported platform is PC (Steam). It features a unique system that allows you to simply turn it on between tasks and the farm will develop according to your keyboard and mouse operations.

entries.title: The latest update "Emblems of His Power" for the Cthulhu cult management sim "Worshippers of Cthulhu" has been released. Added 17 new decorative items
entries.title_ja: クトゥルフ系カルト教団運営シム「Worshippers of Cthulhu」，最新アップデート「Emblems of His Power」を配信。新たに17種類の装飾アイテムを追加
entries.description: Crytivo and CrazyGoatGames have started distributing the free update ``EmblemsofHisPowerUpdate'' for ``WorshippersofCthulhu''. This game is a city builder run by a cult where the player, as the leader of the Cthulhu cult, builds a religious city and also manages the believers. The update added 17 new decorative items.

entries.title: Kuma-san Black's first title "Dot Abyss" has been announced. Pre-registration begins on April 14th

entries.description: DMMGAMES, operated by EXNOA, announced the new title "Dot Abyss" on April 10, 2026. This work is the first title of Studio KUMASAN's new label "Kuma-san Black". The information program ``DMMGAMESCONNECTPLUS'' released today introduces the world of the work, the appearances of various beautiful girl characters, and actual game screens drawn with pixel art.

entries.title: "Seventh period is ninja training!" A high school girl who wants to become a ninja, after school training is a secret time just for the two of them.

entries.title: A reversal fantasy in which the weakest explorer becomes the strongest swordsman, unrivaled with swordsmanship trained in another world.

entries.title: The smartphone version of "Battlefield Fuga" will be released this summer. Optimized for smartphone operation, making it easier to play anywhere. Trial play session held at Kansai Kemoket 11
entries.title_ja: スマホ版「戦場のフーガ」，今夏発売。スマホ操作に最適化され，どこでもより手軽に遊べる。関西けもケット11で体験試遊会を実施
entries.description: CyberConnect2 has announced that it will release a smartphone version of the dramatic simulation RPG ``Battlefield Fuga'' in the summer of 2026. The game is optimized for smartphone operation, making it easier to play anywhere. Furthermore, in addition to the in-game benefits of the DX version for other models, the first to third DLC will be included. A trial play session is scheduled to be held at "Kansai Kemoket 11".

entries.title: Competitive puzzle game "SHIKA-Q", PS/Switch version released. Official tournament “SHIKA-Q World Link Tournament” held at “EVO Japan 2026”
entries.title_ja: 対戦型パズルゲーム「SHIKA-Q」，PS/Switch版をリリース。「EVO Japan 2026」で公式大会「SHIKA-Q World Link Tournament」を開催
entries.description: Agni Flare released a new title ``SHIKA-Q'' today. This work is a competitive puzzle game using a 10x10 board. It supports offline and online two-player matches, and also features a single-player challenge mode. As a side event of "EVOJapan2026", an official tournament will be held at Tokyo Big Sight on May 3rd.

entries.title: "Faaast Penguin" implements a new mode "Penguin Climbers" for up to 4 players. New world “Italian Crunch Night Carnival” also added
entries.title_ja: 「Faaast Penguin」，最大4人協力の新モード「ペンギン・クライマーズ」を実装。新ワールド「イタリアクランチ Night Carnival」も追加
entries.description: Historia today implemented a new mode ``Penguin Climbers'' in the survival action race ``FaaastPenguin'' that the company is distributing. This mode is a mountain climbing game with up to four players. Climb the ice wall with an ice ax, pull up your friends with a fishing rod, and aim for the top of the mountain. Also, the new season of FaaastPenguin has started.

entries.title: A gyoza making battle with up to 4 people! “Make! Gyoza” released on April 16th for PC (Steam)/Switch
entries.title_ja: 最大4人で餃子作りバトル！ 「作って！餃子」，PC（Steam）/ Switch向けに4月16日リリース
entries.description: SAT-BOX announced today (April 9, 2026) that the new title "Make! Gyoza" will be released for PC (Steam)/Nintendo Switch on April 16th. This is the latest work in the ``Make!'' series of action party games that challenge you to make a variety of dishes.

entries.title: A special website for the latest "FFXIV" patch 7.5 "Road to the Other Side" has been released. Information on new job “Demon Beast Tamer” and new raid revealed
entries.title_ja: 「FFXIV」最新パッチ7.5「彼方に至る路」の特設サイトを公開。新ジョブ「魔獣使い」や新レイドの情報が明らかに
entries.description: Square Enix today opened a special website for the latest major update for the online RPG "Final Fantasy XIV", patch 7.5 "The Road to the Other Side". In the update scheduled for April 28th, the main quest ``The Road to the Other Side Part 1'' and the new job ``Magic Beast Tamer'' will be implemented.

entries.title: "Capture - Screenshot Organizer", a tool that allows you to easily manage tens of thousands of screenshots locally, scheduled to be released on April 22, 2026
entries.title_ja: 数万枚規模のスクリーンショットをローカルで楽々管理できるツール「Capture - Screenshot Organizer」，2026年4月22日配信予定
entries.description: "Capture-ScreenshotOrganizer" is a tool specialized for managing screenshots, and is scheduled to be distributed on Steam on April 22, 2026. This tool operates in a local environment and can analyze and classify a large number of images, as well as support automatic tagging and natural language search.

entries.title: What is the darkness hidden in a resort that is supposed to heal the mind and body? Open world psychological horror RPG "The Pines" announced. Announcement trailer released
entries.title_ja: 心身を癒すはずの保養地に隠された闇とは。オープンワールド心理ホラーRPG「The Pines」が発表に。アナウンストレイラーを公開
entries.description: On April 8, 2026, Studio Abattoir announced a new title under development, ``The Pines,'' and released an announcement trailer. This work is an open-world psychological horror RPG in which players interact with the creepy residents of ``The Pines,'' a resort where they can find peace and quiet, and uncover hidden truths.

entries.title: In Washagana TV's latest video, we introduce model guns and other items purchased at the "City Hunter Ogen Art Exhibition".
entries.title_ja: わしゃがなTVの最新動画では，「シティーハンター大原画展」で購入したモデルガンなどを紹介する様子をお届け
entries.description: Today (April 9, 2026), the latest video of the web program "Washagana TV" by Yuichi Nakamura and Mafia Kajita was released. This time, following on from the previous video, we will be introducing the goods of the "City Hunter Ogen Art Exhibition". Let's take a closer look at Saeba's favorite Colt Python .357 Magnum model gun.

entries.title: The PC version of ``INDUSTRIA 2'', a narrative FPS depicting a parallel world of East Berlin, will be released on Steam on April 16th. Several years after the previous work, Nora's battle begins again.
entries.title_ja: 平行世界の東ベルリンを描いたナラティブFPS「INDUSTRIA 2」，PC版を4月16日にSteamで発売。前作から数年後，ノラの戦いが再び始まる
entries.description: HeadupGames and BeepJapan today announced that the PC (Steam) version of the narrative FPS adventure game "INDUSTRIA2" will be released on April 16th. This is a sequel that takes place several years after the previous work, ``INDUSTRIA,'' and the story of the main character, ``Nora,'' who is trapped in a parallel world, is once again developed. A Japanese subtitled trailer is also being released along with the announcement.

entries.title: The eraser dropping battle finally transcends time and space. “Our Eraser Drop 4 Space-Time Battle” will be released on April 30th

entries.description: SAT-BOX announced today (April 9, 2026) that the cumulative number of downloads for the smartphone app "Eraser Drop" series has exceeded 10 million, and that the latest work "Our Eraser Drop 4 Time Space Battle" will be released for Nintendo Switch 2/Nintendo Switch on April 30.

entries.title: Korean food stall management sim "POJANGMACHA" released on Steam. Be in charge of shopping and hall staff and quickly complete various tasks.
entries.title_ja: 韓国屋台経営シム「POJANGMACHA」，Steamでリリース。買い物とホールスタッフを担当し，さまざまな仕事を素早くこなそう
entries.description: AnomalyGuys today released the PC game ``POJANGMACHA: Korean Food Stall Management Simulator'' on Steam. This work is a restaurant management simulation game that offers street food such as taiyaki and hot dogs. He is in charge of shopping and hall staff, and quickly handles tasks such as inviting people to the store, serving food, and cleaning up.

entries.title: Tamiya will release a commemorative model of the first RC car "Porsche 934" rebuilt with a special RR chassis around May 23rd. RC "1/10RC 1978 Ford Zakspeed Capri Turbo (TT02 chassis)" will also be released around May 30th.
entries.title_ja: タミヤ、RCカーの第1弾「ポルシェ934」をこだわりのRRシャーシで再構築した記念モデルを5月23日ごろ発売RC「1/10RC 1978 フォード ザクスピード カプリ ターボ (TT02シャーシ)」も5月30日ごろ発売
entries.description: Tamiya will release the RC car "1/10RC Porsche 934 (1976) 50th Anniversary" around May 23rd. The price is 63,800 yen. Additionally, the RC car "1/10RC 1978 Ford Zakspeed Capri Turbo (TT02 chassis)" will be released around May 30th. The price is 18,700 yen.

entries.title: “Twilight Town Prisoners” A supernatural survival story featuring unique characters whose talent for “strategy” awakens in a lawless area where death row inmates kill each other.
entries.title_ja: 「黄昏町プリズナーズ」死刑囚が殺し合う無法地帯で“策略”の才能が覚醒する、個性派キャラ勢揃いの異能サバイバル
entries.description: The story is set in Japan, where the death penalty has been abolished and serious criminals are now imprisoned in a town called Twilight Town. Murder and robbery were not considered crimes in Twilight Town, and death row inmates were forced to kill each other. The main character, Sendo Yuuma, is imprisoned in such a lawless area, despite being falsely accused of arson. While meeting people imprisoned in Twilight Town for various reasons, Yuma begins to discover his hidden abilities. "Twilight Town Prisoners" is currently being serialized in Magazine Pocket.

entries.title: After losing her best friend, she meets a girl on a summer day... One-shot "Utsusemi no Katakage"
entries.title_ja: 親友を亡くした後、とある夏の日に出会った少女は…読切「うつせみの片影」
entries.description: Kanata Hoshino's one-shot ``Utsusemi no Katakage'' was released on Shonen Jump+ today, April 8th.

entries.title: "BLACK TORCH" Color illustrations from Tsuyoshi Takakitoshi have arrived. Niro also has Ryota Suzuki's ring
entries.title_ja: 「BLACK TORCH」タカキツヨシからカラーイラストが到着　弐郎には鈴木崚汰のリングも
entries.description: The stage event for the TV anime "BLACK TORCH" based on the original work by Tsuyoshi Takakitori was held on March 28th at WHITE in "AnimeJapan 2026". The event was held at STAGE, and featured Ryota Suzuki who played Niro Agatsuma, Yoji Ueda who played Rakuji, Ayaka Senbongi who played Kazuka Kishimogami, Junya Enoki who played Reiji Kirihara, Junichi Suwabe who played Ryosuke Shiba, and Rena Ueda who played Mika Usami. Yoji Ueda also served as MC.

entries.title: “Shippo and Gyakurin” is a new series that depicts the co-habitation of adult beastmen and children who live quietly in human society.

A limited number of items will be sold by lottery.

entries.title: Reservations for the deformed figure “Hatsune Miku Series Fluffy Petite Deformed Figure New Semester” start from April 8th
entries.title_ja: デフォルメフィギュア「初音ミクシリーズ ふわぷち デフォルメフィギュア 新学期」を4月8日より予約開始
entries.description: Sega Fave has started accepting pre-orders for the figure ``Hatsune Miku Series Fluffy Petite Deformed Figure New Semester'' from the hobby brand ``S-FIRE'' on April 8th at 11am. Release is scheduled for November, and the price is 3,080 yen.

entries.title: Kaiyodo will start pre-orders for action figure “Revoltech Miyu” from “Buruaka” soon
entries.title_ja: 海洋堂、「ブルアカ」よりアクションフィギュア「リボルテック ミユ」近日予約開始
entries.description: Kaiyodo has announced that they will soon begin accepting pre-orders for the action figure "Revoltech Miyu."

entries.description: Lyrax is selling the resale version of the gas blowback gun "DESERT EAGLE .50AE JP edition CO2 ver. BK". The price is 30,800 yen.

entries.description: “K-ON! ” The “K-ON! CHILLfigg” box sale product, which allows you to complete the completed figures of Yui, Mio, Ritsu, Tsumugi, and Azusa in one box, is now available for pre-order at CharaAni.com! Until April 12th (Sun)! #K-ON

entries.title: “Ichiban Kuji Goddess of Victory: NIKKE CHAPTER7” full lineup released! A must-have for the figure award: Romantic Maid and Brady are in the lineup, and the last one award and double chance is “Soda Figure TOPfocus”!
