entries.title: Hasegawa will start shipping the plastic model "VF-1A Super Battroid Valkyrie" on April 8th. Hold the genius's favorite machine in your hands
entries.title_ja: ハセガワよりプラモデル「VF-1A スーパー バトロイド バルキリー」4月8日出荷開始。天才の愛機をその手に
entries.description: Hasegawa began shipping reproductions of the 1/72 scale plastic model "VF-1A Super Battroid Valkyrie" on April 8th. The price is 3,080 yen, and it is scheduled to be released around April 10th.

entries.title: Colorful and pop design is attractive! "Back to the Future" T-shirts are now on sale at Amazon's on-demand print service Merch on Demand!
entries.title_ja: カラフルでポップなデザインが魅力！『バック・トゥ・ザ・フューチャー』のTシャツががAmazonのオンデマンドプリントサービス Merch on Demandで販売中！
entries.description: "Back to the Future" apparel is now available on Amazon's on-demand print service Merch on Demand! Introducing a selection of T-shirts with colorful and pop illustrations! #BTTF

entries.title: [Interview] What will change in the first Borderlands 4 story pack, “Mad Ellie and the Abominable Vault”? We asked the development team
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］「ボーダーランズ4」のストーリーパック第1弾“マッド・エリーと忌まわしのヴォルト”で何が変化するのか。開発チームに聞いた
entries.description: The first story pack for the shooting RPG Borderlands 4, ``Mad Ellie and the Abominable Vault,'' was released on March 26, 2026. This time, we conducted an email interview with the development team of this game. I asked him why he chose Ellie as the main character, so please read it.

entries.title: The masterpiece Danmaku STG is making a “big comeback” with new elements. “New Testament: Angry Head Bee Great Resurrection”, Steam store page released
entries.title_ja: 名作弾幕STGが新要素を加えて“大復活”。「新約・怒首領蜂大復活」，Steamストアページを公開
entries.description: Today (April 8, 2026), Cave released the Steam store page for the new title ``New Testament: Angry Bee Great Resurrection''. This work is a refined version of the arcade vertical-scrolling shooting game ``The Great Resurrection of Angry Bees'' released by Cave in May 2008, with new stages, characters, and BGM added.

entries.title: "Starfield" PS5 version released today. Story DLC “Terran Armada” to fight against the invasion of robot troops and major update “Free Lane” are now available
entries.title_ja: 「Starfield」PS5版を本日発売。ロボット部隊の侵攻に立ち向かうストーリーDLC「Terran Armada」と，大型アップデート「フリーレーン」配信開始
entries.description: Bethesda Game Studios today released the PS5 version of the action RPG "Starfield". At the same time, distribution of the story DLC "TerranArmada" about fighting against an invasion of robot troops and the large free update "Free Lane" has also started for all platforms.

entries.title: Aim for the best restaurant in town and cook a variety of dishes. “KuloNiku: Bowl Up!” now available on Steam
entries.title_ja: 街一番のレストランを目指し，さまざまな料理を作ろう。「KuloNiku: Bowl Up!」，Steamで配信開始
entries.description: On April 7, 2026, RawFury released a new title "KuloNiku: BowlUp!" developed by Gambir Studio on Steam. This is a cooking simulation game set in the laid-back town of ``KuloNiku,'' in which a player takes a once-popular meatball restaurant inherited from his grandmother and returns it to the most popular restaurant in town.

entries.title: “NGS ver.2”, added important target subjugation mission “Revealed false champion [loser]”
entries.title_ja: 「NGS ver.2」，重要目標討伐任務「顕現せし偽りの覇者【敗者】」を追加
entries.description: [未翻訳]

entries.title: "Tale's Edge" depicts a dark fairy tale worldview, and all NPCs can be killed. The crowd may make a fuss, and the guards may beat you up.
entries.title_ja: おとぎ話の世界観をダークに描く「Tale's Edge」，すべてのNPCをキル可能に。群衆に騒がれ，衛兵に袋叩きにされることも
entries.description: R16Interactive has released the latest developer video diary for the action-adventure RPG "Tale's Edge", revealing that all NPCs can be killed. This work depicts the world of European fairy tales in a dark and realistic way, with the main character being a young hunter searching for her missing master. Early access will be available soon.

entries.title: A new model of SteelSeries' lightweight wireless mouse "Aerox 3 Wireless" is now available. Adopts new sensor & supports aim adjustment tool
entries.title_ja: SteelSeries製の軽量ワイヤレスマウス「Aerox 3 Wireless」に新モデルが登場。新型センサー採用＆エイム調整ツールに対応
entries.description: On April 8, 2026, SteelSeries announced that it will release the new wireless mouse "Aerox3WirelessGen2" for gamers on April 17th. In addition to strengthening the specifications of the existing product, including the on-board sensor, the highlight is that it is compatible with the aim adjustment tool provided in the proprietary software.

entries.title: “Console Archives Sexros”, distributed on April 9th. A side-scrolling STG released by Nichibutsu in 1986 for 8-bit home game consoles.
entries.title_ja: 「コンソールアーカイブス セクロス」，4月9日配信。1986年にニチブツが8ビット家庭用ゲーム機向けに発売した横スクロールSTG
entries.description: Hamster announced today that distribution of ``Console Archives Sex'' will begin on April 9, 2026. ``Secross'' is a side-scrolling STG released by Nichibutsu in 1986 for 8-bit home game consoles. The player rides a hovering bike and takes on a battle to save his captured comrades.

entries.title: MMORPG "CHAOS WORLD" based on "Chaos Heroes Online", service for Japan will start in the second quarter of 2026
entries.title_ja: 「カオス ヒーローズ オンライン」を原作とするMMORPG「CHAOS WORLD」，日本向けサービスを2026年第2四半期に開始
entries.description: G.O.P announced today that it will start service for Japan for its new title "CHAOSWORLD" in the second quarter of 2026. Pre-registration is being accepted on a special website. This work is an MMORPG based on the RTS ``Chaos Heroes Online''. The game is set in a world where balance has been lost, and unlimited PvP can take place outside the safe zone.

entries.title: ACA version of "Polaris", distributed on April 9th. A shooting game where you control a submarine and face attacks from all directions, including fighter planes, ships, and submarines.
entries.title_ja: アケアカ版「ポラリス」，4月9日配信。潜水艦を操作し，戦闘機や艦船，潜水艦など，全方位からの攻撃に立ち向かうシューティングゲーム
entries.description: Hamster announced today that distribution of the arcade archives version of ``Polaris'' will begin on April 9, 2026. Polaris is an STG released by Taito in 1980. Players control a submarine and fight against enemy forces using missiles that can only be fired directly overhead. Face off against attacks from all directions, including bombing from the air, frigates on the surface of the sea, and enemy submarines underwater.

entries.title: “Mongil: STAR DIVE” will be broadcast live just before its release from 20:00 on April 13th. Yurika Kubo, who plays Verna, and Hina Tachibana, who plays Daisy, will appear.
entries.title_ja: 「モンギル：STAR DIVE」，リリース直前生放送を4月13日20：00から配信。ベルナ役の久保ユリカさんやデイジー役の立花日菜さんが出演
entries.description: Netmarble today announced that it will broadcast a ``live broadcast just before the release'' of its new title ``Mongil: STARDIVE'' on YouTube and X from 20:00 on April 13, 2026. The program's performers include MC Shohei Taguchi, Yurika Kubo who plays the main character Verna, Hina Tachibana who plays Daisy, and influencers Yunocy and Shoko Asari.

entries.title: “Sonic Rumble Party” season 5 begins with stages and skins inspired by Alice in Wonderland

entries.title: Up to 65% off Atlus works such as "Shin Megami Tensei V Vengeance" and "Persona 3 Reload". SEGA's "April PICK UP Sale" will be held
entries.title_ja: 「真・女神転生V Vengeance」や「ペルソナ3 リロード」など，アトラス作品が最大65％オフ。セガの「4月PICK UPセール」が開催に
entries.description: Sega today launched the ``April PICKUP Sale'' targeting Atlus titles currently available on PS Store and Nintendo eShop. During the period, you can purchase various titles at up to 65% off, including ``Shin Megami Tensei VVengeance,'' the ``Persona'' series, and ``RAIDOURemastered: Chourikheidan Kitan.''

entries.title: The complete version of the popular principality management deck-building roguelite is now available on PS5 and Nintendo Switch. “Drop Duchy: Complete Edition”, released on April 21, 2026
entries.title_ja: 好評の公国運営デッキ構築ローグライトの完全版がPS5とNintendo Switchに登場。「Drop Duchy: Complete Edition」，2026年4月21日に発売
entries.description: TheArcadeCrew has announced that the complete version of the strategy game "DropDuchy" developed by SleepyMillStudio, "DropDuchy: Complete Edition," will be released for PS5 and Nintendo Switch on April 21, 2026. A trailer for the console version has also been released, including DLC.

entries.title: High-tempo action game “Super Alloy Crash” with retro style pixel art, early access starts on Steam
entries.title_ja: レトロ調ピクセルアートでハイテンポアクション「超アロイクラッシュ」，Steamで早期アクセス開始
entries.description: ``Super Alloy Crash,'' a side-scrolling action game drawn with retro-style pixel art, has started early access on Steam. This work features high-tempo battles that incorporate roguelike elements and chewy action.

Mirko and Katsuki Bakugou from "My Hero Academia" appear in the new experience figure series "Palette Masters" that transcends the walls of dimension. From Alice Grint, ``Vocaloid Elementary School Student ``Utaai Yuki'' Strong Wind All Back Ver. Completed Figure'' is now available. We also have an AmiAmi limited edition that comes with a "song logo acrylic stand" as an optional part. Below is the press release […]

Nijisanji's VTuber "Meruto Kuramochi" has been transformed into a three-dimensional figure in an energetic jumping pose. Scheduled to be released in May 2027. Below is an excerpt from the press release. Product Overview ■Nijisanji Kuramochi 1/7 scale finished figure □ […]

This time's topic is ``What kind of cherry blossom viewing do gamers gather for?'' 'It was. As a result of reviewing the answers received from everyone based on your evaluation and the "arbitrary judgment and bias" of the person in charge, the following were selected...

entries.description: “Tomorrow’s Nadya” is now available in Gashapon “Mejirushi Accessories”! There are 5 types of charms that recreate Nadya's clothes and belongings, such as a memorable music box and Nadya's diary! Scheduled to be released in the second week of April! #Tomorrow's Naja #Capsule Toy

entries.title: Access Accepted No. 857: The beginning of a new era of soccer games. FIFA and EA, their respective survival strategies
entries.title_ja: Access Accepted第857回：サッカーゲーム新時代の幕開け。FIFAとEA，それぞれの生存戦略
entries.description: As excitement builds for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, a new era for soccer games is also upon us. I would like to examine how EASportsFC's brand transformation maintained its economic success, the criticism of accelerating monetization behind that success, and the ``multi-licensing strategy'' that FIFA is pursuing after abandoning its monopoly.

entries.title: Can a marriage agency on the verge of bankruptcy be saved? ``L'Agence - The Hearts of Paris'' is an investigative visual novel in which you uncover the truth as a love detective, and the outcome is determined by love or profit.
entries.title_ja: 破綻寸前の結婚相談所を救えるか。恋愛探偵として真実を暴く調査型ビジュアルノベル「L'Agence - The Hearts of Paris」，愛か利益かが結末を左右
entries.description: ``L'Agence - The Hearts of Paris'' is an investigative visual novel adventure created by French indie development studio 1888Studio. This work is set in Paris in 1888, and the story revolves around the survival of a marriage agency and the struggle to resolve a client's love problems.

entries.title: Google announced a new product under the "Pixel" brand in Japan on April 7th. “Pixel 10a”?
entries.title_ja: Googleが「Pixel」ブランドの新製品を4月7日に国内発表。「Pixel 10a」か
entries.description: On April 6, 2026, Google announced that it would announce a new product under the "Pixel" brand in Japan on April 7. The specific product has not been disclosed. However, Google Store newsletter subscribers are being offered a discount coupon for the new smartphone ``Google Pixel 10a'', so this product will probably be released.

entries.title: As a charity project, "Treeplanter", a simulation that plants one tree in the real world for every tree sold, will be released on April 18, 2026
entries.title_ja: 慈善企画として，1本売れるごとに現実世界に1本の木を植えるシミュレーション「Treeplanter」，2026年4月18日に発売決定
entries.description: It has been revealed that the simulation game ``Treeplanter'', which is being developed under the leadership of the European Social Fund, will be released on April 18, 2026. This title is attracting attention for its efforts to plant trees in the real world in conjunction with sales. A trial version is currently available.

entries.title: A gal descends on Rokubungai with “Zenless Zone Zero” Ver.2.7!　Play report of the super cool update created by Shishia [PR]
entries.title_ja: 「ゼンレスゾーンゼロ」Ver.2.7で六分街にギャル降臨！　シーシィアがかき回す爆イケなアプデのプレイレポ【PR】
entries.description: Ver.2.7 has been implemented in HoYoverse's "Zenless Zone Zero". In the season 2 outro ``Sunset of the New Erie Capital (Part 1)'', the gal investigator Shishia goes on a rampage. We will introduce the highlights, including Nangong Yu's new costume and new mysteries in the story.

entries.title: Game Shop Shayo, a management SLG that lets you experience the changes in the game industry over the past 25 years, will be released on April 22nd
entries.title_ja: 約25年間のゲーム業界の変遷を体験する経営SLG「ゲームショップ斜陽」，4月22日にリリース決定
entries.description: Rob Studio announced on April 4, 2026 that the new title "Game Shop Shayo", which is currently under development, will be released on Steam on April 22. This work is a management simulation game that allows you to relive the changes in the game industry over a period of about 25 years from 1985 to 2010 from the perspective of managing a game shop.

entries.title: "PowerPro App" x anime "Ace of Diamond actII-Second Season-" collaboration has started. Seido High School, Teito High School, and Ukumori High School will participate as enemy teams.
entries.title_ja: 「パワプロアプリ」×アニメ「ダイヤのA actII-Second Season-」コラボを開始。青道高校，帝東高校，鵜久森高校が敵チームとして参戦
entries.description: KONAMI today began a collaboration with the anime ``Diamond AactII-SecondSeason-'' on ``Jikkyou Powerful Pro Baseball.'' Teito High School's ``Mukai Taiyo'' and Ukumori High School's ``Seiichi Umemiya'' will appear in the gacha, and three schools, including Seido High School, will participate in the ``Spring Festival Koshien'' as enemy teams.

entries.title: Torara's Mahjong Classroom, an experiential learning game where you can learn the rules of mahjong from scratch with cute characters, now available on Steam
entries.title_ja: かわいいキャラクターと一緒に麻雀のルールをいちから丁寧に学べる体験型学習ゲーム「とららの麻雀教室」，Steamで配信開始
entries.description: Torara Theater today began distributing the PC software ``Torara's Mahjong Classroom'' on Steam. This work is an experiential learning game where you can learn the rules of mahjong from scratch with the character ``Torara.'' The rules of mahjong are broken down as much as possible, allowing players to learn each one carefully at their own pace.

entries.title: Washagana TV's latest video shows the introduction of goods from the "City Hunter Ogen Art Exhibition"
entries.title_ja: わしゃがなTVの最新動画では，「シティーハンター大原画展」のグッズを紹介する様子をお届け
entries.description: Today (April 6, 2026), the latest video of the web program "Washagana TV" by Yuichi Nakamura and Mafia Kajita was released. This time, we'll be showing you Mafia Kajita introducing the goods he bought for adults at the City Hunter Ogen Art Exhibition. There will be a variety of items ranging from valuable items such as duplicate manuscripts to unique goods.

entries.title: Aim for the top of the mountain by operating a car connected with a rope. 4-player cooperative driving game “Dangerous Mountain Together” now available on Steam
entries.title_ja: ロープでつながれた車を操作して山頂を目指す。4人協力ドライビングゲーム「Dangerous Mountain Together」，Steamで配信開始
entries.description: SlugShotGames released a new title "DangerousMountainTogether" on Steam on April 4, 2026. The price is 580 yen (tax included), and a 15% off sale is being held until April 11th. This is a physics-based driving game in which up to four players drive a car through dangerous mountain roads.

entries.title: "Fire Emblem Heroes", Edelgard and Ingrid appear as children. Details of the summoning event starting on April 7th revealed
entries.title_ja: 「ファイアーエムブレム ヒーローズ」，エーデルガルトやイングリットが幼少期の姿で登場。4月7日にスタートする召喚イベントの詳細が明らかに
entries.description: Nintendo announced today (April 6, 2026) that it will hold a super hero summoning event ``Let's Go on a Great Adventure Together'' on the smartphone app ``Fire Emblem Heroes'' from 16:00 on April 7th to 15:59 on May 7th. This time, Edelgard, Ingrid, and others appear in their childhood forms.

entries.title: ``Collapsed City,'' a maritime city construction sim set in a submerged apocalyptic world, released on Steam. Stack materials while maintaining balance to avoid collapse.
entries.title_ja: 水没した終末世界が舞台の海上都市建設シム「崩壊都市」，Steamでリリース。崩れないようにバランスを保ちつつ，資材を積み上げよう
entries.description: tinyBuild today released the PC game "Collapse City" developed by AllPartsConnected on Steam. This work is a maritime city construction simulation game set in a post-apocalyptic world where the ground is submerged in water, with the goal of building humanity's last stronghold. 3D physics calculations are used, and if materials are piled up unnecessarily, the building will collapse.

entries.title: "Jantama" x "Sword Art Online" collaboration tournament will be held from April 10th. Pass the qualifying rounds and challenge the professional mahjong player known as the “boss” waiting at the very end.

entries.title: [Interview] MIXI's overseas support was designed based on voices from the indie game field. “The first step towards the world” supported by “LVLZero Tokyo”

entries.description: MIXIGlobal Investments' indie game overseas expansion support program ``LVL Zero Tokyo'' is said to have been designed to reflect the voices of the indie game industry. So, what is this “voice from the field”? We spoke to Tomoharu Urabe, who launched this program, and members of MIXI's "Indie Game Development Department" about the history of its establishment.

entries.title: Yui's Hoe Hoe Game Speech: 262nd "Overwatch, Paranoma Site... Talk about the games I've been playing recently"

entries.description: Pay attention to the embroidery! From ``That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime'', 2 colors of ``Rimuru-sama one-point embroidery polo shirts'' that go well with a wide range of styling, and 2 colors of tough and comfortable ``one-point embroidery T-shirts'' are now available for pre-order at CharaAni.com! #tensura #tensura

entries.description: Introducing "NL-02 Menasor G2 Color Ver." from Takara Tomy "Transformers New Legends"! #transformers

entries.description: Official T-shirts from Bandai Namco's popular series such as "Ace Combat," "Tales of," and "Taiko no Tatsujin" are available at a bargain price at the "Amazon New Life Sale Final" advance sale! #Amazon Sale #ACECOMBAT

entries.title: Cybertron warrior Arcee now appears in MPG in the coloring of the "phantom prototype version" that was not yet released at the time!
entries.title_ja: サイバトロン戦士アーシーが、当時未発売となった“幻のプロトタイプ版”のカラーリングとなってMPGで登場！
entries.description: Focus on Takara Tomy's Transformers "MPG-23 Secret Agent Arcee"! #transformers

entries.title: Pre-orders have started for the portable game console “EVERCADE NEXUS” where you can enjoy retro and indie games with official licenses.
entries.title_ja: レトロゲームやインディーゲームを公式ライセンスで楽しめる携帯ゲーム機「EVERCADE NEXUS」，予約受付がスタート
entries.description: Reservations for the new portable game console "EVERCADENEXUS" are being accepted starting April 1, 2026. Plays all EVERCADE cartridges and works with over 700 officially licensed retro and indie games. It also has features such as vertical screen mode and ``EVERSYNC'', which allows multiplayer with just one software.

entries.title: Did you get hooked on deck-building roguelikes with “Threspa”? Then it's time to play "Monster Train 2"! [After School Reviews! ]
entries.title_ja: 「スレスパ」でデッキ構築ローグライクにハマった？　ならば今こそ「Monster Train 2」で遊ぶのじゃ！【放課後れびゅあーず！】
entries.description: An unprecedented deck-building roguelike boom has arrived! Or rather, is "SlaytheSpire2" too popular? As if to tell you to ride this big wave, "MonsterTrain2" was introduced on "After School Reviews!". This game, which incorporates elements of tower defense, seems like it's easy to overdo it when the deck is spinning...?

entries.title: "Xbox FanFest" celebrates the 25th anniversary of the Xbox series, and a "world tour" will be held in countries including Japan. Participation methods and specific details will be announced later.
entries.title_ja: Xboxシリーズの25周年を祝う「Xbox FanFest」，日本を含む各国での“ワールドツアー”を開催。参加方法や具体的な内容は追って発表予定
entries.description: Microsoft announced today (April 2, 2026) that it will hold a world tour of the Xbox FanFest, a fan event to commemorate the 25th anniversary of the Xbox series developed by the company, in countries including Japan. The world tour that will be held in each country will be carried out in accordance with the characteristics of the local Xbox community and region.

entries.title: Kairosoft's "Adventure Dungeon Village 2", "Opening Department Store Diary 2", etc. are 495 yen! “Sale of three-colored dango while viewing cherry blossoms for Switch” has started
entries.title_ja: カイロソフトの「冒険ダンジョン村2」「開店デパート日記2」などが495円！「お花見しながら三色だんごをもぐもぐセール for Switch」がスタート
entries.description: Kairosoft today (April 2, 2026) launched the ``Cherry Blossom Viewing and Mumbling Three-Colored Dango Sale for Switch'' for downloadable titles currently on sale at the Nintendo eShop. Many popular works such as ``Opening Department Store Diary 2'' and ``Yukemuri Onsenkyo'' are available at great deals.

entries.title: "MTG" will hold a mystery-solving event in Tokyo on April 23rd to commemorate the release of the latest set "Secrets of Strixhaven." Recruiting participants
entries.title_ja: 「MTG」，最新セット「ストリクスヘイヴンの秘密」の発売を記念した謎解きイベントを4月23日に東京都内で開催。参加者を募集中
entries.description: Wizards of the Coast announced today (April 2, 2026) that TREASURECOLLECTION ``Magic: The Gathering ``Secrets of Strixhaven'' Mystery Solving Event - Collect Lost Grimoires'' will be held in Tokyo on April 23. This is a one-day mystery-solving event, and applications are being accepted until April 8th.

entries.title: Metroidvania “Solateria” for parry lovers (Hobonichi Indie Pick Up!)
entries.title_ja: パリィ好きのためのメトロイドヴァニア「ソラテリア」（ほぼ日 インディーPick Up！）
entries.description: Today's "Hobonichi Indie PickUp!" introduces the Metroidvania "Solateria" where you can enjoy exhilarating parry-centered battles. If you deflect an enemy's attack at the right time, a slow motion will occur, and by inputting additional input, you can unleash a powerful counterattack. In a world ravaged by a shadow plague, a small fire warrior embarks on a journey to find the missing king.

entries.title: A collaboration event between "Techronos" and Cure Maid Cafe will be held in Akihabara, Tokyo from April 10th. Providing collaborative food, sweets, and drinks
entries.title_ja: 「テクロノス」×キュアメイドカフェのコラボイベントを4月10日から東京・秋葉原で開催。コラボフードやスイーツ，ドリンクを提供
entries.description: Tablier Marketing announced today that the collaboration event ``Cafe Cross Dreamia'' between ``Techronos'' and Cure Maid Cafe will be held from April 10th to 26th. During the event, food, sweets, and drinks inspired by characters from ``Shinki PROJECT'', ``Ayakashi Rumble!'', and ``Rejekuro!'' will be provided.

entries.title: No aliens or monsters. Realistic space station survival “Beyond The Cupola: ISS Simulator” to be released in the third quarter of 2026
entries.title_ja: エイリアンもモンスターもナシ。リアル志向の宇宙ステーションサバイバル「Beyond The Cupola: ISS Simulator」が2026年第3四半期発売へ
entries.description: Zhurbyte will release a new PC title ``BeyondTheCupola:ISSSimulator'' on Steam in the third quarter of 2026. This work is a cooperative survival simulation game set on the International Space Station (ISS). The player becomes a crew member of the ISS and aims to survive in a world without gravity.

entries.title: Collaborate with up to 25 people to explore and rebuild a contaminated environment. “Clean Up Earth” released today
entries.title_ja: 最大25人で協力して汚染された環境を探索し，環境を再建させよう。「Clean Up Earth」，本日リリース
entries.description: MagicPockets released a new title "CleanUpEarth" today (April 2, 2026). This work is a cooperative simulation game in which players use a waste-sucking machine called ``Terra Cleaner'' to suck up waste, recycle resources, and rebuild the ecosystem.

entries.title: [Play Report] The DLC ``Sega Villains Stage'' for ``SHINOBI: Slash of Revenge'' features the strongest ninja and Sega's famous villains together. Actions and battles have further evolved.
entries.title_ja: ［プレイレポ］「SHINOBI 復讐の斬撃」のDLC「セガ ヴィランズ ステージ」は，最強の忍者とセガの名悪役が共演。アクションとバトルは，さらなる進化を遂げていた
entries.description: Sega will release the DLC ``Sega Villains Stage'' for the 2D action game ``SHINOBI Revenge Slash'' today (April 3, 2026). In the DLC, you can enjoy battles with famous SEGA villains such as Goro Majima from the ``Ryu ga Gotoku'' series, Death Adder from the ``Golden Ax'' series, and Dr. Eggman from the ``Sonic'' series.

entries.title: "Puyo Puyo eSports", 5th grade elementary school student Yuuki will be the representative athlete for the 20th Asian Games
entries.title_ja: 「ぷよぷよeスポーツ」，第20回アジア競技大会の代表選手は小学5年生のゆうき選手に
entries.description: [未翻訳]

entries.title: The official book "GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE- Official Setting Materials Collection" is released today. 320 pages packed with information, mainly on characters up to season 4
entries.title_ja: 公式書籍「GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE-　公式設定資料集」が本日発売。シーズン4までのキャラクターを中心に，320ページにわたって情報がぎっしり
entries.description: KADOKAWAGameLinkage today (April 2, 2026) released the official book ``GUILTYGEAR-STRIVE-Official Setting Materials'' for the fighting game ``GUILTYGEAR-STRIVE-'' produced by Arc System Works. ebten sells the ``ebtenDX pack'' which includes various goods.

entries.title: "Super Battle Golf" first major update will be released on April 10th, adding 9 new holes with snowy scenery, wind elements, etc.
entries.title_ja: 「Super Battle Golf」，雪景色の9つの新ホールや風の要素などを追加する初の大型アップデートを4月10日に配信
entries.description: OroInteractive announced today (April 3, 2026) that the first major update to the online multiplayer golf game "SuperBattleGolf", "Snow and Ice Green", will be implemented on April 10th. This time, nine new holes with snowy scenery and wind elements that affect shots will be added. Additionally, a 30% off sale will be held for two weeks starting today.

entries.title: In the latest video of Washagana TV, we will introduce the Ichiban Kuji products and action figures of "GQuuuuuuX"
entries.title_ja: わしゃがなTVの最新動画では，「GQuuuuuuX（ジークアクス）」の一番くじ商品やアクションフィギュアを紹介する様子をお届け
entries.description: Today (April 2, 2026), the latest video of the web program "Washagana TV" by Yuichi Nakamura and Mafia Kajita was released. This time, we will be introducing the Ichiban Kuji and action figures of "Mobile Suit GundamGQuuuuuuX (Sieg Ax)". We are unboxing Ichiban Kuji products that were sold at the end of last year.

entries.title: “Fishbowl” released today. A heartwarming adventure game in which a woman, burdened with adult responsibilities and past scars, steps into the future with a magical fish.
entries.title_ja: 「Fishbowl」本日配信。大人としての責任や過去の傷を抱える女性が，魔法の魚とともに未来へと歩み出す，心温まるアドベンチャーゲーム
entries.description: WholesomeGamesPresents started distributing "Fishbowl" today. This is an ADV game that depicts the growth story of Aro, a woman who moves to a new city after her grandmother's death. She works as a video editor from home and lives her life worrying about her responsibilities and past wounds. A heartwarming story unfolds in which a magical talking fish unravels the past and moves towards a new future.

entries.title: A novelty fair has started to commemorate the release of Volume 16 of “The Great Sins of Kujo” and the start of live-action drama distribution.
entries.title_ja: 「九条の大罪」16巻発売＆実写ドラマ配信開始を記念したノベルティフェアがスタート
entries.description: Volume 16 of Shohei Manabe's ``The Great Sins of Kujo'' is released today, April 2nd. Distribution of the Netflix series ``The Great Sins of Kujo'' has also started. To commemorate this, novelty fairs will begin at bookstores nationwide starting today.

entries.title: “Honey Lemon Soda” ends 10 years of serialization! Supplement for 2 consecutive months from Ribon released in May
entries.title_ja: 「ハニーレモンソーダ」10年の連載に幕！5月発売のりぼんから2カ月連続付録
entries.description: Mayu Murata's ``Honey Lemon Soda'' will reach its final episode in the May issue of Ribon (Shueisha), which will be released tomorrow, April 3rd.

entries.title: "Chiikawa" Muchauma pudding becomes country ma'am, and home pie with Chiikawa branding is also available
entries.title_ja: 「ちいかわ」むちゃうまプリンがカントリーマアムに、ちいかわ焼き印入りホームパイも
entries.description: Fujiya collaborates with the anime "Chiikawa" based on Nagano's original work. Products inspired by the world of Chikawa will be sold at supermarkets, convenience stores, and Fujiya confectionery stores nationwide from April 7th.

entries.title: "Chicken Fighter" Keiji and "Hana no Keiji" Maeda Keiji co-star, collaboration fair held
entries.title_ja: 「ニワトリ・ファイター」ケイジと「花の慶次」前田慶次が共演、コラボフェア開催
entries.description: A collaboration fair is being held between Shu Sakuratani's ``Chicken Fighter'' and Tetsuo Hara's ``Hana no Keiji - Beyond the Clouds'', based on the original story by Keiichiro Ryu and screenplay by Mio Aso.

entries.title: His partner is a left-handed catcher. A new series about a talented pitcher who has had the misfortune to make a comeback from an independent league.
entries.title_ja: 相棒は左利きのキャッチャー　不遇の実力派ピッチャーが独立リーグから再起する新連載
entries.description: Yuichiro Oka's new series ``We would like to inform you of a change of players,'' based on the original work by Shoya Tsunamoto, who wrote ``Mr. CB,'' ``ATLANTA 1996,'' and ``GIANT KILLING,'' began today in Weekly Shonen Champion No. 18 (Akita Shoten), released on April 2nd.

entries.title: “That genius is obsessed with his fake girlfriend” A visual of Daiki Konno, who plays Iku, and Shiho Kato, who plays Rin, cuddling together.
entries.title_ja: 「その天才様は偽装彼女に執着する」郁役の今野大輝＆凛役の加藤史帆が寄り添うビジュアル
entries.description: The key visual for the TV drama ``The Genius-sama is obsessed with a fake girlfriend'' based on the original work by Chikafuji and Inu Murayama has been released.

entries.title: “The Angel Next Door” new project/Princess Project announced, advance cut of episode 1 also released
entries.title_ja: 「お隣の天使様」新プロジェクト・Princess Project発表、第1話先行カットも公開
entries.description: The new project, Princess Project, for the TV anime ``The Angel Next Door Turned Me into a No-Good Person 2'' will start tomorrow, April 3rd at 7pm. A visual for the project has been released.

entries.title: “TIGER & BUNNY” stage version! Performed in Tokyo in September and Hyogo in October, marking the 15th anniversary.
entries.title_ja: 「TIGER & BUNNY」舞台化！9月に東京、10月に兵庫で上演　15周年の節目に
entries.description: It has been decided that the anime "TIGER & BUNNY" will be adapted into a stage play. It will be performed in Tokyo in September and Hyogo in October.

entries.title: A program in which Naoki Yoshida explores the “value of voice” with voice actors starts on Radio Osaka, the first guest is Yuki Kaji
entries.title_ja: 吉田尚記が“声の価値”を声優と探る番組がラジオ大阪でスタート、初回ゲストは梶裕貴
entries.description: Radio Osaka's new program ``Koetowa'', with Naoki Yoshida as MC, will start tomorrow, April 3rd. Yuki Kaji will appear as the first guest.

entries.title: "VIRTUAL LIVE ARENA", a platform where you can experience VTuber's live content in XR space Momo Kurumizawa 3D live broadcast
entries.title_ja: VTuberのライブコンテンツをXR空間で体験できるプラットフォーム「VIRTUAL LIVE ARENA」 胡桃澤もも3Dライブを配信
entries.description:
THRUSTER Co., Ltd. has launched a service that allows you to experience VTuber's live content in an XR space on the VR live platform "VIRTUAL LIVE ARENA (VLA)" jointly developed with Shogakukan Co., Ltd. First edition […]
The post ``VIRTUAL LIVE ARENA'', a platform where you can experience VTuber's live content in XR space Momo Kurumizawa 3D live broadcast appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: The store homepage has been completely redesigned with the latest Steam beta! Show more content and information
entries.title_ja: Steam最新ベータでストアのホームページが一新！ より多くのコンテンツや情報を表示
entries.description: By displaying the game's art in high resolution, it seems to be visually clearer.

entries.title: The second installment of the Ichiban Kuji in the “Gintama” 20th Anniversary Exhibition is hot! Gintoki, Kamui, and 5 others are made into three-dimensional figures with new key visuals drawn by Mr. Sorachi.
entries.title_ja: 「銀魂」20周年記念展の一番くじ第2弾が熱い！銀時、神威ら5人が空知先生描きおろしキービジュアルで立体化
entries.description: “Ichiban Kuji Gintama 20th Anniversary Gintama Exhibition ~ Hatachi no Gathering ~ Part 2” will be on sale from August 21st!

entries.title: Penny Parker's voice actor for the fighting game ``MARVEL Tōkon'' continues from the movie ``Into the Spider-Verse''! New Japanese dubbed video released
entries.title_ja: 格ゲー『MARVEL Tōkon』のペニー・パーカー、声優は映画「スパイダーバース」から続投！日本語吹き替え映像が新たに公開
entries.description: Penny Parker joins MARVEL Tōkon!

entries.description: The "2XKO" event "2XKO Best Duo Trials" will be held on April 5th. Fighting gamers and streamers form a duo and aim for the top.

entries.description: Mega Star Me is unstoppable. Is this an overseas April Fool's joke?

entries.title: Time = life x money x experience points. CBT play report for “Time Takers”, a new type of TPS battlerois shooter with fun battles that compete for “time”
entries.title_ja: 時間＝命×お金×経験値。「時間」を奪い合う、戦闘楽しい新感覚TPSバトロワシューター『Time Takers』CBTプレイレポ

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS is planning to release prize stuffed animals ``School Idolmaster Chibigurumi ~Joyful Marching~ vol.1'' on April 14th and ``School Idolmaster Chibigurumi ~Joyful Marching~ vol.2'' on April 16th.

entries.description: LEGO Japan will release seven soccer-themed products from the LEGO Edition series.

entries.title: [Interview] Interview with “WWE Superstar” ASUKA about the appeal of “WWE 2K26.” Looking back on his 10 years in WWE
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］“WWEスーパースター”ASUKA選手に聞く，「WWE 2K26」の魅力。WWEにおける自身の10年の振り返りも
entries.description: ``WWE2K26'' is a professional wrestling action game released by 2K. We present an interview with ASUKA, who appears in this work and has been a leader in WWE's women's division as a Japanese superstar. We asked the player, who is also a hardcore gamer, to talk about the amazing reproducibility and appeal of this work, as well as his 10-year journey with WWE.

entries.title: The original version of "Resident Evil" 1-3 is now available on Steam. Now you can easily play the three original horror classics on your PC
entries.title_ja: オリジナル版「バイオハザード」1〜3がSteamで配信開始。名作ホラーの原点となる3作をPCで手軽に遊べるように
entries.description: Capcom today (April 2, 2026) released the survival horror games ``BIOHAZARD (1996),'' ``BIOHAZARD 2 (1998),'' and ``BIOHAZARD 3 LASTESCAPE (1999)'' on Steam. It is the third title in the "Resident Evil" series from the first, and is currently on sale for 50% off.

entries.title: "Darwin's Paradox!", an action ADV starring an octopus, released today. Use the unique abilities of an octopus to overcome the gimmicks of each stage.
entries.title_ja: タコが主人公のアクションADV「Darwin's Paradox!」，本日リリース。タコならではの能力を生かし，ステージごとのギミックを突破しよう
entries.description: KONAMI today released "Darwin's Paradox!" developed by ZDTStudio. This is an action-adventure game where you control an octopus named Darwin who was kidnapped by a UFO and fights against an alien conspiracy. Utilize the unique abilities of an octopus, such as mimicry, blindness, and movement using suction cups, to overcome the gimmicks of each stage.

entries.title: New Metroidvania ``Annalog'' for NES, now available for fans. Recommended for fans of ``Metroid,'' ``The Legend of Zelda,'' and programming logic puzzles.
entries.title_ja: NES用新作メトロイドヴァニア「Annalog」，クラファンを実施中。「メトロイド」「ゼルダの伝説」やプログラミング系論理パズル好きにオススメ
entries.description: The new Metroidvania ``Annalog'' for the NES (Overseas Famicom) is currently undergoing crowdfunding on Kickstarter. The player takes on the role of a young girl who explores a post-apocalyptic monochrome world while creating a path by actually programming machines such as bulkheads and lifts that can be found in various places by combining commands and parameters.

entries.title: Pre-registration begins today for the new work “Dragon Blood: Slayers Academy” based on the popular novel “Ryuzoku” with over 30 million copies in circulation.
entries.title_ja: 発行部数3000万部を超える人気小説「龍族」を原作とする新作「ドラゴンブラッド：スレイヤーズ学院」，本日より事前登録受付を開始
entries.description: ARCHOSAURGAMES today (April 2, 2026) began accepting pre-registrations for the new title "Dragon Blood: Slayers Academy." The story is based on the popular novel ``Ryuzoku,'' which has sold over 30 million copies, and depicts the fate that flows between humans and dragons.

entries.title: "'Aikatsu! Series' Orchestra Concert 'Okekatsu!' 2026 -Anniversary Baton-", bonus CD contents and performance songs have been additionally released. General ticket sales start on April 4th
entries.title_ja: 「『アイカツ！シリーズ』オーケストラコンサート『オケカツ！』2026 -Anniversary Baton-」，特典CDの収録内容と演奏曲を追加公開。チケット一般発売は4月4日スタート
entries.description: Aetas, BANDAI NAMCO Pictures, and BANDAI NAMCO Music Live have released additional information on the bonus CD and songs scheduled to be performed for the "Aikatsu! Series" Orchestra Concert "Okekatsu!" 2026-Anniversary Baton-, which will be held on May 4, 2026. Advance tickets will go on sale from 10:00 on April 4th.

entries.title: Switch2/Switch version of “Maoujou Monogatari” will start distribution on April 9th. A dungeon management sim where you raise monsters and set traps to intercept invading adventurers.
entries.title_ja: Switch2/Switch版「魔王城ものがたり」，4月9日配信開始。モンスターを育成し，罠を配置して侵入してくる冒険者たちを迎え撃つダンジョン経営シム
entries.description: Kairosoft has announced that distribution of the Switch 2/Switch version of ``Maoujo Monogatari'' will begin on April 9, 2026. The player becomes the lord of an abandoned castle in the frontier, welcomes unique monsters, and fights off invading adventurers. In addition to expanding the display range and improving graphics, the Switch 2 version supports 4K resolution and mouse operation.

entries.title: A premium preview screening of the Japanese version of the movie ``The Super Mario Galaxy Movie'' will be held on April 21st. Recruiting participants
entries.title_ja: 映画「ザ・スーパーマリオギャラクシー・ムービー」，日本語版をいち早く見られるプレミアム試写会を4月21日に開催。参加者を募集中
entries.description: Toho Towa announced today (April 2, 2026) that it will hold a "Japanese version premium preview" at a certain location in Tokyo on the evening of April 21 to commemorate the release of the movie "The Super Mario Galaxy Movie," and has also started accepting applications for participation. In addition, scene photos have been released that allow you to see characters such as Mario, Yoshi, and Bowser.

entries.title: [Play Report] An exhilarating combo battle created by stylish movements and a variety of builds. What we learned from the playtest of the new side-scrolling action game “SlashZero”
entries.title_ja: ［プレイレポ］スタイリッシュな動きと多彩なビルドが生む爽快コンボバトル。新作横スクロールアクション「SlashZero」プレイテストで見えてきたこと
entries.description: Playtesting for Streetlamp Studio's new title ``SlashZero'' began on March 27, 2026. Featuring a cyberpunk worldview and anime-style graphics, this is an ambitious work that combines fast-paced combat and roguelike elements. In this article, we will introduce its appeal based on about 5 hours of play.

entries.title: "Atomic Heart: Ultimate Edition" containing all DLC, PS5 package version will be released on June 25th. An action RPG set in the fictional Soviet Union.
entries.title_ja: 全DLCを収録した「Atomic Heart: Ultimate Edition」，PS5パッケージ版を6月25日に発売。架空のソ連を舞台にしたアクションRPG
entries.description: 4Divinity and BeepJapan today announced that the PS5 packaged version of "AtomicHeart: Ultimate Edition" will be released on June 25th, and has started accepting reservations. ``AtomicHeart'' is a single-player action RPG set in the ``Soviet Union,'' which has a history different from reality. This is a complete version that includes all DLC in the main game.

entries.title: CS Satellite Theater will broadcast 16 works including ``Shadow Skill'' in April. “Rewind the VHS! Our OVA special feature” features battle and fantasy works
entries.title_ja: CS衛星劇場，「影技 SHADOW SKILL」など16作品を4月に放送。「VHSを巻き戻せ！俺たちのOVA特集」でバトル＆ファンタジー作品を特集
entries.description: CS Satellite Theater is currently broadcasting an OVA titled ``Rewind the VHS! Our OVA Special''. April 2026 features "Battle & Fantasy" works that make you feel the overwhelming heat and momentum of 90's OVAs. ``Kagegi SHADOWSKILL'', which is based on Mei Okada's manga, will air the first and second OVA seasons, as well as an extra edition, on April 11th.

entries.title: "LEGACYSOUL Microman Acroyear 2 3-piece set" will be available for pre-order at Takara Tomy Mall on April 3rd
entries.title_ja: 「LEGACYSOUL ミクロマン アクロイヤー2 3体セット」がタカラトミーモールにて4月3日に予約開始
entries.description: Takara Tomy's hobby label "T-SPARK" for the high target audience will start accepting reservations for the figure "LEGACYSOUL Microman Acroyear 2 3-piece set" on April 3rd at the mail order site "Takara Tomy Mall". Release month and price are undecided.

entries.title: The Delorean-type time machine from "Back to the Future" and Marty's coveted Toyota pickup (Hilux) are now available at "Hot Wheels" as a set! Now accepting pre-orders on Amazon!
entries.title_ja: 『バック・トゥ・ザ・フューチャー』のデロリアン型タイムマシンとマーティ憧れのトヨタ ピックアップ（ハイラックス）がセットで「ホットウィール」に登場！Amazonで予約受付中！
entries.description: From the minicar "Hot Wheels" comes a pack that includes the DeLorean-type time machine from "Back to the Future" and Marty's coveted Toyota pickup (Hilux)! #Back to the Future #Hot Wheels

entries.title: Antique gold full of luxury! To commemorate the 40th anniversary of "Dragon Quest", the "Metallic Monsters Gallery" figures featuring colored dragon kings, dragons, and Roto equipment are now available for pre-order on Amazon!
entries.title_ja: 高級感あふれるアンティークゴールド！『ドラクエ』40周年を記念したカラーの竜王、ドラゴンやロト装備のフィギュア「メタリックモンスターズギャラリー」がAmazonで予約受付中！
entries.description: "Dragon Quest" figure with beautiful antique gold color! "Metallic Monsters Gallery" such as Ryuo, Loto's Sword & Loto's Shield is now available in the 40th anniversary version! Now accepting pre-orders on Amazon! #Dragon Quest #DQ

entries.title: 11 types including flute and trumpet! Capsule toy “Kira Plated Musical Instrument #21 ~School Enrollment Version~” Released on April 7th Comes with a case to store the instrument
entries.title_ja: フルートやトランペットなど全11種！ カプセルトイ「キラメッキ楽器＃21　～入学バージョン～」4月7日発売楽器しまえるケース付き
entries.description: Tarin International will release the capsule toy ``Kira Plated Musical Instrument #21 ~School Enrollment Version~'' starting April 7th. The price is 300 yen per time.

entries.title: To commemorate the 20th anniversary of the anime "The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya", "Haruhi Suzumiya" has been made into a 1/7 scale figure in her familiar uniform! With the KADOKAWA special set, you can also create a ponytail look.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「涼宮ハルヒの憂鬱」20周年を記念して「涼宮ハルヒ」がおなじみの制服姿で1/7スケールフィギュア化！KADOKAWAスペシャルセットではポニーテール姿も表現可能
entries.description: KADOKAWA will release the figure "Haruhi Suzumiya Anime 20th Anniversary Version" in February 2027. The reservation period is until July 8th. The price is 22,990 yen for the regular version and 25,740 yen for the KADOKAWA special set.

entries.title: Saki Hanami, Temari Tsukimura, and Kotone Fujita from “Gakuen Idolmaster” are three-dimensional in the “FigUnity” series
entries.title_ja: 「学園アイドルマスター」より花海咲季、月村手毬、藤田ことねが「FigUnity」シリーズで立体化
entries.description: Megahouse will release the deformed figure ``FigUnity Gakuen Idolmaster'' in late December. The price is 12,980 yen.

entries.title: "Soul EFFECT Series IMPACT Gray Ver. for S.H.Figuarts", which can express the moment when an impact is applied to the ground or wall, will be available for pre-order on April 3rd.
entries.title_ja: 地面や壁面に衝撃が加わった瞬間などを表現できる「魂EFFECTシリーズ IMPACT Gray Ver. for S.H.Figuarts」が4月3日に予約開始
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will start accepting pre-orders for effect parts for figures "Soul EFFECT Series IMPACT Gray Ver. for S.H.Figuarts" on April 3rd. Release is scheduled for October, and the price is 3,300 yen.

entries.title: "Mecha Shifty" that appeared at the April Fool's event from "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE" has been made into a plastic model! Scheduled to be released in November
entries.title_ja: 「勝利の女神：NIKKE」よりエイプリルフールイベントで登場した「メカシフティー」がプラモデル化！ 11月発売予定
entries.description: Overseas hobby manufacturer ``Mania House'' will release a plastic model ``Goddess of Victory: NIKKE Mecha Shifty'' in November. The price is 4,950 yen.

entries.title: From ``Azur Lane'', ``Shinano'' is now a 1/4 scale figure in the bunny suit and ``Illusionary Entanglement''! Scheduled to be released in November
entries.title_ja: 「アズールレーン」より「信濃」がバニースーツの着せ替え「幻夢の絡繰」の姿で1/4スケールフィギュア化！11月発売予定
entries.description: Freeing will release the figure ``Shinano Genmu no Tsurageri'' in November. The price is 44,000 yen.

entries.title: Design guidebook "Dynamic Robo 70's Design Guidebook 2 Getter Sieg Gloiser Edition Kenken Goen" will be released on April 2nd
entries.title_ja: デザイン大鑑「ダイナミックロボ70's デザイン大鑑2 ゲッター・ジーグ・グロイザー編 賢喧豪囂」が4月2日に発売
entries.description: Hobby Japan released the design guidebook ``Dynamic Robo 70's Design Guidebook 2 Getter Sieg Gloiser Edition Kenken Gouen'' today, April 2nd. The price is 6,050 yen.

entries.title: GSI Creos will announce new products this spring and summer, including “Water-based Premium Top Coat Matte (Highly Transparent)”
entries.title_ja: GSIクレオス「水性プレミアムトップコート つや消し（高透性）」など今春～今夏の新商品を発表
entries.description: GSI Creos announced on April 1st information on new products that will be released from the Mr.Hobby brand in the spring and summer of 2026.

entries.title: That girl becomes a doll and becomes a dentist! “Licca-chan Oshigoto Friends Haisha no Ano-chan” released on April 18th
entries.title_ja: あのちゃんがドールになって歯医者さんに！　「リカちゃん 推しごとフレンズ はいしゃのあのちゃん」4月18日発売
entries.description: Takara Tomy will release the doll set ``Licca-chan Oshigoto Friends Haisha no Ano-chan'' on April 18th. The price is 5,940 yen.

entries.title: Hideki Arai's comic works such as "The World is Mine," "From Miyamoto to You," "Keach!!," and "My Love Irene" are all available for 11 yen each! Great deals at Amazon Kindle Store!
entries.title_ja: 「ザ・ワールド・イズ・マイン」「宮本から君へ」「キーチ!!」「愛しのアイリーン」など新井英樹氏のコミック作品「極！合本シリーズ」が全巻1冊11円！Amazon Kindleストアでお買い得！
entries.description: 11 yen per book! Hideki Arai's comics ``Goku! Combined Series'' including ``The World is Mine'' and ``From Miyamoto to You'' are available at Amazon Kindle Store! #Hideki Arai #Amazon Sale

entries.title: The prize “ESPRESTO-Majestic pose-Saki Hanami/-Inflatable-Yume Hanami” from “Gakuen Idolmaster” will be released sequentially from April 28th.
entries.title_ja: 「学園アイドルマスター」よりプライズ「ESPRESTO-Majestic pose-花海咲季/-Inflatable-花海佑芽」が4月28日から順次展開
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will be holding the "Gakuen Idolmaster ESPRESTO-Majestic pose-Saki Hanami" and "Gakuen Idolmaster ESPRESTO-Inflatable-Yume Hanami" prizes sequentially from April 28th.

entries.title: “ARTFX J Todoroki Shoto Cold Flame White Blade Ver.” from “My Hero Academia” will be released in November
entries.title_ja: 「僕のヒーローアカデミア」より「ARTFX J 轟 焦凍 冷炎白刃 Ver.」が11月に発売
entries.description: Kotobukiya will release the figure ``ARTFX J Todoroki Shoto Cold Flame White Blade Ver.'' as a Kotobukiya shop exclusive product in November. The price is 35,860 yen.

entries.title: "Bonobono" anniversary commemorative site pre-opening, anime's 10th anniversary illustration released
entries.title_ja: 「ぼのぼの」アニバーサリー記念サイトプレオープン、アニメの10周年記念イラスト公開
entries.description: Mikio Igarashi's ``Bonobono'' will celebrate its 40th serialization anniversary in 2026, and the TV anime's 10th anniversary. The commemorative site ``40 years with Bonobono.'' pre-opened on April 2nd, the day the anime first aired in 2016. The anime's 10th anniversary illustration has been released.

entries.title: "Even replicas fall in love." Episode 1 advance cut, preview of new story written by Harunadon
entries.title_ja: 「レプリカだって、恋をする。」第1話先行カット、榛名丼書き下ろしの新規ナレの予告
entries.description: The advance cut, synopsis, and web trailer of the first episode of the TV anime ``Replica Datte Koi Suru.'' have been released.

entries.title: [April 2, 2026] List of manga books released today
entries.title_ja: 【2026年4月2日】本日発売のマンガ単行本リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie would like to inform you of the book that will be released today on April 2, 2026. Click here for a list of magazines released today.

entries.title: Production decision for the second season of “The Fable” has been decided! Kazuyuki Okitsu and other cast members continue to portray “Yamaoka Edition”
entries.title_ja: 「ザ・ファブル」第2期の制作決定！「山岡編」を描く　興津和幸らキャスト続投
entries.description: Production of the second season of the TV anime "The Fable" based on the original work by Katsuhisa Minami has been decided. A teaser visual and the continued cast of Kazuyuki Okitsu, Miyuki Sawashiro, Kana Hanazawa, Akio Otsuka, and Tetsuo Komura were also announced.

entries.title: Hiroshi Nagai Tribute Exhibition 23 artists participating including Asakura Sekaiichi, Minami Kitamura, Yuta Nishio, etc.
entries.title_ja: 永井博トリビュート展　朝倉世界一、北村みなみ、西尾雄太ら23作家が参加
entries.description: ``HIROSHI NAGAI TRIBUTE EXHIBITION'', a tribute exhibition to illustrator Hiroshi Nagai, known for his jacket illustrations for Eiichi Otaki's ``A LONG VACATION'', will be held from April 4th to 12th at BONUS TRACK GALLERY 2 in Shimokitazawa, Tokyo. Many manga artists will also participate.

entries.title: List of manga magazines released tomorrow, April 2nd (Thursday)
entries.title_ja: 明日4月2日（木）発売分のマンガ雑誌リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie would like to inform you of the manga magazine that will be released tomorrow, April 2nd (Thursday).

entries.title: Takako Shimura's new series begins in the May issue of JOUR, a comic adaptation of the novel "Danchi no Futari"
entries.title_ja: 志村貴子の新連載は小説「団地のふたり」のコミカライズ、JOUR5月号で開始
entries.description: Takako Shimura has adapted Chiya Fujino's novel ``Danchi no Futari'' into a comic. The series started in the May issue of JOUR (Futabasha), released today, April 2nd.

entries.title: "Ranma 1/2" Jusenkyo themed new goods, including pixel art Ranma and shampoo
entries.title_ja: 「らんま1/2」呪泉郷テーマの新グッズ、ドット絵の乱馬やシャンプーら集合
entries.description: From the TV anime "Ranma 1/2" based on the original work by Rumiko Takahashi, pixel art goods with the theme of Jusenkyo are now available. The lineup includes towels, pass cases, purses, and trading acrylic key chains inspired by hot spring locker keys.

entries.title: “Nigetsuri” Mimi’s father is played by Toru Inada. Non-clue OP video set to HoneyWorks feat. Airi Suzuki’s song.
entries.title_ja: 「逃げ釣り」ミミ父役は稲田徹　HoneyWorks feat.鈴木愛理の楽曲に乗せたノンクレOP映像
entries.description: New cast information for the TV anime ``The fish I let go was big, but the fish I caught was too big'' has been announced. Toru Inada will play Mimi's father.

entries.title: Spring 2026 anime starting today, April 2nd (Thursday)
entries.title_ja: 本日4月2日（木）放送開始の2026年春アニメ
entries.description: We have compiled information on the new anime that will begin broadcasting today, April 2nd (Thursday). Comic Natalie is currently publishing a summary of spring 2026 anime works.

entries.title: A witch on the edge of a cliff is ordered to assassinate a prince...Jun Ino's one-shot "Rutta, the Social Slave Witch" will be serialized
entries.title_ja: 崖っぷち魔女が王子暗殺を命じられて…井野ジュンの読み切り「社畜魔女ルッタ」連載化
entries.description: Jun Ino's new series, ``Rutta, the Corporate Slave Witch, is the Favorite of the Blessed Prince,'' started today, April 2nd, on COMIC Polaris.

entries.title: "SAKAMOTO DAYS" appears on the cover of the May issue of Men's Nonno, and the appendix includes Axta and stickers
entries.title_ja: 「SAKAMOTO DAYS」がメンズノンノ5月号増刊の表紙飾る、付録にアクスタ＆ステッカー
entries.description: Yuto Suzuki's "SAKAMOTO DAYS" illustration will be featured on the cover of the May issue of MEN'S NON-NO (Shueisha), which will be released on April 9th.

entries.title: Ryo Minenami from “The Boy in the Abyss” tells a story of love and hate set in a certain mountain, “Mountain Geki”
entries.title_ja: 「少年のアビス」の峰浪りょうが、とある山を舞台に描く愛憎の物語「山劇」
entries.description: The new series ``Yamageki'' by Ryo Minenami of ``Shonen no Abyss'' has started in Weekly Young Jump issue 18 (Shueisha), released today, April 2nd.

entries.title: "Haikyu!!" key visual for the hands-on event released, ticket information and other details included
entries.title_ja: 「ハイキュー!!」体験型イベントのキービジュアル公開　チケット情報などの詳細も
entries.description: It has been announced that the hands-on event "Volleyball super experience space 'Haikyu!! On the Court'" based on the anime "Haikyu!!" based on the original work by Haruichi Furudate will be held at Dojima River Forum in Osaka from June 27th to August 2nd and at Bellesalle Roppongi in Tokyo from August 7th to September 13th. Along with the announcement of the event period, the event's key visuals, newly drawn visuals of the 12 characters, details, and ticket information were released all at once.

entries.title: “Mecha Magahara” is a “robot apocalypse sci-fi” about a robot with only a head and a girl-like android
entries.title_ja: 頭だけのロボット×少女型アンドロイドの“ロボット終末SF”「メカマガハラ」
entries.description: Yatsu's one-shot ``Mecha Magahara'' was released today, April 1st, on Shonen Jump+.

entries.title: Information about Hirasaka Gakuen's top team leaders and battle system revealed in "Taito Xanadu -Ouka Genbu-"
entries.title_ja: 「亰都ザナドゥ -桜花幻舞-」，比良坂学園の上位チームのリーダーたちや，戦闘システムに関する情報が明らかに
entries.description: On April 2, 2026, Nippon Falcom released new information that will appear in ``Ito Xanadu -Ouka Genbu-''. This time, we will tell you about the profiles of four people, including the leaders of Hirasaka Academy's top teams, and the various actions they can take during battle.

entries.title: "Chill with You: Lo-Fi Story" smartphone version released on April 8th. Sale will be held until April 31st
entries.title_ja: 「Chill with You：Lo-Fi Story」スマホ版，4月8日にリリース。4月31日までセールを開催予定
entries.description: Netospi announced today (April 2, 2026) that it will release the smartphone version of "Chill with You: Lo-Fi Story" on April 8th. This work is a ``work adventure'' where you work at a desk with ``Satone'', a girl who loves writing novels.

entries.title: "Petit Planet" new beta test will start on April 21st for PC, iOS, and Android. New residents appear
entries.title_ja: 「プチプラネット」新たなβテストをPC，iOS，Android向けに4月21日に開始。新たな住民が登場
entries.description: HoYoverse announced today (April 2, 2026) that it will conduct a new beta test for PC, iOS, and Android for its first slow life game, "Petit Planet."

entries.title: "Aipuri Bazurium Park", where you can enjoy "Onegai Ipuri" and "Ipuri Reverse", has opened in Ikebukuro, Tokyo. iPri runway was so awesome
entries.title_ja: 「おねがいアイプリ」と「アイプリバース」が楽しめる「アイプリバズリウムパーク」，東京・池袋にオープン。アイプリランウェイが最高すぎた
entries.description: "Iipuri Bazurium Park", where you can enjoy "Onegai Iipuri" and "Iipuri Reverse", opened today on the 3rd floor of the GiGO main store in Ikebukuro, Tokyo. Ipri Bazurium Park is a shop that opened to commemorate the start of the new series ``Onegai Ipri.'' At the back of the store, there is a large display of ``Iprix Runway.''

entries.title: The daily erosive event "Human One Room" will be held from April 18th at Toranomon Hills, Tokyo. Read the memories in furniture and accessories to uncover the truth hidden in the room
entries.title_ja: 日常侵蝕型イベント「人のワンルーム」，東京・虎ノ門ヒルズで4月18日から開催。家具や小物に宿った記憶を読み取り，部屋に隠された真実に迫る
entries.description: Daishi Kyoukai announced today that the exhibition event ``Human One Room'' will be held at Toranomon Hills in Tokyo from April 18th to May 17th. This work is the latest work in the ``Human'' series of daily life erosion games developed by The Fourth Boundary. He will be in charge of one of the 40 rooms in the exhibition "TOKYOROOMS Exhibition - 40 Rooms, 40 Ways of Living" which will be held during the same period.

entries.title: ``Ground Zero'', a retro survival horror film influenced by classic ``Bio'' movies, will be released on April 17th. Demo version is also available on Steam
entries.title_ja: 往年の“バイオ”などに影響を受けたレトロなサバイバルホラー「Ground Zero」，4月17日にリリース決定。デモ版もSteamで配信中
entries.description: Kwalee announced today (April 2, 2026) that the new title "Ground Zero" developed by Malformation Games will be released on April 17, Japan time. This work is a survival horror game set in post-apocalyptic Korea, and is said to have been influenced by survival horror games of yesteryear.

entries.title: "EGG Console Seesaw MSX" released today. An ACT game where you use seesaws and trampolines to repel the bad guys.
entries.title_ja: 「EGGコンソール シーソー MSX」本日配信。シーソーやトランポリンを駆使してワルガキ団を撃退していくACTゲーム
entries.description: D4 Enterprises today began distributing ``EGG Console Seesaw MSX''. "Seesaw" is an ACT game released in 1985. The player controls the main character, JUN, and fights against the Warugaki group. JUN can only jump, so the key to winning is making full use of the seesaws and trampolines set up on the stage.

entries.title: PS Plus April free play, ``Lord of the Fallen'', ``Tomb Raider I-III Remastered'' and ``SAO Fractured Daydream'' are now available
entries.title_ja: PS Plus 4月のフリープレイ，「ロード オブ ザ フォールン」「トゥームレイダー I-III リマスター」「SAO フラクチュアード デイドリーム」が登場
entries.description: SIE today announced free play titles for ``PlayStation Plus'' subscribers in April 2026. ``Lords of the Fallen'', ``Tomb Raider I-III Remastered'', and ``Sword Art Online Fractured Daydream'' will appear in April's free play. The offer period is from April 7th to May 4th.

entries.title: “Starship Troopers: Ultimate Bug War!” download version released for Switch2 & PS5
entries.title_ja: 「スターシップ・トゥルーパーズ: アルティメット・バグ・ウォー！」，Switch2＆PS5向けダウンロード版を発売
entries.description: GameSource Entertainment and Dotemu released the download version of ``Starship Troopers: Ultimate Bug War!'' for Switch 2 and PS5 on April 2, 2026. The price is 4,840 yen each (tax included). This work is a "retro FPS" based on the movie "Starship Troopers".

entries.title: KRAFTON and others have invested $3.5 million in the new adventure MOBA "Golden Tides." Expectations are rising as the “next generation MOBA”
entries.title_ja: 新作アドベンチャーMOBA「Golden Tides」に対し，KRAFTONらが350万ドルを出資。“次世代のMOBA”として期待が高まる
entries.description: PsychedelicGames has announced that it has received a total of $3.5 million (approximately 555 million yen) in investment from Korean publisher KRAFTON, esports organization FlyQuest, and game investment company Arbitrum Gaming Ventures for its new game "Golden Tides", which is currently in development. The funds will be used to expand the development of this game and build an ecosystem.

entries.title: Which button is the correct answer? Horror puzzle game that aims to escape from a mysterious room, ``Push it and if it doesn't work, try it'', Switch version released today
entries.title_ja: 正解のボタンはどれ？ 謎の部屋からの脱出を目指すホラーパズル「押してダメなら押してみろ」，Switch版を本日発売
entries.description: Register today released the downloadable title ``If it doesn't work, press it'' for Nintendo Switch. It's a puzzle adventure game where you aim to escape from a mysterious room with countless buttons. The game combines horror elements, where if you press too many buttons, your ``sanity'' decreases.

entries.title: The PS5/Switch version of "MotionRec," a record puzzle action game that progresses through recording and playback, is released today. A story about the adventures of a small robot in a world ruled by machines.
entries.title_ja: 記録と再生で進むレコードパズルアクション「MotionRec」，PS5/Switch版を本日発売。機械に支配された世界を舞台に，小さなロボットの冒険を描く
entries.description: PLAYISM today released the downloadable version of the record puzzle action game "MotionRec" for PlayStation5/NintendoSwitch. The player controls Rec, a robot that records and plays back the player's movements, and collects scattered musical notes in a mysterious world ruled by machines.

entries.title: “Fruit Mountain Party” for Switch2 & Switch will be released on April 23rd. On the same day, early access on Steam will end and you will upgrade to the official version.
entries.title_ja: Switch2＆Switch版「フルーツマウンテン パーティ」，4月23日に発売。同日にはSteamでの早期アクセスを終了し正式版にアップグレード
entries.description: Becide announced today (April 2, 2026) that the Switch 2 & Switch version of "Fruit Mountain Party" will be released on April 23. The PC and Mac versions currently in early access on Steam will be upgraded to the official version on the same day. This title is an evolution of the 3D puzzle game ``Fruit Mountain'' into a party battle game.

entries.title: From the game "Collapse: Star Rail", "Sunday" and "Hianshi" are now available as 1/8 scale figures!
entries.title_ja: ゲーム『崩壊：スターレイル』より、「サンデー」と「ヒアンシー」が1/8スケールフィギュアになって登場！
entries.description:
From the game "Collapse: Star Rail", "Sunday Star Rail LIVE Ver." and "Hianshi" are now available. “Sunday” is scheduled to be released in November 2026, and “Hianshi” is scheduled to be released in October 2026. Below is an excerpt from the press release. "Next […]
The post From the game "Collapse: Star Rail", "Sunday" and "Hianshi" are now available as 1/8 scale figures! first appeared on AmiAmi News.

entries.title: [未翻訳] METAL BUILD EXPO
entries.title_ja: METAL BUILD EXPO
entries.description:
“METAL BUILD EXPO” is being held at TAMASHII NATIONS STORE TOKYO from March 27th (Friday) to July 6th (Monday), 2026. AmiAmi News reported on this event on March 26th, the day before the public opening […]
The post METAL BUILD EXPO first appeared on AmiAmi News.

entries.title: “Hot Wheels” 2 packs of VW Golf, 2 packs of ’64 Galaxy 500 and ’67 Anglia are now available! Now accepting pre-orders on Amazon!
entries.title_ja: 「ホットウィール」VWゴルフの2パック、’64ギャラクシー500と’67アングリアの2パックが登場！Amazonで予約受付中！
entries.description: "Hot Wheels" VW Golf 2-pack, a unique 2-pack that combines two cars with different characteristics, the '64 Galaxy 500 and the '67 Anglia, is now available! #hot wheels #minicar

entries.title: The dynamic pose is attractive! "Collapse: Star Rail" Hianshi and Sunday Star Rail LIVE Ver. are made into 1/8 scale figures in the "Gift+" series! Now accepting reservations at Rakuten Books!

entries.title: MIXI launches "LVLZero Tokyo" to support the overseas expansion of indie and emerging game development. Entries for Phase I will be accepted until April 25, 2026.
entries.title_ja: MIXI，インディー・新興ゲーム開発の海外展開を支援する「LVLZero Tokyo」を開始。第I期エントリー受付は2026年4月25日まで
entries.description: MIXI's investment subsidiary MIXIGlobal Investments today (April 2, 2026) announced ``LVL Zero Tokyo,'' which supports the overseas expansion of indie game developers. Applications for the first phase of the program have begun in conjunction with the announcement, which is a practical measure that supports challenges to the global market through 100 days of mentoring.

entries.title: Become a dog diver and collect treasures from the deep sea. 2D action game "Salty Dog" with up to 4 players cooperation, Steam store page released
entries.title_ja: 犬のダイバーとなり，深海のお宝を回収しよう。最大4人協力の2Dアクション「ソルティドッグ」，Steamストアページを公開
entries.description: PoldenPublishing today announced the PC game "Salty Dog" developed by CrossbridgeGameStudios. This is a cooperative 2D action game in which dog divers explore the deep sea. Using physical calculations, the game uses a harpoon to retrieve treasures and creatures on the ocean floor. The items you bring back can be exchanged for cash and used to upgrade your submarine.

entries.title: In the latest video from Washagana TV, we show you how we are playing "Akinator" for the first time in a while. Will we meet our destiny, Genshigradon, again?

entries.description: Today (March 30, 2026), the latest video of the web program "Washagana TV" featuring Yuichi Nakamura and Mafia Kajita was released. This time, they show how they are playing Akinator for the first time in about four and a half years. The video shows a slightly different way of playing the game, in which the player is supposed to find the person of his or her dreams by answering the questions that he or she likes.　The video shows a slightly different way of playing the game.

entries.title: Don't Wake the Beast" is an extreme exploration where "one misstep and it's over". Don't Wake the Beast" is a roguelite stealth game in which you infiltrate a monster's lair, evade traps, and steal gold, silver, and treasures.

entries.description: Don'tWaketheBeast, a new title from ArtificialDisasters, is a roguelite stealth action game in which players must infiltrate a dangerous dungeon and bring back treasures while evading the eyes of monsters. The title offers a tense exploration of a dungeon filled with traps, puzzles, and roaming enemies.

entries.title: Commemorating the first prize in the international works category of the "Vertical Reading Manga Award 2025" "I will be the head of the family in this life" Mon e-mail interview
entries.title_ja: 「タテ読みマンガアワード 2025」海外作品部門1位受賞記念 「今世は当主になります」Monメールインタビュー
entries.description: The "Vertical Reading Manga Award," a manga award for vertically scrolling manga organized by Comic Natalie, was held for the second time, and "Konzei wa toushu ni naru naru" won first place in the overseas works category at the "Vertical Reading Manga Award 2025. In this reincarnation fantasy, the main character, Florentia, wakes up as a seven-year-old girl and struggles to protect her beloved father and her family, which is doomed to destruction. At the award ceremony for the "Tate-omi Manga Award 2025," guest judge Pate-chan and other panelists commented on the work as "exhilarating in its revenge and at the same time heartwarming (to see a child trying her best). To commemorate the first place award in the foreign works category, we conducted an e-mail interview with Mon, the artist in charge of drawing, about such "Konzei ha Toushi ni naru Naru" (This World Will Be Our Lord). We asked him about the story behind the creation of the beloved protagonist, saying, "I sometimes feel as if I am lovingly raising the child together with the readers.

entries.title: Commemorating the first prize in the domestic works category of the "Vertical Reading Manga Award 2025" "It's the tyrant's bad girl you asked for" interview with Tenichi Mail
entries.title_ja: 「タテ読みマンガアワード 2025」国内作品部門1位受賞記念 「お求めいただいた暴君陛下の悪女です」天壱メールインタビュー
entries.description: The "Vertical Reading Manga Award," a manga award for vertically scrolling manga organized by Comic Natalie, was held for the second time, and "It's the Tyrant's Bad Girl You Asked For" won first place in the domestic works category. The work is a story of romance and revenge that begins when Lars, despised as an evil woman by her homeland, gets a chance to return to the past and start her life over a second time. Yudai Sano of INI, who participated in the "Vertical Reading Manga Award 2025" as a guest judge, said, "Every time there is revenge, the exhilaration is amazing. To commemorate winning first place in the domestic works category for "It's the Tyrant His Majesty's Bad Girl You Asked For," we conducted an e-mail interview with Tenichi, who is in charge of the original story and scenario. We asked him about his thoughts on the award and the source of the idea for the revenge scene.

The theme this time was "What is the legend of the game industry that has become too much of a fantasy? We have judged the answers based on your evaluations and our own prejudice, and the winners are....

entries.title: Yasuhiro Watanabe's new work "High Touch" in Haven, a high school baseball story that begins with a reunion with a girl on the beach
entries.title_ja: 渡辺保裕の新作「ハイタッチ」がヘヴンに、海辺の女子との再会から始まる高校野球もの
entries.description: Yasuhiro Watanabe, known for his "Cabinet Power Crime Enforcement Officer Jotaro Zaizen" and "Dokacock" series, started a new serial, "High Touch," in the May issue of Monthly Comic Heaven (Nihon Bungeisha), on sale today, March 30. It is a high school baseball manga that begins with a reunion with a girl on the beach.

entries.title: Manga Artist Goes to Sokutai to Buy Doujinshi of His Manga "Censored Manga Man and Doujin Woman".
entries.title_ja: 自分のマンガの同人誌を買いにマンガ家が即売会へ「打ち切られ漫画家と同人女」
entries.description: Sumi Hibito's new serial "The Censored Manga Artist and the Doujin Woman" started today, March 30, on Shonen Jump+.

entries.title: Hisashi Eguchi in long conversation with Subaru Tomori of "Ese Copyright Casebook," featuring Freestyle.
entries.title_ja: 江口寿史が「エセ著作権事件簿」の友利昴とロング対談、フリースタイルの特集で
entries.description: A feature article titled "What Hisashi Eguchi Did" appears in the culture magazine Freestyle Vol. 67 (Freestyle), on sale today, March 30.

entries.title: Court clerk launches "Inu Gohan Boku Gohan," a short trip with her dog and a gourmet meal.
entries.title_ja: 裁判所の書記官が愛犬との小旅行とグルメに癒される「イヌごはんボクごはん」発売
entries.description: Mitsuo Hashimoto's "Inu Gohan Boku Gohan" written by Akira Ban-Cha was released today, March 30.

entries.title: A carefully prepared revenge drama of a marquise who was betrayed by her fiancé, a fantasy volume with a big comeback!
entries.title_ja: 婚約者に裏切られた侯爵令嬢の用意周到な復讐劇、大逆転ざまぁファンタジー1巻
entries.description: Mai Neko Mai, written by Mikoto Sakurai, "My fiancée is more important to my sister-in-law, so I will make it possible for them to get married." Volume 1 was released today, March 30.

entries.title: Animal Crossing" skincare item packages are cute! Leaf-shaped lip cases, die-cut mirrors, and other miscellaneous items!

entries.title: "Would you like to collaborate with 'THE iDOLM@STER'?" BANNAM is looking for partners to utilize the series IP - responding to a wide range of work including commercial appearances and promotional advertising.

entries.description: Recruitment of IP utilization partner companies and municipalities for the "THE iDOLM@STER" series has begun for the next fiscal year!

entries.title: A translator reported that he was fired from his job because "from now on, all translations will be done by AI..." The accusation by the person in charge of "Kingdom Come II" received a huge response on overseas bulletin boards.

entries.description: The submitter stated that if there are any questions, they will be answered to the best of their ability.

entries.title: 'The Elder Scrolls: Blades' Comes to an End. Free Basics Spin-off for Smartphone/Switch - "I wanted to buy it and play it" and regrettably, "I wanted to buy it and play it.

entries.title: Husband with brain tumor loses insurance due to Epic layoffs" - wife's post spreads on social networking sites... CEO apologizes and responds.
entries.title_ja: 「脳腫瘍の夫がEpicのレイオフで保険喪失」―妻の投稿がSNSで拡散…CEOが謝罪し対応へ
entries.description: There is no time left. We want to do everything we can while he is still with us," his wife complained.

entries.description: Nexon will be in charge of the management of "Overwatch" for Korea by the end of the year.

entries.title: Search for the origins of a domestic crane game from 1965! The nationwide search project for "Crown 602" has been completed.

entries.description: An introductory video is now available, which makes the release of the product even more eagerly awaited.

entries.title: Crowdfunding Project for SparkBlocks, the Next Generation of STEM Educational Toys from Canada, Now Available on Kibidango

entries.title: Fate/Grand Order" x "Fate/strange Fake" collaboration event to be held. Ryogo Narita, the author of the original story, wrote the scenario.
entries.title_ja: 「Fate/Grand Order」×「Fate/strange Fake」コラボイベントが開催決定。原作者の成田良悟氏がシナリオを執筆
entries.description: On March 28, 2026, FGOPROJECT announced that a collaboration event with the TV anime "Fate/strangeFake" will be held in "Fate/GrandOrder" and released an announcement video. The details of the collaboration event and the timing of the event have not been disclosed, but the scenario will be written by Ryogo Narita, the author of the original story.

entries.title: ARG's "Novel: Exhibition of Leftovers" will be released on May 29. Step into the village with the members of the National Association for the Preservation of Remnants.
entries.title_ja: ARG「残置物展」を書籍化した「小説 残置物展」，5月29日に発売決定。全国残置物保管協会の会員と一緒にいわく付きの村に足を踏み入れる
entries.description: Daishi Boundary today announced that it will release on May 29 a book version of its ARG "Zanmono Exhibition," which displays leftover items from coin-operated lockers, titled "Novel Zanmono Exhibition. The price is 1980 yen (tax included). The protagonist of the novel version is an ordinary college student. By chance, he meets a woman called "Nucky" and is invited to join the National Association for the Preservation of Leftover Objects.

entries.title: The first "Wu-Ran Makaisumu" Premium Digital DX is on sale for 25% off. Discounts also available on the 25th anniversary editions of "Kazenraiki 5" and "The Puppet Princess of Mar's Kingdom."
entries.title_ja: 「凶乱マカイズム」プレミアムデジタルDXが25％オフでセール初登場。「風雨来記5」や「マール王国の人形姫」25周年記念版も割引価格で購入可能
entries.description: NIHONICHI SOFTWARE is currently offering up to 70% off select titles available on MyNintendoStore. This time, Premium Digital DX of the action RPG "Kairan Makaisumu" is on sale for the first time at 25% off. In addition, "Kazenraiki 5" and "The Puppet Princess of Marl's Kingdom 25thANNIVERSARYCOLLECTION" are also available at a discounted price.

entries.title: Confronting Evil Spirits with Rough Healing. Medieval-style deck-building game based on the Cthulhu Mythos motif, "The Cursed Blood Doctor," to launch in Early Access on March 31, 2026.
entries.title_ja: 荒々しい治療で邪霊に立ち向かう。クトゥルフ神話モチーフの中世風デッキ構築ゲーム「呪血医」，2026年3月31日に早期アクセス開始
entries.description: Indie development studio ALDAMAMIGAMES will release its new title, "The Cursed Blood Doctor," as early access on March 31, 2026. Combining elements of the Cthulhu Mythos with deck-building and hand-drawn visuals inspired by medieval medicine, the game depicts an eerie world.

entries.title: Wyldheart, a cooperative action RPG by a former AAA title developer, is announced. The title focuses on ease of play, making it easy to join and leave during the game.
entries.title_ja: 元AAAタイトル開発者が手がける協力型アクションRPG「Wyldheart」発表。途中参加や退出のしやすさにも配慮した，遊びやすさ重視のタイトル
entries.description: WayfinderStudios announced the March 27, 2026 release of Wyldheart, a cooperative action RPG. The game, created by a former AAA title developer, will allow players to join and leave the game easily, and will also allow solo play, making it a title that can be played regardless of individual schedules.

entries.title: Jantama" and anime "Sword Art Online" to collaborate. Details to be announced at a later date.
entries.title_ja: 「雀魂-じゃんたま-」とアニメ「ソードアート・オンライン」がコラボ決定。詳細は後日公開
entries.description: Yostar announced today (March 30, 2026) a collaboration between its mahjong game "Jantama" and the anime "Sword Art Online.

entries.title: Duet Night Abyss", a new update including a new chapter in the Huastou area, "The Blue Heavenly Change", will be implemented on April 7, 2012. Challenge the two dragon gods "Taikou" and "Candle Yin" to a decisive battle.
entries.title_ja: 「デュエットナイトアビス」，華胥エリア新章「蒼天の変」を含むアップデートを4月7日に実施。二柱の龍神「太皓」「燭陰」との決戦に挑む
entries.description: HongKongSpiralRisingTechnology announced today (March 30, 2026) that the latest update for its action RPG "Duet Knight Abyss" service will be released on April 7. This update will unleash a new chapter in the Huastou area, "Souten no Hen". A new PV has been released, so check it out.

entries.title: Nyanko Taisen" Celebrates 111.11 Million Downloads with the First Event. DL Commemorative Selection Gacha" with an increased appearance rate of legendary rares.
entries.title_ja: 「にゃんこ大戦争」1億1111万ダウンロード突破記念イベント第1弾を開催。伝説レア出現率アップの「DL記念選抜ガチャ」が登場
entries.description: Ponos announced today that its smartphone application "Nyanko Taisen" has been downloaded a total of 111.11 million times, and the first event to commemorate this milestone has begun. In addition, a limited time rare gacha "DL Commemorative Selection Gacha" is being held to increase the appearance rate of legendary rares.

entries.title: Super Mario Galaxy" x "Thirty-One" collaboration will be held from April 1 to May 7, 2012. Limited time only flavors that recreate the world of the work will be available.
entries.title_ja: 「スーパーマリオギャラクシー」×「サーティワン」コラボ，4月1日〜5月7日に開催。作品の世界観を再現した期間限定フレーバーが登場
entries.description: B-R Thirty-One Ice Cream announced on March 27, 2026, that it will hold a collaboration campaign with Nintendo's "Super Mario Galaxy" from April 1 to May 7. The limited time-only "Cotton Fruit Galaxy" flavor, which is inspired by the world of the work, and other items will be on sale.

entries.title: New Game "Game of the GODDESS" of TV Animation "Yusha Jiken ni Sho" Announced. Dark fantasy work by Rocket Trading Company
entries.title_ja: TVアニメ「勇者刑に処す」の新作ゲーム「勇者刑に処す -Game of the GODDESS-」が発表に。ロケット商会氏によるダークファンタジー作品
entries.description: On March 28, 2026, KADOKAWA announced "GameoftheGODDESS-", a new game adaptation project of the TV anime "Yusha Jiken ni Shitsugen Yusha 9004-tai Jikenroku". A teaser visual and a teaser PV were also unveiled.

entries.title: Marvel's retro masterpieces come back to life in the modern age. MARVEL MaXimum Collection" is now available. Bundle pack of multiple titles that transcends the boundaries of manufacturers is now available in Japanese.
entries.title_ja: マーベルのレトロ名作が現代に蘇る。「MARVEL MaXimum Collection」配信開始。メーカーの壁を越えた複数タイトルのバンドルパックが日本語対応で登場
entries.description: On March 27, 2026, LimitedRunGames released the MARVELMaXimumCollection, a comprehensive collection of popular Marvel Comics titles. The bundle includes 13 versions of six games that were popular in arcades and 8-bit/16-bit home consoles in the 1990s, including "SilverSurfer" and "X-Men: TheArcadeGame.

entries.title: Shibuya Scramble Stories" delayed payment of over 27 million yen from "Ubugoe". Actions, including legal action, have been initiated.
entries.title_ja: 「シブヤスクランブルストーリーズ」，「うぶごえ」から2700万円以上の入金が遅延。法的措置を含めた対応を開始
entries.description: The official X account of "Shibuya Scramble Stories" reported that the payment of more than 27 million yen from the crowdfunding site "Ubugoe" has been delayed. Discussions with lawyers are already underway.

entries.title: From the smartphone game "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE", the "Leviathan" figure is now available in luxury and standard editions! Amiami limited bonus edition is also available!

entries.description:
From the smartphone game "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE" comes a 1/7th scale figure of Leviathan. An "A2 clear poster" will be included as an Amiami exclusive bonus, scheduled for release in January 2027. The following is an excerpt from the press release. Product Overview […].
The post Leviathan Figure from Smartphone Game "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE" Sculpted in Luxury and Normal Editions! Amiami Limited bonus included! appeared first on Amiami News.

entries.title: From "Blue Archive", "Momoi" and "Midori" from the Game Development Department have been sculpted into 1/6 scale figures!
