entries.description:
From the "Blue Archive" come "Momoi" and "Midori" from the Game Development Department. Momoi" will be released in November 2026 and "Midori" in October 2026. The following is an excerpt from the press release. Posing for a bright and energetic impression and emotional expression […].
The post "Momoi" and "Midori" from the Game Development Department to become 1/6 scale figures from "Blue Archive" appeared first on Amiami News! appeared first on Amiami News.

entries.title: Hamaru Strategy is currently conducting a survey of consumer attitudes toward random goods. Aggregate results will be made available to the public.
entries.title_ja: ランダムグッズに関する消費者の意識調査をHamaru Strategyが実施中。集計結果は一般公開を予定
entries.description: On March 28, 2026, HamaruStrategy launched a survey on consumer attitudes toward random goods. Responses will be accepted until 11:59 p.m. on April 3, but will be closed when the system's upper limit of 100,000 responses is reached. The themes of the survey include experiences of purchasing random goods, likes/dislikes, tolerance levels, related troubles, and improvement measures.

entries.title: Warframe, the First Fully Quadrupedal "Voruna Prime," Will Appear on April 9, Japan Standard Time. Information on new skins will also be revealed.
entries.title_ja: 「Warframe」，初の完全四足歩行を実現した「Voruna Prime」が日本時間4月9日に登場。新作のスキンに関する情報も明らかに
entries.description: DigitalExtremes participated in PAXEast, which took place from March 26 to 29, 2026 North American time, and held a Devstream to present the latest information on Warframe and Soulframe. This time, it was revealed that the first Warframe to walk on all four limbs, VorunaPrime, will be implemented and that the 14th Prelude of Soulframe will be released for PC in April.

entries.description: A stage event for the third season of the TV anime "Dr. Stone Science Future" written by Riichiro Inagaki and Boichi was held today, March 29, at the GREEN STAGE of AnimeJapan 2026 held at Tokyo Big Sight in Tokyo. Yusuke Kobayashi as Chisora Ishigami, Shin Furukawa as Taiki Ohki, and Kana Ichinose as Yuzuru Ogawa appeared on stage. They talked about the final chapter of the show, which will finally air on the moon.

The event brought together the four main cast members: Ayane Sakura as Gabrielle, Saori Hayami as Alma, Yoshinoh Aoyama as Danelle, and Sally Amagi as Raguel. Director Seiji Mizushima also made a surprise appearance on stage.

Continuing from the first performance, Hiroki Miura and Kou Takano will play the lead roles of Nobu and Yuichiro Yamaguchi will play the role of Wang Ki.

entries.description: What? That was released this week? This week's "This Week's Motivation" is a weekly series of articles for those who tend to think, "Oh, that was released this week! This week, "SuperMeatBoy3D," a 3D version of the classic 2D action game "SuperMeatBoy," and "Darwin'sParadox!

entries.title: CiniCross, a nonogrammatic challenge to a cursed dungeon (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)
entries.title_ja: 呪われたダンジョンにノノグラムで挑む「CiniCross」（ほぼ日 インディーPick Up！）
entries.description: Today's "Almost Daily Indie PickUp!" introduces "CiniCross," a roguelite puzzle game that incorporates nonograms into dungeon exploration. The game is about solving puzzles, defeating enemies, and collecting artifacts to reach the depths of a cursed dungeon, bringing the urgent elements of "time" and "life" into the nonogram to offer a completely new play experience.

entries.title: Weekly 4Gamer recaps the week in 4Gamer, March 23 - March 29, 2026
entries.title_ja: 4Gamerの1週間を振り返る「Weekly 4Gamer」，2026年3月23日〜3月29日
entries.description: From March 23 to March 29, 2026, 352 articles appeared on 4Gamer, including the XboxPartnerPreview, a weekly look back at the week in which 4Gamer and the global gaming industry were treated to new information, including a completely new Dragon's Dogma Studio title. Let's take a quick look back.

entries.title: ［Play Report] A futuristic TPS that manages time by the second has arrived. Time Takers" is a new type of shooter in which players compete for time to level up.
entries.title_ja: ［プレイレポ］秒単位で時を管理する未来なTPS来たれり。「Time Takers」は，時間を奪い合ってレベルアップする新感覚シューター
entries.description: The first closed beta test of "TimeTakers", a team-based time survival shooter being developed by MistilGames of Korea, was held from March 14 to 22, 2026, and we are pleased to report on the results.

entries.title: Dragon Quest X Online, Version 8 "Lost Children of Time and Space" Story, Friends, and New Master Class Vocations Revealed
entries.title_ja: 「ドラゴンクエストX　オンライン」，バージョン8「時空の迷い子たち」のストーリーや仲間たち，マスタークラスの新職業を公開
entries.description: Square Enix today released the latest information on version 8 "Lost Children of Time and Space" of its online RPG "Dragon Quest X Online. The story that continues from "The Awakening of the Five Tribes" has entered its final chapter. The story takes place in Youmagram, a world reached at the end of the "Time Wandering," where fierce battles unfold.

entries.title: AnimeJapan 2026 (Anime Japan) New Information Summary: "Rayearth" Cast Announced, "Steel Ball Run" Distribution Information, etc.

entries.description: AnimeJapan 2026, one of the world's largest anime events, was held at Tokyo Big Sight in Tokyo on March 28 and 29, 2026. The following is a summary of new information announced at the event, including anime adaptation information, key visuals, PVs, broadcast dates, and casts, as well as a report on the event stages held at the venue.

entries.title: Atsumi Tanazaki thanks Himmel's point of view in "Sougou no Furen" and Chiaki Kobayashi takes a bite out of Shinichiro Miki.
entries.title_ja: 「葬送のフリーレン」種﨑敦美がヒンメル視点に感謝、小林千晃は三木眞一郎に喰らいつく
entries.description: The talk stage of the TV anime "Sougou no Freelen" written by Yamada Kaneto and Abetsukasa, "Sougou no Freelen" 2nd season special stage AnimeJapan 2026" was held at Tokyo Big Sight in Tokyo today, March 29, during "AnimeJapan 2026". Atsumi Tanezaki (Freelen), Kana Ichinose (Fern), and Chiaki Kobayashi (Stark) appeared on stage. As a surprise, Shinichiro Miki, who plays the role of the divine Revolte, took the stage.

entries.title: Before the conclusion of "Aobuta," Kaito Ishikawa's love bursts forth: "I don't want to give this role to anyone!

The event featured Kaito Ishikawa playing the role of Sakita Azukawa, Asami Seto playing the role of Mai Sakurajima, Ki Yamane playing the role of Ikumi Akagi, and Mainaka Ishimi playing the role of Miori Mihigashi.

entries.title: Haruki Ishitani of "Marriage Toxin" is the "Strongest Presenter"; Utone Wakayama runs out of time.

entries.title: What was your first impression of "Akane Banashi"? Kobayashi Chiaki and Yamashita Seiichiro gave the same answer, while Shimazaki Nobunaga said, "It has a glimmer.

entries.description: The stage event of the TV anime "AKANE BANJI" written by Hiroki Suenaga and Takamasa Umagami, titled "Dondokoi! Brothers' Meeting" was held on March 28 at AnimeJapan 2026, featuring Anna Nagase as Akeon Sakurazaki, Nobunaga Shimazaki as Mairuke Araragawa, Chiaki Kobayashi as Koguma Araragawa, Yohei Azaue as Toruji Araragawa, and Seiichiro Yamashita as Guriko Araragawa.

entries.description: A stage event for the TV anime "Kindergarten WARS," written by Yusei Chiba, was held today, March 29, at the WHITE STAGE in AnimeJapan 2026. Atsumi Tanezaki, who plays Rita, and Kentaro Kumagai, who plays Doug, took the stage at the event. Also appearing as guests were Hitomi Owada who plays Hana, Satoshi Hino who plays Luke, and Mariya Ise who plays Sylvia, all of whom were announced to appear at the event on the same day.

entries.title: Anime "Tourebe" Sanzen Sensou Hen to begin airing in October; new cast includes Naoyuki Shimotsuru, Shinnosuke Tachibana, and others.

entries.title: Gochiusa" Ayane Sakura and others look back with a quiz of difficult questions, ending with "We Are!

The MC was Tadashi Hayami playing Takahiro.

entries.title: Pripara" went to Sin Galmageddon for the first solo show in over 10 years! The last performance was, of course, "Chudo"!
entries.title_ja: 「プリパラ」10年越しの初単独でシン・ガァルマゲドンへ！最後はもちろん“ちゅどーん”
entries.description: The first solo event by Gaarmageddon, a team from the "Pripara" anime series, "'Devil's Banquet - Servants, I curse you! It's a party of the Devil! Gaal! ～by Pripara" was held today, March 28, at the Bunkyo Civic Hall in Tokyo. The event featured Yui Makino as Arima Kurosu, Yui Watanabe as Mikan Shiratama, and Asami Sanada as Gaalulu. The event was delivered not only with songs and dances, but also with the entire production as if it were a single piece of work, full of the fullest Gallmageddon style.

entries.title: Visuals commemorating the completion of "TRIGUN STARGAZE," talk events, and the release of the complete book.

entries.description: Anime Japan 2026 has finally begun! We will bring you a photo report of items exhibited for the first time at the venue, including "Umamusume", "MadoMagi", "Blue Aka", "Bakihido", "Jutsu Kaisen", "Rayearth", "Licorico", "JoJo", and more! #AJ2026

entries.title: She is now available as a prize figure in a glossy racing outfit! Lunamaria Hawk from "Mobile Suit Gundam Seed Freedom" appears in Banpresto's GLITTER & GLAMOURS!

entries.title: Nendoroid JAPAN TOUR" FINAL in Tokyo
entries.title_ja: 「ねんどろいど JAPAN TOUR」FINAL in 東京
entries.description:
The "Nendoroid JAPAN TOUR" FINAL in Tokyo, currently being held at the Akiba CO Gallery until Sunday, April 5, 2026 Amiami News is pleased to cover this event! (Click on image to enlarge) […].
The post "Nendoroid JAPAN TOUR" FINAL in Tokyo first appeared on Amiami News.

entries.title: All members of the "Management Department" gathered!　Report on the noon performance of "Break My Case 3rd Conference" on February 28. Two hours of songs and variety
entries.title_ja: 「管理部」メンバー全員集結！　「ブレイクマイケース 3rd Conference」2月28日昼公演レポート。歌とバラエティで紡いだ2時間
entries.description: The "Break My Case 3rd Conference" was held on February 28, 2026 at Carutz Kawasaki in Kanagawa Prefecture. As an event where one can enjoy music to the fullest, the audience was thrilled by personal songs and a variety of other performances. This article reports on the noon performance on February 28.

entries.title: ARC Raiders" releases teaser trailer for "Flashpoint," a major update scheduled to be released on March 31.
entries.title_ja: 「ARC Raiders」，3月31日配信予定の大型アップデート「Flashpoint」のティザートレイラー公開
entries.description: A teaser trailer introducing the major update "Flashpoint" has been released for ARCRaiders, a PvPvE exertion shooter currently being marketed by Nexon. The update is scheduled to be released on March 31, 2026, although details of the update have not been revealed.

entries.title: Weekly Steam Plaza No. 146: City Construction Sim "Nova Roma" and Arcade Racing Sim "Screamer" Released
entries.title_ja: 週刊Steam広場 第146号：都市建設シム「Nova Roma」や，アーケードレーシング「Screamer」が発売に
entries.description: This week's Weekly Steam Plaza brings you the latest news on Steam's hottest titles and sales. This week's releases include NovaRoma, a city builder that allows players to leave the declining Roman Empire and build their ideal city in a new land, and Screamer, a futuristic arcade racing game with a 1990s anime aesthetic.

entries.title: Completely new game based on the theatrical anime "Paradise Expelled" to be released in winter 2026; media mix work in conjunction with a new movie to be released on November 13
entries.title_ja: 劇場アニメ「楽園追放」を原作とする完全新作ゲームが2026年冬にリリース予定。11月13日公開の新作映画と連携したメディアミックス作品
entries.description: Toei Animation announced today (March 28, 2026) that it will release a completely new game based on the theatrical anime "Expelled from Paradise" in winter 2026. The newly announced game will be based on the world of the "Expelled from Paradise" series as depicted in the movie, but will also feature a completely original story.

entries.title: Sci-Fi Action RPG "EXODUS", the Latest Trailer of Intense Close Quarter Combat
entries.title_ja: SFアクションRPG「EXODUS」，激しい近接戦闘の模様を収めた最新トレイラー公開
entries.description: ArchetypeEntertainment today released the latest trailer for its upcoming sci-fi action RPG, EXODUS. The video, titled "Breaching Khonsu," shows intense melee combat taking place on orbital defense platforms built by a hostile race.

entries.title: Bungo to Alchemist" recreates Katsudon, a dish loved by Kafu Nagai. My Collaboration Cafe: Menu 086
entries.title_ja: 「文豪とアルケミスト」，永井荷風が愛したカツ丼を再現。俺のコラボカフェ：Menu 086
entries.description: In "My Collaboration Cafe," a series of articles published on the fourth Saturday of each month, Tetsuya Onishi, an active chef, collaborates with various video games and introduces recipes inspired by them. This time, under the theme of "Bungo to Alchemist," he will be making a katsudon (pork cutlet served on top of a bowl of rice), a dish loved by Kafu Nagai.

entries.title: Chronicle of Echoes" is now accepting advance registrations. Key visuals and the latest trailer have also been released.
entries.title_ja: 「無職転生 〜異世界行ったら本気だす〜 クロニクル・オブ・エコーズ」，事前登録受付を開始。キービジュアルと最新トレイラーも公開
entries.description: GREE Entertainment, Inc. announced today that it has begun accepting advance registrations for its new software title "Unemployed Tensei: Chronicle of Echoes" and released a key visual and an announcement trailer. A campaign to commemorate the start of pre-registration has also begun.

entries.title: New Life Sim "Lili's World" is all about healing. Enjoy a freewheeling life with cute residents in a miniature world [PR].
entries.title_ja: 新作ライフシム「リリのワールド」は癒しに全振り。ミニチュアな世界を舞台に可愛らしい住人たちと自由気ままな生活を楽しめる【PR】
entries.description: LilliLandiaGames' newest title, "Lilli's World," is a healing-focused life simulation game set in a miniaturized world. A multitude of activities await the player, as well as a highly flexible sandbox element.

entries.title: Report on the rehearsal of "Hipstep: Fling Posse & Matenro feat. Onigawara Bombers & D4". The characters' births and secrets are revealed.

entries.description: The new performance of the stage "Hipstep" based on "Hypnosis Mike" opened at THEATERMILANO-Za on March 27, 2026, with two different productions, secrets of the characters, and a live part full of excitement.

entries.title: Spring 2026 anime to begin airing today, March 28 (Saturday).
entries.title_ja: 本日3月28日（土）放送開始の2026年春アニメ
entries.description: Here is a summary of information on new anime that will start airing today, March 28 (Saturday). Comic Natalie is currently publishing a summary of spring 2026 anime works.

entries.title: 100% Doraemon & Friends" opens with a reproduction of a teacher's desk and a giant Doraemon at work.

entries.title: Yuichi Nakamura to play the role of the new "009" in the teaser visual, which shows a generational change.

entries.description: From March 19 to March 25, 2026, the news articles about the anime "Cyborg 009 Nemesis" received the most attention in Comic Natalie.

entries.title: Second season of "Hell Mode" to air from July! Visual depicting a scene from the school version, Takahiro Sakurai as Hermios
entries.title_ja: 「ヘルモード」7月から2期放送！学園編の一幕描いたビジュアル、ヘルミオス役に櫻井孝宏
entries.description: The 2nd Season of the TV anime "Hell Mode: A gamer who likes to play through and through will be a Musou in a different world with an abandoned setting" will start airing in July. Additional cast members, key visuals, and a teaser PV have all been released.

entries.title: TV Anime "Choujou Senpai! Choujou Senpai" to begin airing in October, setting drawings of Choujou Meguru & Ippongi Sunao revealed.

entries.description: The TV anime "Choujou Senpai," written by Shun Numah, will be aired on Fuji Television's new anime slot "Tue Anibal! Chojo Senpai", a TV anime written by Hayao Numa, will start airing in October in Fuji Television's new anime slot "Tue Anibal! Fuji Television's new anime slot "Tue Anibal! The main character, Choujou Meguru, and his partner, Ippongi Nao, have been revealed in character drawing.

entries.description: Those who pre-order the deluxe version on Xbox will also receive a 72-hour advance access bonus.

entries.title: GSI Creos "Water-based Hobby Color Thawing Solution Extra Large 400ml" etc.: Amazon Hobby "Tools & Parts Items" Popularity Ranking (March 27, 2026 Edition)

entries.description: Tools & Parts items such as "Water-based Hobby Color Thawing Solution Extra Large 400ml" that had a high rate of increase in popularity on Amazon.jp as of March 27, 2026 at 5:30pm! #Plastic model #Tools

entries.title: Create your own original animals by freely combining their bodies, legs, and other parts! Animal Kumitate Biscuit," an assembling type biscuit, is now available at the confectionery counter!
entries.title_ja: からだや足などを自由に組み合わせてオリジナルの動物を作ろう！組み立て型ビスケット「どうぶつくみたてビスケット」がお菓子売り場に登場！
entries.description: Shokugan "Dobutsu Kumitate Biscuit" is now available in the confectionery section! There are a total of 102 types of cookies that can be combined to create a variety of animal bodies, paws, and other shapes! #Animals Assemble Biscuits

entries.title: The flashy stage begins! The figure is based on the official illustration of "Azur Lane Guam Charming Staging" (newly photographed for the Amiami exhibit)!
entries.title_ja: ド派手なステージが始まる!?「アズールレーン グアム チャーミング・ステージング」【あみあみ展示撮り下ろし】公式イラストをフィギュアで再現！
entries.description: Max Factory will be releasing a 1/7th scale figure of Guam Charming Staging in March 2027. This is a figure of the Union-affiliated super cruiser "Guam" from Yostar's smartphone game "Azure Lane".

entries.title: Ichiban Kuji Lottery Golden Kamui: The Battle for the Golden Nugget" goes on sale sequentially from today!
entries.title_ja: 「一番くじ ゴールデンカムイ ～金塊争奪戦～」本日より順次発売！
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release "Ichiban Kuji Lottery Golden Kamui -Kinzoku Sensen-", a no-hazure character lottery, at Lawson, Ministop, other convenience stores, bookstores, hobby stores, some drug stores, and Ichiban Kuji Lottery official stores from March 28, 2012. The price will be 850 yen per ticket.

entries.title: Reproduction of the fluffy fur! Chopper from the live-action version of "ONE PIECE" Season 2 is now a movable figure from Hot Toys in a big size of approximately 50 cm in height! Now accepting pre-orders at Rakuten Books!
entries.title_ja: モフモフな毛並みを再現！実写版『ONE PIECE』シーズン2よりチョッパーが全高約50センチのビッグサイズでホットトイズから可動フィギュア化！楽天ブックスで予約受付中！
entries.description: Chopper from Netflix's live-action "ONE PIECE" Season 2 is now available as a big size figure! A wide range of poses and facial expressions can be changed! Now accepting pre-orders at Rakuten Books! #onepiece #onepix #onepix #onepix #onepix #onepix #onepix #onepix #onepix

entries.title: Gacha "Shoulder Zun Fig. Hi-Q! Seifuku Aoba Jyosei, Owl Valley Gakuen" to be released in mid-April, with a lineup of 4 types including Toru Oikawa and others in Seifuku.
entries.title_ja: ガチャ「肩ズンFig. ハイキュー!! 制服 青葉城西・梟谷学園」4月中旬発売制服姿の及川 徹たち全4種がラインナップ
entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts will release a gacha product "Shoulder Zun Fig. Hi-Q! School Uniform Aoba Jyosei, Owl Valley Academy" will be released in mid-April. The price is 400 yen per unit.

entries.title: Enjoy summer a little earlier! Yumia's Atelier: The Alchemist and the Land of Illusion - Yumia Riesfeldt: Playing in the Water Ver." [Amiami exhibit, newly illustrated by Benitama, is now available as a figure!
entries.title_ja: ひと足お先に夏を満喫！「ユミアのアトリエ ～追憶の錬金術士と幻創の地～ ユミア・リースフェルト 水遊びVer.」【あみあみ展示撮り下ろし】べにたま氏の描き下ろしイラストをフィギュア化
entries.description: The 1/6 scale figure "Umia Riesfeldt Playing in the Water Ver." is scheduled to be released in February 2027 from Phat Company. This is a figure of "Umia Riesfeldt," the main character from Koei Tecmo Games' "Umia no Atelier ~The Alchemist of Memories and the Land of Illusion~.

entries.title: Her peace pose is too cute! A certain science Railgun T Shokubachi Misaoi Negligee Ver." [Amiami exhibition new photos] replacement parts are also included!
entries.title_ja: ピースポーズが可愛すぎる！「とある科学の超電磁砲T 食蜂操祈 ネグリジェ Ver.」【あみあみ展示撮り下ろし】差し替えパーツも付属！
entries.description: The 1/6 scale figure "Shokubachi Misao Prayer Negligee Ver." is scheduled to be released in August 2026 by Solarain. This is a figure of Shokubachi Misaoi, a second-year student at Tokiwadai Junior High School and the fifth-ranked psychic in the school city, who appears in the TV anime "Toaru Kagaku no Railgun T." The figure will be released in August 2026.

entries.title: BLUE REFLECTION Quartet: Shoujo-tachi no kiseki" will be released on July 30. You can enjoy all four works in the series.
entries.title_ja: 「BLUE REFLECTION Quartet: 少女たちのキセキ」，7月30日に発売。シリーズ4作品をまるごと楽しめる
entries.description: Koei Tecmo Games announced today (March 27, 2026) that "BLUEREFLECTIONQuartet: Shoujo-tachi no Kiseki" will be released on July 30. This title allows players to enjoy the four titles in the "BLUEREFLECTION" series, heroic RPGs that depict the life-size adolescence of girls.

entries.title: Free broadcast of the TV anime "Fate/strange Fake" (13 episodes) will be held on March 29 at 15:00 on ABEMA. The final episode will be broadcast on March 28 at 11:30.
entries.title_ja: TVアニメ「Fate/strange Fake」，全話無料一挙放送（全13話）を3月29日15：00からABEMAで実施。最終回は3月28日11：30に放送予定
entries.description: ABEMA announced today (March 27, 2026) that it will broadcast all 13 episodes of the TV anime "Fate/strangeFake" for free from 15:00 on March 29, the day after the final episode airs. The final episode will be distributed free of charge on the "ABEMA Anime Channel" from 11:30 a.m. on March 28, simultaneously with terrestrial broadcasting and at the fastest speed on the Web.

entries.title: Puella Magi Madoka Magica Magia Exedra" starts its 1st anniversary campaign. Free gacha (up to 250 free gachas) and collaboration with the "Monogatari" series were announced.
entries.title_ja: 「魔法少女まどか☆マギカ Magia Exedra」，サービス開始1周年記念キャンペーンをスタート。無料ガチャ最大250連や「物語」シリーズとのコラボが発表に
entries.description: On March 27, 2026, Aniplex started the "MadoDora 1st Anniversary Campaign" for "Puella Magi Madoka Magica MagiaExedra" to celebrate the first anniversary of its service. Various measures such as a campaign to obtain up to three 5* Kioku and a maximum of 250 free gachas have started.

entries.title: Realistic 1/1-scale (life-size) reproduction of the capital city of Berlin! The Bus, a realistic urban bus sim, is now officially released and available for PS5/Xbox Series X|S at the same time!
entries.title_ja: 首都ベルリンを1/1スケール（実物大）で再現！ リアル志向の都市バスシム「The Bus」，正式リリース。PS5/Xbox Series X|S版も同時に登場
entries.description: Aerosoft and TML-Studios officially released "TheBus," which had been in Early Access, on March 26, 2026, for the PlayStation5 and XboxSeriesX|S versions. TheBus is a realistic urban bus simulation game that recreates the city of Berlin in 1/1 scale (life size).

entries.title: Decorate your rooftop freely with four different themes. Chill Building Simulation "High Above" to be Released on Steam on April 9
entries.title_ja: 4つのテーマで自由に屋上を彩ろう。チル系建築シミュレーション「High Above」，4月9日にSteamでリリース
entries.description: UNIKATLabel announced on March 26, 2026 that HighAbove, a new title developed by DVisionGames, will be released on Steam on April 9. The game is an architectural simulation game in which players create their own ideal rooftop by arranging buildings and props from an empty space.

entries.title: AI LIMIT Infinite Warriors" begins distribution of the DLC "Eirene and the Crucible of War," which takes players on a new journey in a world after the collapse of the church. Bosses are rechallenged and a boss rush mode is also implemented.
entries.title_ja: 「AI LIMIT 無限機兵」，教会崩壊後の世界を舞台に新たな旅が始まるDLC「エイレネと戦火のルツボ」配信開始。ボス再挑戦，ボスラッシュモードも実装
entries.description: CE-Asia today launched the free DLC "Eirene and the War Crucible" for the action RPG "AILIMIT Infinite Kihei". This DLC depicts the story after the ending of the main story and begins a new journey to the northern parish in a world after the collapse of the church. In addition, "Boss Retry" and "Boss Rush" modes have been implemented, and the main game has been updated.

entries.title: ［Interview] Mel Kishida's Unfinished Business with BLUE REFLECTION: What He's Aiming for in "BLUE REFLECTION Quartet," the Compilation of the Series We asked him what he is aiming for with "BLUE REFLECTION Quartet," the culmination of the series.
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］岸田メル氏が“ブルリフ”でやり残したこと。シリーズ集大成となる「BLUE REFLECTION Quartet」で，目指すところを聞いてきた
entries.description: The "BLUEREFLECTION" series features transparent girls drawn by Mel Kishida. BLUEREFLECTIONQuartet," a compilation of the series, has been announced. The anime and apps have been reconstructed as a console game, and all of them have been put together in a single title. We asked Mel Kishida, the game's supervisor, about it.

entries.title: Haragami" releases Luna VI "Sorazuki no Uta, Rinpai--Kiai no Tsubasa" on April 8, 2012. New playable character "Linnea" (CV: Haruka Shiraishi)
entries.title_ja: 「原神」，Luna VI「空月の歌・輪舞--帰逢の翼」を4月8日にリリース。新プレイアブルキャラクター「リンネア」（CV：白石晴香）が登場
entries.description: HoYoverse today (March 27, 2026) announced that LunaVI, the new version of the open world RPG "Hara Shen", "Song of the Sky Moon, Ring Dance--Wings of Return", will be released with an update on April 8, 2026. After the update, "Linnea," the natural science advisor of the Adventurers' Association, will appear as a new playable character.

entries.title: Uma Musume", the official live broadcast "Paca Live TV' #1", reveals new information such as new training Uma Musume. Story Event "Kimi Aru, Haru" will start on March 30.
entries.title_ja: 「ウマ娘」，公式生放送「ぱかライブTV' #1」で新育成ウマ娘などの新情報を公開。ストーリーイベント「君ありて、春」は3月30日にスタート
entries.description: Today (March 27, 2026), Cygames released a lot of new information on the official live broadcast "Paka Live TV'#1" of their cross-media content "Uma Musume Pretty Derby". In the program, these new information were not only introduced in order, but also explained in connection with the actual horse racing situation.

entries.title: Sharp's crowdfunding campaign for its lightweight VR HMD, Xrostella VR1, has begun. Prices start at approx. 200,000 yen.
entries.title_ja: シャープの軽量VR HMD「Xrostella VR1」のクラウドファンディングキャンペーンがはじまる。価格は約20万円から
entries.description: On March 27, 2026, Sharp launched a crowdfunding campaign for the XrostellaVR1, a lightweight VR head-mounted display weighing approximately 198g. The early bird discount price on the crowdfunding site "GREENFUNDING" starts at 199,900 yen.

entries.title: Crime Scene Cleaner, the "overwhelmingly popular" crime scene cleanup sim, delivers a major update, "ACT 2," which brings the story to a finale.
entries.title_ja: “圧倒的に好評”な犯罪現場清掃シム「Crime Scene Cleaner」，物語がフィナーレを迎える大型アップデート“ACT 2”を配信
entries.description: PresidentStudio released ACT2, a free major update to CrimeSceneCleaner, on March 26, 2026. Five new missions with new storylines have been added, and the story of Kovalsky will finally reach its grand finale.

entries.title: He is detained in a special detention center on suspicion of abusing his psychic powers and survives under observation for 31 days. New title "窥视" is now available.
entries.title_ja: 超能力乱用の疑いで特殊拘置所に収容，31日間の観察下で生き延びる。新作タイトル「窥视」発売開始
entries.description: SenYustudio released its new title "窥视" on March 27, 2026. The game is a narrative-driven adventure game about the fate of the protagonist, who is undergoing 31 days of observation in a special detention center over the use of his psychic abilities.

entries.title: PS5, PS5 Pro, and PS Portal Remote Player prices increase on April 2. The price of "Digital Edition Japanese Only" remains unchanged at 55,000 yen.
entries.title_ja: PS5，PS5 Pro，PSポータルリモートプレーヤーの価格が4月2日より値上げ。「デジタル・エディション 日本語専用」は5万5000円のまま据え置き
entries.description: Sony Interactive Entertainment today (March 27, 2026) announced that it will revise the suggested retail prices of its PlayStation5, PlayStation5Pro, and PlayStationPortal remote players. The MSRP for the PlayStation5 Digital Edition Japanese-only will remain unchanged at 55,000 yen.

entries.title: Soulmask" is set for official release on April 10, and the large DLC "Shifting Sands" will be distributed free of charge for the first month of its release. DLC received can be kept permanently.
entries.title_ja: 4月10日に正式リリースを控える「Soulmask」，大型DLC「Shifting Sands」を発売初月に限り無料配布。受け取ったDLCは永久に保有できる
entries.description: QoolandGames announced today (March 27, 2026) that "Soulmask" for PC, which will be officially released on April 10, will distribute the large Egyptian DLC "ShiftingSands" for free during the first month of release and launch.

entries.title: Medarotto Card Robot RB", with development cooperation from Seiji Kanai and Keiji Kariya. Achieves both intuitive comfort and deep game play
entries.title_ja: 「メダロット カードロボトル RB」，開発協力としてカナイセイジ氏と刈谷圭司氏が参画。直感的な快適さと，奥深い駆け引きの両立を実現
entries.description: Imagineer announced today (March 27, 2026) that "Medarotto Card Robo Bottle RB Kabuto Ver." and "Medarotto Card Robo Bottle RB Stag Beetle Ver." for NintendoSwitch, scheduled for release on June 25, will be developed by Seiji Kanai and Keiji Kariya as a card game. and Keiji Kariya are participating in the development of the card games.

entries.title: The world is indeed in the era of great harassment! Surviving the Warring States Period when the life of the lord is absolute, "Seiwatare! Takatora."
entries.title_ja: 世はまさに大ハラスメント時代！主君の命は絶対の戦国時代を生き抜け「世渡れ！ 高虎」
entries.description: Kamehachi Yasushi's new serial, "Seiwatare! Takatora ~Sengoku Riinin Rikenka Ki~" started today, March 27, in the Web Zenon editorial department of CoreMix.

entries.title: Character visuals of Fumiya Kurobane and Ayako Kurobane in "The Inferior Students of Magical High School: The Yotsuba Succession Arc" revealed.
entries.title_ja: 「魔法科高校の劣等生 四葉継承編」黒羽文弥と黒羽亜夜子のキャラビジュアル公開
entries.description: Character visuals of Fumiya Kurobane and Ayako Kurobane have been released from the film version of "The Lesser Students of Magical High School: The Yotsuba Succession Arc".

entries.title: A fantasy of the abominable prince who slaughters evil with a shovel instead of a sword and is guided by a strange book.
entries.title_ja: 剣の代わりにスコップで悪を屠る、奇書に導かれた忌み子皇子の断罪ファンタジー
entries.description: Makako's "The Emperor's Seventh Son, but He's Better with a Shovel than a Sword, and He's in Trouble" volume 1 was released today, March 27, by Ryu Comics Unicorn of Tokuma Shoten. It is a comicalization work based on a novel by Fuminori no Ni-chan.

entries.title: Atamotos "The raccoon dog and the fox" TV animation for the 10th anniversary, airing from October!
entries.title_ja: アタモト「タヌキとキツネ」10周年記念でTVアニメ化！10月から放送
entries.description: Atamoto's "Tanuki to Kitsune" will be adapted into an animated TV series, to be broadcast from October.

entries.title: Anime "Unaware Saint" to air in July; Carolina's life begins to change PV released
entries.title_ja: アニメ「無自覚聖女」7月放送、カロリーナの人生が変わり始めるPV公開
entries.description: The TV anime "Mushiken Seijo ha Mushiken ni Tsuiteiru Kyoryoku wo Sagaru Today" will be broadcast on TOKYO MX, BS11, and AT-X starting in July. The first character concept visual and the first PV of the work have been unveiled.

entries.title: The story of Japan, where dungeon management has become a security guard's job, "Labyrinth Security of the ARAFOR Security Guards," vol. 1.
entries.title_ja: ダンジョン管理が警備員の仕事になった日本の物語「アラフォー警備員の迷宮警備」1巻
entries.description: Nao Mizusawa's "Labyrinth Security for Arahoshi Security Guards: Surviving the Wiz Dungeon Era with the Power of [Abilities]" volume 1 was released today, March 27, from Ryu Comics Unicorn of Tokuma Shoten. It is a comicalization work based on a novel by Ka Nichinan.

entries.title: Collaboration between the anime "Dundadan" and F1 team Williams
entries.title_ja: アニメ「ダンダダン」とF1チーム・ウィリアムズがコラボ
entries.description: Dundadan" TV animation and Atlassian Williams F1 Team collaborate. Tokyo-based brand UNDONE will play a central role in the planning and conception of the project, which will include several categories of items in addition to wristwatches.

entries.title: A pimp man arrives at a strange young man's house, a love story new series "Heaven in the Palm of Your Hand
entries.title_ja: ヒモ男が辿り着いたのは見知らぬ青年の家、ラブストーリー新連載「手のひらの天国」
entries.description: A new serial by Ru1mm, "Palm of the Hand Heaven," started today, March 27, on Futabasha's web action.

entries.title: PC (Steam) game "Dolls Nest" to be comicalized!　The first episode of "Dolls Nest: ORPHANS" will be published in the online magazine "Young Ace UP" today, Friday, March 27!
entries.title_ja: PC(Steam)ゲーム『Dolls Nest』コミカライズ決定！　「Dolls Nest: ORPHANS」第1話、オンラインマガジン「ヤングエースUP」に本日3/27(金)掲載!!
entries.description: Nitroplus' CG team "Nitro Arts" has planned and drafted a comic book adaptation of the customized 3D action game "Dolls Nest" for PC, which is currently on sale on Steam!　The official comic book adaptation of "Dolls Nest: ORPHANS" will be released today, March 27, 2026...

entries.title: Banham x Plott's short animation project "Tengu Sword Fight" begins, featuring Shuichiro Umeda and others.
entries.title_ja: バンナム×Plottのショートアニメプロジェクト「天狗刀戦」始動　梅田修一朗ら出演
entries.description: Bandai Namco Entertainment and Plott, a company that plans, produces, and develops IP content for business, have started a short animation project called "Tengu Tousen". The "short" story, which is a side story of the story, started today, March 27, on the official YouTube channel, and the "full-length" story, which goes deeper into the story, will be distributed from July.

entries.title: Yuki Kajiura appears on NHK's music program, singing "Flame" and other ani-songs in the office with LiSA and others.
entries.title_ja: 梶浦由記がNHKの音楽番組に出演、LiSAらがオフィスで「炎」などアニソン歌い上げる
entries.description: Yuki Kajiura will appear in the music program "tiny desk concerts" to be broadcast on NHK General at 24:15 on March 29, 2012, featuring LiSA and others, singing anime songs written by Kajiura.

entries.title: Saiyuki" x Honda Motorcycle: Kazuya Minekura-designed motorcycle tours 5 cities, goods on sale
entries.title_ja: 「最遊記」×Hondaバイク　峰倉かずやデザインのバイクが5都市を巡回、グッズ販売も
entries.description: Kazuya Minekura's "Saiyuki RELOAD BLAST" and Honda Motorcycle collaborate. A pop-up store will be held at SEEKBASE AKI-OKA MANUFACTURE in Tokyo from April 24 to May 24, and will then tour to Fukuoka, Aichi, Osaka, and Miyagi.

entries.title: PV of the fourth season of the anime "Disgusting Pan" full of heroines' disgusting faces has arrived.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「嫌パン」第4期、ヒロインたちの嫌な顔が満載のPV到着
entries.description: The PV of the anime "I want you to show me your pants while making a nasty face R (Returns)" has arrived. It was also announced that the ending theme is "Je t'aime♡Je t'aime" by Mirai Skirt*.

entries.title: Yoshiharu Tsuge dies of aspiration pneumonia at age 88; representative works include "Nejishiki" and "Mutsu no Hito
entries.title_ja: つげ義春が誤嚥性肺炎により88歳で死去、代表作に「ねじ式」「無能の人」など
entries.description: Yoshiharu Tsuge died of aspiration pneumonia at a Tokyo hospital on March 3 at the age of 88.

entries.title: A scene cut from the first episode, which shows a glimpse of Kanan's "cheesiness".
entries.title_ja: 「カナン様はあくまでチョロい」カナンの“チョロさ”垣間見える第1話の場面カット
entries.description: The first episode of the TV anime "Kanan-sama wa Akutte Choroi," written by nonco, has been released with a synopsis and advance cuts.

entries.title: Mentorisama," a horror story about a bloodthirsty family, still country air, and a dark warehouse that is off-limits.
entries.title_ja: 血族に巣食う因習ホラー「めんとりさま」じっとりした田舎の空気、立ち入り禁止の暗い蔵
entries.description: Volume 1 of Itsuki Tsutsui's "Mentorisama" was released today, March 27, by KADOKAWA's Dengeki Comics NEXT. It is a comicalization work based on Kamuri's novel.

entries.title: Commemorating the 60th Anniversary of the Establishment of Diplomatic Relations between Japan and Singapore, Hololive VTuber to Perform at Japanese Professional Soccer Club Match
entries.title_ja: 日本・シンガポール外交関係樹立60周年記念、ホロライブVTuberが日系プロサッカークラブの試合に出演
entries.description:
On May 16, a special event, "hololive production Special Day with Albirex Niigata FC (S)" will be held at Jurong East Stadium in Singapore. […]
The post Celebrating 60th Anniversary of Japan-Singapore Diplomatic Relations, Hololive VTuber to Perform at Japanese Professional Soccer Club Match appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: Is it possible for AI VTubers to have "comfortable conversations"? Yumemina" 1-on-1 Experience Report & Interview with Producer
entries.title_ja: AI VTuberに“違和感のない会話”は可能か？ 「ゆめみなな」1on1体験レポート＆プロデューサーインタビュー
entries.description:
VTuber cultural festival "Buikaru" was held in Akihabara, Tokyo, for three days from March 20 to 22, 2026. The event featured live music and talk shows, as well as booth exhibits by related companies. In the plaza in front of Akihabara UDX, street performances […] were held.
The post Can AI VTubers Have "Conversations with No Sense of Discomfort"? Yumemina 1-on-1 Experience Report & Producer Interview appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: A flash with a Japanese sword! New characters "Hiyuki" and "Danya" unveiled in a video that looks like a cut of their resonance release - attributes and weapons also revealed!
entries.title_ja: 『鳴潮』日本刀で一閃！新キャラ「緋雪」「ダーニャ」の共鳴解放カットらしき映像がお披露目―属性と武器も明らかに
entries.description: The Xbox version of "Naruto" was announced! In the trailer, a scene that looks like a cut of the resonance release of new characters "Hiyuki" and "Danya" is unveiled.

entries.title: The CEO of the developer of "Red Desert" mentioned that the Switch version of the game is still undecided, but "we are interested and preparing for it.
entries.title_ja: 『紅の砂漠』スイッチ版について開発元CEOが言及―可否や時期は未定も“関心を持って準備を進めている”
entries.description: If it does happen, it is expected to be released on Switch 2.

entries.title: Azure Promilia," a new Manjuu game developed by "Azuren," presents a compilation of characters introduced in the official X - kung fu girls and cool maids are also cute!
entries.title_ja: 『アズレン』開発のManjuu新作『アズールプロミリア』、公式Xで紹介されたキャラクターをまとめてお届けーカンフー少女やクールなメイドも可愛い

The winners will be contacted via direct message from the official KAIYODO account.

entries.title: TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026" Exhibit Report (Part 1) Expression without a right answer" gathers at the venue that used to be a school!

entries.description: TOKYOINDIEGAMESSUMMIT2026, an indie game festival, was held at Suginami Science Lab IMAGINUS in Koenji, Tokyo, on March 20 and 21, 2026. In this first part, we will introduce "CYCLIAJOURNEY," which won the TIGSAWARD2026 Grand Prize, and other games.

entries.title: Nostalgic air field hockey with mahou action and rogue light elements. Air Hockey: Yusha and the Mahou Forest", Steam store page now available.
entries.title_ja: 懐かしのエアホッケーにマホウ・アクションとローグライト要素を追加。「エアホッケー ゆうしゃとマホウの森」，Steamストアページを公開
entries.description: HiBiGA today released the Steam store page for the PC game "Air Hockey Yusha and the Mahou Forest". This title is a spin-off of "Air Hockey @GAMEPACK" bundled with Fujitsu FMV series PCs. It is said to add mahou action and rogue light elements to the heated air field hockey battles.

entries.title: Report on the "Sengoku Gourmet Battle" tasting event, a collaboration between Pepper Lunch and "Nobunaga's Ambition: The Battle for the Warring States. Three types of pepper rice themed on Nobunaga, Hideyoshi, and Ieyasu are all excellent!
entries.title_ja: ペッパーランチ×「信長の野望 出陣」のコラボ「戦国グルメ合戦」試食会レポート。信長，秀吉，家康をテーマにした3種のペッパーライスは，どれも絶品
entries.description: The "Sengoku Gourmet Battle," a collaboration between Pepper Lunch and the location-based game "Nobunaga no Yabo Desu," is being held from March 26, 2026 to May 7, 2026. In addition to offering menus named after Nobunaga Oda, Hideyoshi Toyotomi, and Ieyasu Tokugawa, the event will also be linked to the game. This article reports on the tasting event for the media.

entries.title: Professional Baseball FanStars League," a cheering card game for smartphones with "Fami-Star" view of all professional baseball games, begins official service.
entries.title_ja: プロ野球全試合速報が“ファミスタ”ビューで配信されるスマホ向け応援カードゲーム「プロ野球 ファンスターズリーグ」，正式サービスを開始
entries.description: Bandai Card Division today launched the official service of "Professional Baseball Fan Stars League". This is a "professional baseball cheering card game" that combines "professional baseball," "breaking baseball news," and "card battles," and all the actual professional baseball games are broadcast live via Fami-Star View and AI-based audio.

entries.title: Sazae-san Machigasashi" is now available at amusement arcades nationwide. The problems are from the actual broadcast of the anime.
entries.title_ja: 「サザエさん まちがいさがし」，全国のアミューズメント施設にて順次稼働開始。問題は実際に放送されたアニメの中から登場
entries.description: Konami Arcade Games, Inc. announced on March 27, 2026, that "Sazae-san Machigasagashi" has started operation at amusement arcades nationwide. This game is based on the well-known national anime "Sazae-san. The questions are based on the actual broadcasts of the anime.

entries.title: Beta branch of apocalyptic farming sim "Doloc Town" now available in Japanese. Early access to this popular title is finally available in Japanese.
entries.title_ja: 終末世界農業シム「Doloc Town」，日本語版のベータブランチを配信開始。早期アクセス中の人気作がいよいよ日本語に対応開始
entries.description: LogoiGames today (March 27, 2026) released a beta branch of the Japanese version of "DolocTown," currently available in early access on Steam. The game is a farm simulation game centered on DolocTown, a town left behind in a post-apocalyptic world, in which players build farms, grow crops, and construct attractive buildings to revitalize the town.

entries.title: YURAYURAMORI "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE" DORO Action Hobby Collection [amiami].
entries.title_ja: ユラユラ森 『勝利の女神：NIKKE』 DORO アクションホビーコレクション[amiami]
entries.description:
From the game "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE" comes a lineup of 6 motorized DORO characters: DORO, CINDORO, SHIDORO, SYUDORO, PLDORO, and GDORO.
The post Yurayura Mori "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE" DORO Action Hobby Collection [amiami] first appeared on Amiami News.

entries.description:
Chisoku Nishiki" and "Takina Inoue" from "Licorice Recoil" will be sculpted in their respective key visual ver. Both will be released in March 2027. The following is an excerpt from the press release. Product Overview ■Licorice Recoil Key Visual Ver.
The post 1/6 Scale Figures of Nishiki Chisoku and Inoue Takina from "Licorice Recoil" Based on the Key Visual of the Film are open for reservation now! appeared first on Amiami News.

Riamu Yumemi is a figure from "THE IDOLM@STER CINDERELLA GIRLS" based on a card illustration from "Yumemi Riamu Must Do It," and will be released in October 2026. The following is an excerpt from the press release Costume faithfully reproduces the illustration […].
The post From 'THE IDOLM@STER CINDERELLA GIRLS' comes a 1/6th scale figure based on the card illustration of [Yumemi Riamu has no choice but to do it]! appeared first on Amiami News.

entries.title: 1/6 scale figure of Chun-Li from the "Street Fighter" series is going on resale! The figure is a faithful reproduction of the Okusuri Notebook illustration, directly supervised by Akiman! Now accepting pre-orders at Rakuten Books!
entries.title_ja: 「ストリートファイター」シリーズの春麗の1/6スケールフィギュアが再販！おくすり手帳イラストをあきまん氏直接監修のもと忠実に再現！楽天ブックスで予約受付中！
entries.description: From the Street Fighter series, a 1/6 scale figure of Chun-Li is being re-released! The figure is a beautiful figure of Chun-Li taking a break from fighting! A drink bottle is also included to show her rest! Pre-order now at Rakuten Books! #Street Fighter

entries.title: Backpack Battle," a new class based on electrical charges, the "Engineer" is now available. A "Switch Mode" is also implemented, in which the player switches bags with his or her opponent at the end of each round.
entries.title_ja: 「バックパック・バトル」，電荷を軸にした新クラス「エンジニア」が登場。各ラウンド終了時に相手と鞄を入れ替える「スイッチモード」も実装
entries.description: PlayWithFurcifer today released version 1.1, a major free update to its deck-building rogue-lite competitive game, Backpack Battle. This update introduces a new class, the "Engineer," which is based around the "Charge" class. It also implements a new mode called "Switch Mode," in which players switch bags with their opponents at the end of each round.

entries.title: anemoi" has been mastered up. Love adventure game for PC, the latest work from the game brand "Key
entries.title_ja: 「anemoi」がマスターアップ。ゲームブランド「Key」の最新作となるPC向け恋愛アドベンチャーゲーム
entries.description: Visual Arts today (March 27, 2026) announced the master-up of "anemoi," the latest romance ADV for PC from the game brand "Key. A trial version of the game, in which the prologue and a part of the common route can be enjoyed, is now available on the game's official website.

entries.title: Dig, Earn, and Crush! Mining and tower defense game "The Spotter: Dig or Die" to be released on Steam on April 7
entries.title_ja: 掘って，稼いで，ぶちのめせ！ 採掘＆タワーディフェンスゲーム「The Spotter: Dig or Die」，4月7日にSteamでリリース
entries.description: ForkliftInteractive announced on March 26, 2026 that "TheSpotter:DigorDie," a new title in development by PuppyroarGames, will be released on Steam on April 7. The game is a mining and tower defense game in which players defend an abandoned gas station while collecting resources in a zombie apocalypse world infested with a large number of mutants.

entries.title: Plott and Namco Bandai joint project "Tengu Sword Fight" teaser video released. New short animation based on the theme of Japanese sword fights and royal battles.
entries.title_ja: Plottとバンダイナムコの共同プロジェクト「天狗刀戦」，ティザー動画が公開に。和風剣戟と王道バトルをテーマにした新規ショートアニメ
entries.description: Plott and Namco Bandai Entertainment today released a teaser video for "Tengu Tousen," a short animation jointly produced by the two companies, on their official YouTube channel. Based on the concept of "royal battles and Japanese-style sword fights," the film depicts the battles between "Tengu," monsters born from the malice of humans, and "sword punishers," who fight against them.

entries.title: Life at a magic academy led by a commoner girl who is hated by everyone despite being reborn as the heroine of an Otome game.
entries.title_ja: 乙女ゲームのヒロインに転生したのに嫌われまくる、平民少女が送る魔法学園生活
entries.description: Yoshiko Murase's "Reincarnated as a heroine of an Otome game, but already a villainous daughter was pampered - I give up on love and master magic! -" volume 1 was released today, March 26, 2012. It is a comicalized school story based on Sakurada's novel, and is currently serialized on Akita Shoten's web manga site, Yanchan Web.

entries.title: Magical★Explorer" to be adapted into a TV anime this fall, with Nobunaga Shimazaki playing the role of Takine, and a PV also released.
entries.title_ja: 「マジカル★エクスプローラー」今秋TVアニメ化　瀧音役は島﨑信長、PVも公開
entries.description: Irisu's novel "Magical★Explorer: Reincarnated as a friend character from an erotic game, but using game knowledge to live freely" will be adapted into a TV anime. It will be broadcast in the fall of 2026 under the title "Magical★Explorer. The teaser PV and teaser visual of the work have also been unveiled.

entries.title: Production of anime "MF Ghost" Final Season decided, teaser visual and PV released.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「MFゴースト」Final Season制作決定、ティザービジュアル＆PV公開
entries.description: Production of the TV anime "MF Ghost Final Season" based on the original story by Shuichi Shigeno has been decided. A teaser visual and a teaser video have been released.

entries.title: Ine Arinaga's new series "Gods and Humans with One Year to Live" will be published in Elegance Eve.
entries.title_ja: 余命1年の神様＆人間が“まったり終活”　有永イネの新連載がエレガンスイブで
entries.description: Ine Arinaga's new serial, "Kamisama End Roll," started in the May issue of Elegance Eve (Akita Shoten), which went on sale today, March 26. The story depicts a "mazari" (peaceful) life after death between a land god with one year to live and a human being.

entries.title: A fantasy of a "cold-hearted prince" who returns to death after being given a strict education to become king... and who does not understand the heart.
entries.title_ja: 王になるため厳しい教育を施され…心がわからない“冷害王子”の死に戻りファンタジー
entries.description: Tsukushi Ogura's "Till the Cold Prince Returns to Death and is Called the Wise King - It was the Prayer of a Clumsy Marquise that Guided Him" volume 1, written by Sambon and composed by Nasu Amano, was released today, March 26, 2012.

entries.title: DJI announces its newest drone, the DJI Avata 360, which can record all 360° around it!　Available in April

entries.description: DJI has announced its latest drone, the DJI Avata 360, which will go on sale in April. The price is 77,330 yen for the main unit alone. The "DJI Avata 360 (with DJI RC 2)" set with transmitter is priced at 116,380 yen. The "DJI Avata 360 Fly More Combo (with DJI RC 2)," which includes the transmitter, three batteries, and charging hub, is priced at 159,830 yen. The Motion Fly More Combo, which includes the DJI Goggles N3 goggles and the DJI RC Motion 3 motion controller, will be 162,140 yen.

entries.title: Max and Chloe's long-awaited reunion is a heart-warming experience! 　A look back at their emo "history" in order to enjoy "Life is Strange Reunion," which hits stores today!
entries.title_ja: マックスとクロエ，待望の再会に心がざわつく！ 　本日発売「ライフ イズ ストレンジ リユニオン」を楽しむために振り返る，2人のエモすぎな“これまで”
entries.description: Max and Chloe reunite in today's release of Life is Strange Reunion!　For fans, there's nothing more emo than this, but of course it's hard to convey to those who haven't played the game yet. So, here is a summary of the changes in their relationship up to this point, with spoilers.

entries.title: The Eternal Life of Goldman" demo version for Xbox is available today.
entries.title_ja: 「The Eternal Life of Goldman」のXbox向け体験版が本日より配信開始
entries.description: THQNordic announced today (March 27, 2026) on its "XboxPartnerPreview" information show that a demo version of its new platform action "TheEternalLifeofGoldman" will be available for Xbox starting today.

entries.title: Alien Deathstorm" is a fierce battle against aliens in an alien colony where a storm is raging. Rebellion, creator of "Sniper Elite," announces new game "Alien Deathstorm
entries.title_ja: 嵐が吹き荒れる異星のコロニーを舞台に，エイリアンとの激闘が繰り広げられる。「Sniper Elite」を手がけたRebellionが贈る新作「Alien Deathstorm」発表
entries.description: Rebellion announced its new title, AlienDeathstorm, during the XboxPartnerPreview information show on March 27, 2026. The game is set in a devastated alien colony, where players must find a way to survive while fighting off terrifying aliens.

entries.title: Forever Ago, a road trip adventure that traces the protagonist's memories, will be released in the fall of 2026.
entries.title_ja: 主人公の記憶をたどるロードトリップアドベンチャー「Forever Ago」が2026年秋に発売

entries.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2's first major expansion DLC, "Cost of Hope," will be available this summer. Over 20 hours of conflict between Duty and Freedom.
entries.title_ja: 「S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2」初の大型拡張DLC「Cost of Hope」が今夏配信決定。デューティーとフリーダムの対立を描く20時間超の物語
entries.description: On March 27, 2026, at 2:00 PM, XboxPartnerPreview announced the first major expansion content "CostofHope" for GSCGameWorld's survival FPS "S.T.A.L.K.E.R.2:HeartofChornobyl". The distribution date is scheduled for the summer of 2026. The distribution date is scheduled for the summer of 2026.

entries.title: Dispatch, an adventure set at a hero dispatch agency, will be released this summer on Xbox.

entries.description: AdHocStudio announced today (March 27) on its "XboxPartnerPreview" information show that "Dispatch," an adventure set at a superhero dispatch agency, will be released this summer on Xbox.

entries.title: An AI robot detective takes on the case of the disappearance of the human race, leaving only one child behind. New title "Artificial Detective" unveils its first trailer.
entries.title_ja: 1人の子供を残して人類が消失した事件に挑むのは，AIロボット探偵。新作タイトル「Artificial Detective」，初トレイラーを公開
entries.description: VIVIXStudios announced its new title "ArtificialDetective" during the XboxPartnerPreview information show on March 27, 2026, and released the first trailer video. In order to solve the mystery of the disappearance of human beings, a robot detective works together with a human child left behind to solve the case.

entries.title: The Artisan of Glimmith, a puzzle game about restoring stained glass in a kingdom above the clouds (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)
entries.title_ja: 雲の上の王国でステンドグラスを修復するパズルゲーム「The Artisan of Glimmith」（ほぼ日 インディーPick Up！）
entries.description: Today's "Almost a Day Indie PickUp!" introduces "TheArtisanofGlimmith," a puzzle game in which you take on the role of a stained glass artisan in a kingdom above the clouds. While the game is simple in that you draw shapes on a grid and fill them in, there are more than 20 different rules to keep you occupied.

entries.title: Capture the exciting adventures in the world of the animated show "Bluey. New "Bluey's Happy Snaps" Announced, Scheduled for Fall 2026 Release
entries.title_ja: アニメ番組「ブルーイ」の世界で，わくわくの冒険を撮影しよう。新作「Bluey's Happy Snaps」発表，2026年秋発売予定
entries.description: A new title based on the "Bluey" anime, "Bluey'sHappySnaps," was announced during the "XboxPartnerPreview" information program on March 27, 2026, with a planned release date of fall 2026. While following the world of the original work, this title will allow players to experience its charms from a different perspective.

entries.title: Control time and turn even a second into a weapon. Ascend to Zero," a time-manipulation roguelike action game, is scheduled for release on July 13, 2026.
entries.title_ja: 時間を支配し，一秒すら武器に変える。時間操作ローグライクアクション「Ascend to Zero」，2026年7月13日発売予定
entries.description: FlywayGames announced on its March 27, 2026 informational XboxPartnerPreview that its new title, AscendtoZero, will be released on July 13, 2026. The game will be a roguelike action game based on time manipulation and will feature a variety of applications.

entries.title: The Xbox version of "Hades II" will be released on April 14, 2026. It's so much fun you'll keep dying. The fun of the underworld is worth a look.

entries.title: Moosa: Dirty Fate, a new action game set in feudal Korea, is announced. Combines beautiful scenery with sophisticated third-person action.

The "strolling vlog" video content has become a staple on YouTube. This is a genre that offers new discoveries, such as unexpected stores in a deserted alleyway, or discovering minor aspects of a well-known tourist spot. This kind of strolling […].

entries.title: VTuber "Mika Shikaen" obtains museum curator certification and applies curatorial perspective to her distribution activities.

entries.description:
Shrines & Temples Online, Inc. announced on March 26, 2026 that Mika Shikaen, a VTuber with a spirit animal background, has been certified as a museum curator. Shikaen Mika is a”deer spirit animal” […] with a mission to "convey the charm of shrines and temples to the human world.
The post VTuber "Mika Shikaen" Obtains Museum Curator Certification to Use Curatorial Perspective in Distribution Activities appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.title: oshiparty" iOS version officially released, a simultaneous viewing application to enjoy anime with VTubers.
entries.title_ja: VTuberと一緒にアニメを楽しめる同時視聴アプリ「oshiparty」iOS版が正式リリース
entries.description:
SnackTime Corporation has officially released the iOS version of "oshiparty," an application that allows users to enjoy simultaneous viewing of anime on a single smartphone. Until now, simultaneous viewing required opening multiple windows on a PC or using a combination of a smartphone and tablet "2 […]".
The post Simultaneous Viewing App "oshiparty" for Enjoying Anime with VTubers iOS Version Officially Released appeared first on Mogura VR.

The award ceremony was held today, March 26, at the small hall of Hamarikyu Asahi Hall in Tokyo, and Kohei Asai, the editor in charge of the manga, attended the ceremony on behalf of Kojima. The presenter was Kiko Sono, who won the Grand Prize last time for "Alice, Even to the Universe," and Naoki Yoshida served as MC.

entries.title: Tamiya "Israeli Tank Tiran 5" plastic model reappears in the 1/35MM series! The model features a 105mm cannon and M2 heavy machine gun, which have been replaced by a new 105mm cannon and M2 heavy machine gun, giving the tank an enhanced and fearless appearance!

entries.description: Tamiya is pleased to announce the re-release of the 1/35 scale plastic model kit of the "Tiran 5" tank, which was operated by refurbishing the T-55 tanks captured by the Israeli army! The refurbished and strengthened fearless form is faithfully reproduced! #Tamiya #Plastic model

entries.title: Fine Molds presents 1/72 scale kits of the F-2A and F-2B fighters operated by the Japan Air Self-Defense Force! Single-seat and double-seat types are now available with pilot figures!

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS announced a special re-release of the "METAL BUILD Kempfer" action figure.

entries.title: Undersea Facility Exploration Horror "Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss" Releases Latest Trailer Explaining Information on Surviving the Abyss
entries.title_ja: 海底施設探索ホラー「Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss」，深淵を生き延びるための情報を解説する最新トレイラーを公開
entries.description: Nacon today (March 26, 2026) released its latest trailer explaining the gameplay of its new title "Cthulhu:TheCosmicAbyss," scheduled for release on April 17. In the video, Noah's sidekick, Key, an AI assistant, explains the information players need to know in order to survive in the main game.

entries.title: MONOPHOBIA," a side-scrolling ADV in HD-2D with a story that progresses by solving puzzles and deducing mysteries, opens on the Steam store page.
entries.title_ja: 謎解きと推理で物語が進行するHD-2Dで描かれた横スクロールADV「MONOPHOBIA」，Steamストアページを公開
entries.description: CandidumGames today released the Steam store page for MONOPHOBIA, a PC game developed by Dendrobium. The game is an HD-2D side-scrolling ADV in which the story progresses through puzzle solving and deduction. Players use their characters' special abilities to gather clues, organize information, and get closer to the truth of the case.

entries.title: Report on the 31st AMD Awards Ceremony, looking back on digital content in 2025. Excellence Award winners include "Urban Legend Dismantling Center" and Switch 2.
entries.title_ja: 2025年のデジタルコンテンツを振り返る，第31回AMDアワードの授賞式をレポート。優秀賞に「都市伝説解体センター」やSwitch 2など
entries.description: The award ceremony for the "Digital Content of the Year '25/31st AMD Awards" sponsored by the Digital Media Association of Japan was held at the Imperial Hotel. The following is a report on the award ceremony, where "Urban Legend Dismantling Center," "NintendoSwitch2," and the movie "Exit 8" were selected for the Excellence Award among game-related contents.

entries.title: Success in a world of swords and magic. Power Pro Adventures," an SRPG game for smartphones, is released today. New commercial video "Surprise" is released.
entries.title_ja: 剣と魔法の世界で“サクセス”できる。スマホ向け育成SRPG「パワプロアドベンチャーズ」本日配信。新作CM映像「驚き編」を公開
entries.description: KONAMI today launched "Power Pro Adventures," a new title for smartphones. The latest title in the "Pawapuro" series takes place in a fantasy world of swords and sorcery, and offers a training simulation RPG utilizing the familiar "Success" system.

entries.title: Hypnosis Mike -Alternative Rap Battle- 2nd period" to be released on July 16th, with cards in the game as a bonus linked to the first game.

entries.description: Alt Plus announced today that "Hypnosis Mike-AlternativeRapBattle-2ndperiod" for Switch will be released on July 16, 2026. This title is the second installment of a work that includes the contents of the smartphone app "Hypnosis Mike-AlternativeRapBattle-," which has a story that differs from the original CD.

entries.title: FFBE "Phantom War" Service to End on May 28th. Grand Finale" events to be held in and outside the game.
entries.title_ja: 「FFBE幻影戦争」，5月28日にサービス終了。ゲーム内外で「グランドフィナーレ」イベントを開催
entries.description: Square Enix announced today (March 26, 2026) that WAROFTHEVISIONS FINAL FANTASY BRAVE EXVIOUS GENSOUS WAR will end its service on May 28 at 12:00 p.m. The service was launched in November 2019, and after nearly six and a half years of operation After six and a half years of operation, the game will bring the curtain down on its history.

entries.title: Cotton Rock with You" will be released on August 6. In addition to shooting, the fully voiced adventure part can also be enjoyed.
entries.title_ja: 「コットンロックウィズユー」，8月6日に発売決定。シューティングはもちろん，フルボイスのアドベンチャーパートも楽しめる
entries.description: Success announced today (March 26, 2026) that the shooting game "Cotton Rock with You" will be released on August 6. This time, a total of 10 characters will participate in the game, eight of whom appeared in the previous "Cotton Rock 'n' Roll" game, plus two additional characters, for a total of 16 stages to conquer.

From the "POP UP PARADE" figure series, "Neo Universe" from "Uma Musume Pretty Derby" will be released in September 2026 in "L size". The following is an excerpt from the press release. Product Overview ■POP UP […] The post "Uma Musume Pretty Derby" Neo Universe to be released in September 2026!

From "Azur Lane" comes the "Unicorn - White My Angel - 1/6 Scale Completed Figure," scheduled for release in December 2026. The following is an excerpt from the press release. Product Overview ■"Azur Lane" Unicorn - White My Angel - […] The post "Azur Lane" Unicorn - White My Angel - 1/6 Scale Completed Figure!

entries.title: From the TV anime "Toaru Kagaku no Railgun T" comes a figure of "Shokubachi Misaoi" in negligee! A plushie set is also included in the lineup!
entries.title_ja: TVアニメ『とある科学の超電磁砲T』より、「食蜂操祈」がネグリジェ姿でフィギュア化！ぬいぐるみセットもラインナップ！
entries.description:
From the TV anime "Toaru Kagaku no Railgun T" comes a 1/6th scale figure of Kuriboshi Shokubachi wearing a negligee. The set includes a "Shokubachi Misaoi Plushie" and the individual figures are also available. Both will be released in August 2026 […].
The post From the TV Anime "Toaru Kagaku no Railgun T" comes a figure of Misaoi Shokubachi in a negligee outfit! Plush toy set also lined up! appeared first on Amiami News.

entries.title: hololive Dreams," the first official smartphone game app for "Hololive," has received over 500,000 pre-registrations; "Dot Sunglasses" will be given away when the number reaches 1 million.
entries.title_ja: 「ホロライブ」初の公式スマホゲームアプリ「hololive Dreams」，事前登録が50万人を突破。100万人達成で「ドットサングラス」をプレゼント
entries.description: QualiArts announced today that the number of pre-registrations for "hololiveDreams," a smartphone application being developed in collaboration with Cover, has exceeded 500,000. To commemorate this milestone, a "special truck" with designs of each of the 54 talents appearing in the app will be operated in multiple cities in Japan and abroad.

entries.title: SP(L/R)ITE: Sprite," a short ADV in which cooperation is proposed in a death game, will be released on April 9. Aiming to escape from a room floating in a different space.
entries.title_ja: デスゲームで協力を提案される短編ADV「SP(L/R)ITE：スプライト」，4月9日にリリース。異空間に浮かぶ部屋からの脱出を目指す
entries.description: WakuWaku Games today announced that its new title "SP(L/R)ITE: Sprite" will be released on April 9. This title is a short adventure game in which the player aims to escape from a room floating in a different space. A stone statue "Acreada," who claims to be the goddess of fate, forces you to play a death game of escape, but your neighbor "Gene," who lives behind the wall, offers to help you.

entries.title: Cinematic ADV "Directive 8020", set in the depths of the universe, PS5 Pro Trailer. High-definition and realistic graphics can be seen.
entries.title_ja: 宇宙の深淵を舞台にするシネマティックADV「Directive 8020」，PS5 Proトレイラーを公開。高精細でリアルなグラフィックスを確認できる
entries.description: SupermassiveGames has released the latest trailer for its cinematic ADV "Directive8020," which shows realistic graphics that take advantage of the PS5Pro's performance. The video introduces ray tracing, lighting effects, smoother facial expressions and animation processing. An introduction trailer of the player characters was also released.

entries.title: World of Tanks: HEAT" Video Introduces Four Game Modes, Including 10-on-10 Conquest and 5-on-5 Hardpoint
entries.title_ja: 「World of Tanks:HEAT」，10対10のコンクエストや5対5のハードポイントなど，4つのゲームモードを紹介する映像が公開に
entries.description: Wargaming today (March 26, 2026) released the third episode of "Foundation," a series of videos on the game's official YouTube channel that showcases the appeal of the WorldofTanks:HEAT title currently in development. In this video, four game modes are introduced. The maps that appear in the game are based on real locations.

entries.title: Cooking dungeon exploration game "Deep Dish Dungeon" to be released in fall 2026 with Japanese language support.
entries.title_ja: お料理ダンジョン探索ゲーム「Deep Dish Dungeon」，2026年秋に日本語対応でリリース決定
entries.description: BeholdStudios today (March 26, 2026) released a developer blog for its new title in development, DeepDishDungeon, and announced that it will be available in multiple languages, including Japanese. The latest trailer was shown at the recent FutureGamesShow, where it was revealed that the game will be released in the fall of 2026.

entries.title: MotoGP 26" gameplay trailer is now available. You can check the races in various conditions, such as sunny and rainy, from various perspectives.
entries.title_ja: 「MotoGP 26」，ゲームプレイトレイラーを公開。晴天や雨天など多彩なコンディションでのレースを，さまざまな視点から確認できる
entries.description: On March 25, 2026, Milestone released a gameplay trailer for MotoGP26. In the video, you can check out the races in various conditions, such as sunny and rainy, from various perspectives. Check out the riders' movements that reflect the new physics model and the detailed graphics.

entries.title: Two years after "META=KNOT," virtual singer "Cat The Sappiness" continues to take on challenges, and her new song is a collaboration with BuzzG!

entries.description:
On Wednesday, March 25, virtual singer Neko The Sappiness delivered her fifth single, "Your Own Daybreak". The Sappiness will be recreated in VRChat in April 2024 […].
The post Two Years After "META=KNOT," Virtual Singer "Cat The Sappiness" Continues to Take on Challenges, New Song is a Collaboration with BuzzG! appeared first on Mogura VR.

entries.description: Here is a photo report of cosplayers who participated in the "hololive SUPER EXPO 2026.

entries.title: [March 26, 2026] List of Manga Books Released Today

entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce today's March 26, 2026 book release. Click here to see the list of magazines on sale today.

entries.title: A former hero reunites with a former saint working as a bunny girl and starts a "whatever-you-want-like" business in the big city.

entries.description: Aomi "Former Hero is the Strongest Handyman in the Metropolis, Solving All Troubles with Former Saint Bunny Girl" volume 1 was released today, March 25, by Nova Comics of Ichijisan Shobo. It is a comic adaptation based on a novel by Fumitoki Shikura.

entries.title: First love you'll never see again becomes a VTuber, a love story over 10 years "Nice to meet you #FirstLoveDistributing".
entries.title_ja: 二度と会えない初恋の人がVTuberに、10年越しの恋物語「はじめまして #初恋配信中」
entries.description: Torimura "Nice to meet you #First Love Delivered" volume 1 was released today, March 25, from Square Enix. It is a love comedy that begins with a reunion with a neighbor's sister who was supposed to have died of illness.

entries.title: Production of the 4th and Final Season of the anime "[Mystery Child]" decided, visuals and special video released.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「【推しの子】」第4期 Final Seasonの制作決定、ビジュアル＆特報映像公開
entries.description: The production of the 4th Final Season of the TV anime "[Pushy Child]", written by Akasaka Aka and Mengo Yokojari, has been decided.

entries.title: List of manga magazines for sale tomorrow, Thursday, March 26
entries.title_ja: 明日3月26日（木）発売分のマンガ雑誌リスト

entries.title: Reincarnated Goblins, Any Questions?" Teaser PV featuring Akira and other unique goblins

entries.title: Trailer for the live-action film "Mobuko no Koi," the story of Nobuko, who has been watching the "heroes" from afar.
entries.title_ja: 実写映画「モブ子の恋」の本予告映像、“主人公”たちを遠くから眺めてきた信子の物語
entries.description: The trailer and additional cast for the live-action film "Mobuko no Koi" based on the original story by Akane Tamura have been announced.

entries.title: City Hunter" sequel to be produced and distributed exclusively on Netflix in 2027!
entries.title_ja: 映画「シティーハンター」続編制作決定！2027年にNetflixで独占配信
entries.description: A sequel to the Netflix film "City Hunter," based on Tsukasa Hojo's novel, is set for worldwide exclusive distribution on Netflix in 2027.

entries.title: Kingdom: Decisive Battle of the Souls" starring Jun Shizon as Mongchun, Kaedeju Kamio as Wang Bin, and Kenji Sakaguchi as Wang Bin.
entries.title_ja: 「キングダム 魂の決戦」蒙恬役は志尊淳、王賁役は神尾楓珠　坂口憲二らも出演
entries.description: The live-action film "Kingdom: The Battle of the Souls," based on the original story by Yasuhisa Hara, stars Jun Shizon, Kaedeju Kamio, Kenji Sakaguchi, Ayumi Tanida, Yajuro Bando, Satoshi Hashimoto, and Takashi Sasano. A special trailer using footage from the film has also been released for the first time.

entries.title: Legendary "Sto III" "Backwater Reversal" on T-Shirt! Merchandise with Ken's sticker!
entries.title_ja: 伝説の『ストIII』「背水の逆転劇」がTシャツに！？ケンのステッカー付でグッズ化
entries.description: Now available in the original & EU - that legendary moment is now available in a comic-style illustrated T-shirt.

entries.title: I'll do my best. Dragonkin: The Banished" Official X, the second largest Japanese player population amidst publisher Nacon's business crisis, thanks and resolves to respond to the outpouring of support.
entries.title_ja: 「頑張りぬきます。あさっず♥」パブリッシャーNacon経営危機のなか、日本人プレイヤー人口第2位の『Dragonkin: The Banished』公式Xが応援の声へ感謝と決意
entries.description: Dragonkin: The Banished" is a look-down hack-and-slash RPG developed by Eko Software that pits players against giant dragons and a variety of monsters.

entries.title: Metacritic announces 2025 Publisher Metascore Rankings, with "FFVII Rebirth" for PC and other titles receiving high scores.
entries.title_ja: 最優秀はスクウェア・エニックス！Metacriticが2025年のパブリッシャーメタスコアランキング発表。PC版『FFVII リバース』など各作品が高スコア獲得
entries.description: The rankings are based on criteria such as average metascore, high and low ratings by critics.

entries.title: 96-year-old Japanese gamer Gramma updates her video for the first time in 3 years: "I don't play games anymore" - she is currently recovering from a broken bone.
entries.title_ja: 御年96歳、日本のゲーマーグランマが約3年ぶり動画更新“ゲームは今はやっていない”―現在は骨折からご養生中
entries.description: Granma's first appearance in a long time; users express relief.

entries.title: Pokémon Champions" is a title in which training ends in an instant. It is a title that extracts only Pokémon battles and allows anyone to get to the "starting line".
entries.title_ja: 『ポケモンチャンピオンズ』は育成が一瞬で終わる。ポケモンバトルだけを純粋に抽出し、誰でも“スタートライン”に立てるタイトル
entries.description: Anyone can easily play "Gachi-Competition".

entries.title: Up to 200 players cooperate in an adventure that takes less than 30 minutes, including boss defeats! Rogue-like MMO/ADV "Minimo" announced - Japanese language support planned!
entries.title_ja: 最大200人協力でボス討伐を含む30分以内の冒険に挑戦！ローグライクMMO・ADV『Minimo』発表―日本語にも対応予定
entries.description: An interesting new product has been presented, right from the concept.

entries.title: Demo version of Ore Factory Squad, a 4-player co-op mining and factory construction adventure, is coming soon!
entries.title_ja: 4人Co-op採掘＆工場建設アドベンチャー『Ore Factory Squad』デモ版が近日配信！
entries.description: Resources dug out of the fully minable underground are processed in the factory to generate profit and grow a simple facility into a full-fledged factory.

entries.title: Detailed system requirements for the PC version of "Forza Horizon 6" released - in addition to the latest super resolution technology, Steam Deck and Xbox ROG Ally support from launch.
entries.title_ja: 『Forza Horizon 6』PC版の詳細なシステム要件公開―最新の超解像技術に加え発売時からSteam DeckとXbox ROG Allyにも対応
entries.description: The steering wheel that could be used in the previous work can also continue to be used.

entries.title: Free Basics Action RPG "Warframe" High-Resolution & Smoothed Switch 2 Version Now Available with Limited-Time Offer - "Shadowgrapher" App Coming!
entries.title_ja: 基本無料アクションRPG『Warframe』高解像度＆円滑化のスイッチ2版が期間限定の特典付きで配信開始―「シャドウグラファー」アプデも到来
entries.description: Log in with Switch 2 to get an item pack including a cool fan weapon.

entries.title: Illustrator Satoshi Kuramochi reports his resignation from Square Enix - character designer for "Saga" series, etc.

entries.description: Mr. Kuramochi has worked on many "Saga" series and wrote about his appreciation and determination to the fans and other people involved.

entries.title: The official Japanese version of the remake of the overseas indie game pioneer "OFF" is now available on Nintendoswitch/Steam. Cult title that also influenced "Undertale".
entries.title_ja: 海外インディーゲームのパイオニア『OFF』リメイクの公式日本語版ニンテンドースイッチ/Steamにて配信開始。『Undertale』にも影響を与えたカルト作
entries.description: The official Japanese version of the remake of "OFF," a cult title that had a profound influence on later foreign indie RPGs, is now available.

entries.title_ja: 超現実都市RPG『NTE』グローバル事前登録者数が3,000万人突破！Aランクキャラ「ハニア」のプレゼントが決定
entries.description: NTE: Neverness to Everness is scheduled for release on April 29, 2026 for PC/smartphone/PS5!

entries.title_ja: バランス悪けりゃ崩れるし、空からは隕石も降り注ぐ！Co-op建築シム『Salvation Denied』Steamストアページ公開―プレイテストも実施中
entries.description: You can apply for the playtest through the Steam store page.

entries.title: Amazon Sale] Deals on Iris Ohyama vacuum cleaners. Cyclone cordless vacuum cleaner "Magicalina" Amazon exclusive model, etc.

entries.title_ja: フジミ模型、プラモデル「1/200 装備品2EX-7 戦艦大和 上部構造物セット 特別仕様（インナープリントボックス版）」本日出荷開始！
entries.description: Fujimi Mokei will start shipping plastic model "1/200 Equipment 2EX-7 Battleship Yamato Upper Structure Set Special Edition (Inner Print Box Version)" on March 26. The price is 16,500 yen.

entries.description: Special prices on Iris Oyama air purifiers are available on Amazon. The period is until April 6, 23:59.
