entries.title: Spider-Man in his black and gold suit from "Spider-Man: No Way Home" joins Medicom Toy's "MAFEX" line of movable figures!
entries.title_ja: 『スパイダーマン：ノー・ウェイ・ホーム』からブラック＆ゴールドスーツを着た「スパイダーマン」がメディコム・トイの可動フィギュア「MAFEX」に参戦！
entries.description: From "Spider-Man: No Way Home," Spider-Man in his black and gold suit appears in Medicom Toy's "MAFEX" line of movable figures! Capture the villain with the magical gauntlets given to him by Doctor Strange! #spiderman #MAFEX

entries.title: The "Nishiki Chisoku's Backpack" from episode 13 of "Licorice Recoil" is now available for pre-order at Chara-Ani.com! This practical item faithfully reproduces the "INNU" accent and has good storage space!
entries.title_ja: 『リコリス・リコイル』第13話に登場した「錦木千束のリュック」がキャラアニ.comにて予約受付中！「いっぬ」をアクセントに忠実に再現、収納性も良好な実用アイテム！
entries.description: From "Licorice Recoil," a faithfully reproduced "Nishiki Chisoku's Backpack" is now available for pre-order at Chara-Ani.com! This backpack has the casual design that Chisoku used in episode 13, and is perfect for daily use or a short trip! #RICORICO

entries.title: Fujimi Mokei started shipping plastic model "1/24 ISD5EX-1 Savanna RX-7 FC3S Late Type Takahashi Ryosuke Special Spec (w/Character Acrylic Stand)" today!
entries.title_ja: フジミ模型、プラモデル「1/24 ISD5EX-1 サバンナRX－7 FC3S 後期型 高橋涼介 特別仕様（キャラクターアクリルスタンド付き）」本日出荷開始！
entries.description: Fujimi Mokei will start shipping the plastic model "1/24 ISD5EX-1 Savanna RX-7 FC3S Late Type Takahashi Ryosuke Special Spec (with character acrylic stand)" on March 26. The price is 3,960 yen.

entries.title: The bust of a busty woman is a nail-biter! Mika Aizono Midnight Groove Ver." by Gomashio Ponzu is now available as a 1/6 scale figure! Now accepting pre-orders at Rakuten Books!
entries.title_ja: 豊満バストに釘付け！ごましおポン酢氏の「愛園みか ミッドナイト・グルーヴVer.」が1/6スケールフィギュア化！楽天ブックスで予約受付中！
entries.description: Gomashio Ponzu's original character "Mika Aizono Midnight Groove Ver." is now available as a 1/6 scale figure! A bonus tapestry with the original illustration is included in the luxury edition! Pre-order now at Rakuten Books! #Gomashio Ponzu

entries.title: Hasegawa has released a 360° product video of the car kit "Nissan Laurel HT 2000SGX (KHC130) Late Model (1973)" on YouTube! Behold the "custom version" with many new parts added!
entries.title_ja: ハセガワがカーキット「ニッサン ローレル HT 2000SGX（KHC130）後期型（1973）」の360°製品動画をYouTubeで公開！新規パーツが多数追加された“カスタム仕様”の姿を見よ！
entries.description: Hasegawa has produced a limited edition kit of the "Nissan Laurel HT 2000SGX (KHC130) Late Model (1973)" in a custom specification that emphasizes driving! Check out the video of the finished model, which includes many new parts such as the front spoiler, from all 360° angles! #hasegawa #plastic model

entries.title: Aerial drone photography】Drone "DJI Mini 2 SE" photographed a crumbling islet floating in the sea!　Let's take a look at the "backside" of the island that cannot be seen from the opposite shore!
entries.title_ja: 【ドローン空撮】ドローン「DJI Mini 2 SE」で海に浮かぶ崩れゆく小島を撮影！　対岸からは見えない“裏側”をドローンで見てみよう！
entries.description: The flying camera "aerial drone" is a tool that fulfills a fundamental human wish: to fly. Flying up like a bird and seeing the world from its unique perspective. There is no other tool that makes it as easy as a drone to enjoy a walk in the sky.

entries.title: Commemorating the blockbuster movie hit, "Mobile Suit Gundam: Senko no Hathaway, Kilkee no Majo" in-depth special issue! The May 2026 issue of "Gundam Ace" goes on sale on Thursday, March 26!
entries.title_ja: 映画大ヒット記念『機動戦士ガンダム 閃光のハサウェイ キルケーの魔女』徹底特集号！「ガンダムエース」2026年5月号、3月26日（木）に発売！
entries.description:
The May 2026 issue of "Gundam Ace" goes on sale on Thursday, March 26! In-depth special issue on "Mobile Suit Gundam: Senko no Hathaway Kilkee no Majo" to commemorate the blockbuster movie hit! Interview with Kensho Ono and more!
 #Senko no Hathaway #The Witch of Kirkee

entries.title: A large plushie of "Hatsune Miku Symphony 2019 Ver." and a plushie of "Hatsune Miku Digital Stars 2024 Ver." are now available from Good Smile Company! Now accepting pre-orders at Chara-Ani.com!
entries.title_ja: 「初音ミクシンフォニー 2019Ver.」のおおきなぬいぐるみと「初音ミク Digital Stars 2024 Ver.」のぬいぐるみがグッドスマイルカンパニーから登場！キャラアニ.comで予約受付中！
entries.description: A large plushie of "Hatsune Miku Symphony 2019 Ver." and a plushie of "Hatsune Miku Digital Stars 2024 Ver." are now available for pre-order at Chara-Ani! The former is a big plushie of about 40cm, while the latter is a more reasonable 17cm! #Hatsune Miku

entries.title: The past and future of the Print Sticker Machine culture will be gathered in Shibuya. The "Our Pre Exhibition - Dear 2025 by Heisei" is a chance to experience the "legend". Attention of all mankind!
entries.title_ja: プリントシール機文化のこれまで・これからが渋谷に集結。「ウチらのプリ展 〜Dear令和 By平成〜」は“伝説”を体験するチャンス。全人類注目！
entries.description: An event commemorating the 30th anniversary of the Print Sticker Machine, "Our Pre Exhibition - Dear 2026 by Heisei" will be held at OPENBASE Shibuya in Tokyo from March 20 to April 5, 2026. Prior to the event, a preview was held for related parties and the media.

entries.title: Management simulation "Sintopia," which aims to punish sinful souls and prosper in hell, will be released on Steam on April 17, Japan time.
entries.title_ja: 罪深い魂を罰して地獄の繁栄を目指す経営シミュレーション「Sintopia」，日本時間の4月17日にSteamでリリース
entries.description: Team17 announced today (March 25, 2026) that its new title "Sintopia" will be released on April 17, 2026 Japan time. In this dark comedy-style strategy and management simulation game, players take on the role of an administrator who controls the bureaucratic system of Hell, and leads a group of minions called "Employees" under his command to make Hell prosper.

entries.title: Remake of "OFF", now available for PC & Switch with Japanese language support. New battle system and elements to improve comfort are added.
entries.title_ja: リメイク版「OFF」，日本語対応でPC＆Switch向けに配信。バトルシステムの刷新や快適性の向上を図る要素を追加して登場
entries.description: FangamerJapan released a remake of OFF on March 26, 2026. OFF is a free-to-play game by creator MortisGhost that has influenced many other games. The remake version includes an updated battle system, new areas and bosses, and other additional elements.

entries.title: Pokémon Champions" pre-release trial report. Brushed-up system for "easy-to-play" matches shines through!
entries.title_ja: 「Pokémon Champions」配信前先行体験会レポート。“対戦のしやすさ”を追求したシステム面のブラッシュアップが光る
entries.description: Pokémon will release a NintendoSwitch version of its new title "PokémonChampions" on April 8, 2026. Although some information, such as the battle format, has been disclosed, there are still many aspects of this title that are shrouded in mystery. A preliminary trial event was held for the media prior to the release of the game, and we will report on the event.

entries.title: Ruiki, the creator of the "X68000 Z," has released photos of a mysterious piece of hardware. The appearance does not give an idea of what is inside, so what is the "next challenge"?
entries.title_ja: 「X68000 Z」の瑞起が謎のハードウェアの写真を公開。外見から中身は想像できず，“次なる挑戦”とは何なのか
entries.description: Ruiki, known for its various reissued hardware products, has released a photo of a mysterious hardware on its official X account. It is said to be the company's "next challenge," and there are high expectations for what it will be. The photo seems to be some kind of hardware, but only the company logo "ZUIKI" can be seen, and no details have been revealed.

entries.title: Zombie Survival "NAKWON: LAST PARADISE", Closed Alpha Test Play Data Released. Approximately 280,000 people participated, and more than 32 million infected were defeated.
entries.title_ja: ゾンビサバイバル「NAKWON: LAST PARADISE」，クローズドαテストのプレイデータを公開。参加者約28万人，討伐された感染者は3200万体以上
entries.description: Nexon today released play data from the closed alpha test of NAKWON:LASTPARADISE, a PvPvE zombie survival game in development. The total number of participants is 279,484, and the maximum number of simultaneous connections on Steam is 37,000. An "infographic video" summarizing statistics during the test period is also available.

entries.title: ［Etranger Overlord" is an ACT adventure game that is full of entertainment elements, including a villainess, hell, food, and a musical.
entries.title_ja: ［プレイレポート］「エトランジュ オーヴァーロード」は悪役令嬢×地獄×グルメ×ミュージカルと娯楽要素が満載なACTアドベンチャー
entries.description: Etrange Overlord," which will be released today (March 26, 2026), is an ACT adventure based on a web novel by Sohei Shinkawa (PN. Kitayama Roman), producer of "Ningyo hime of the Kingdom of Mar" and "Makai Senki Disgaea" series, among others. It was developed by Gem Drop and marketed by Broccoli.

entries.title: Mystery ADV "Snoopy and the Exciting Secret Club", gameplay trailer released. It contains about 13 minutes of the first part of the game.
entries.title_ja: ミステリーADV「スヌーピーとワクワクひみつクラブ」，ゲームプレイトレイラーを公開。ゲーム序盤の約13分を収録
entries.description: 3goo today released a gameplay trailer for "Snoopy and the Exciting Secret Club," which the company plans to release on May 14. In this mystery adventure game, Snoopy and his Peanuts friends form a detective club and investigate mysterious cases. Various events are depicted with a bit of dry humor.

entries.title: The Fun Pimps, developer of "7 Days to Die," joins Behaviour Interactive, known for "Dead by Daylight" and other titles.
entries.title_ja: 「7 Days to Die」開発のThe Fun Pimps，「Dead by Daylight」などで知られるBehaviour Interactiveの傘下に加入
entries.description: TheFunPimps, developer of "7DaystoDie," announced today (March 25, 2026) that it has joined the BehaviourInteractive umbrella, known for "DeadbyDaylight" and other titles. To accompany the announcement, a video featuring comments from RichardHuenink, co-founder of TheFunPimps, is available.

entries.title: Retro Rewind, a management sim that brings up a 1990s video rental store from scratch (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)
entries.title_ja: 1990年代のレンタルビデオ店をイチから育てる経営シム「Retro Rewind」（ほぼ日 インディーPick Up！）
entries.description: Today's "Almost a Day Indie PickUp!" introduces "RetroRewind-VideoStoreSimulator. This title is a management simulation in which the player becomes the owner of a video rental store in the 1990s and aims to become the best video store in town while performing videotape stocking and rental operations.

entries.title: ［Interview] "DAMON and BABY" is a touchstone for a new development environment. We will create games with unprecedented approaches to ensure a good life as a developer.
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］「DAMON and BABY」は新たな開発環境の試金石。よき開発者人生を送ってもらうために，これまでにない取り組みでゲームを作る
entries.description: We spoke with Taisuke Ishiwata and Yuji Ota of Arc System Works about "Damon and Baby," which was released today (March 26, 2026). The new action game, which represents a new frontier for the company, was also an effort to ensure the company's survival in the age of indie games.

entries.title: First anniversary of the broadcast of the anime "The Summer the Light Died" is being commemorated with the first music event of the work to be held in July.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「光が死んだ夏」放送1周年記念企画が始動　7月に作品初の音楽イベント開催
entries.description: A project to commemorate the first anniversary of the broadcast of the TV anime "The Summer the Light Died," written by Mokumoku Ren, has begun. As part of the project, the first music event "TV anime "The Summer the Light Died" - Thanksgiving Festival for the 1st Anniversary Spun with Sound and Image" will be held on July 5 at the Bunkyo Civic Hall in Tokyo.

entries.title: Kenichi, the Strongest Disciple of All Time 2" starts at Sunday Ueburu! A story was published in Sunday!
entries.title_ja: 「史上最強の弟子ケンイチ2」サンデーうぇぶりで開幕！サンデーに1話出張掲載
entries.description: A new serialization by Meitoshi Matsue, "Kenichi, the Strongest Disciple in History 2 - Master Arc," started today, March 25, in Sunday Ueburu. The first episode was also published in today's issue of Weekly Shōnen Sunday No. 17 (Shogakukan).

entries.title: Matsuken Samba" is now an anime! Matsuken Anime" will be distributed on YouTube in the summer, and the video will be shown at AJ.
entries.title_ja: 「マツケンサンバ」がアニメに！「マツケンアニメ」YouTubeで夏配信、AJで映像公開
entries.description: A new YouTube animation project, Matsuken Anime, based on Ken Matsudaira's song "Matsuken Samba," has been announced. Distribution is scheduled to begin in the summer of 2026.

entries.title: TV anime "Firefly's Bride" - Lynn plays Satoko, Koki Uchiyama plays Shinpei

entries.description: Lynn plays the role of Satoko and Koki Uchiyama plays the role of Shinpei in the TV anime "Firefly Bride" written by Oreco Tachibana. The second teaser visual and teaser PV have been released.

entries.title: New PV of the anime "Kill Ao" shows the dangerous school life, and visuals of Jyuusan holding a textbook and gun.

entries.description: The second main PV and second key visual of the TV anime "Kill Ao" written by Tadatoshi Fujimaki have been released.

entries.title: Idolatry": Win the Saba competition to debut your beloved idol! A brain-driven idol manga depicting the ultimate "guessing game"!
entries.title_ja: 「アイドラトリィ」サバ番を勝ち抜いて最愛の推しをデビューさせる！究極の“推し活”を描く頭脳型アイドルマンガ
entries.description: Cyanna Yomi is an idol geek whose life's purpose is to promote her beloved guess, Fuwari Tsukishiro. One day, the idol group that she belongs to suddenly breaks up. In her disappointment, she learns that Fuwari is going to try out for an idol audition program, and decides to enter the audition herself in order to lead her to the top. Idolatry" is serialized in Magazine Pocket.

entries.title: A story of the strongest sword saint reincarnated as a beautiful girl maid who protects a young lady by replacing her sword with a broom, volume 1.
entries.title_ja: 剣を箒に持ち替えてお嬢様を守る、美少女メイドに転生した最強剣聖の物語1巻
entries.description: Nomura Eiji's "The Strongest Sword Saint, Reincarnated as a Bishojo Maid and Warriors on a Broom" volume 1 was released today, March 25, by Overlap's Garde Comics. It is a comic adaptation based on a novel by Mikazuki Neko.

entries.title: Buddy mystery "PAX: National Happiness Management Bureau" set in the near future Japan where "happiness" is quantified.

entries.description: Maki Marukido's new serial, "PAX: National Happiness Management Bureau," began in the May issue of the monthly Afternoon magazine (Kodansha), on sale today, March 25.

entries.title: Special reading of "Chiruran" published in Zenon, interview with Hiroki Yamada, star of the TV drama "Chiruran

entries.description: A special reading of Eiji Hashimoto's "Chiruran: Shinsengumi Requiem" written by Shinya Umemura appears in both the front and back editions. The first part was shown in the May issue of Monthly Comic Zenon (CoreMix), on sale today, March 25, and the second part will appear in the June issue of the same magazine, on sale April 24.

entries.title: A woman who is the exact duplicate of his dead best friend, and his life is turned upside down. A new suspense series where love, hate, and jealousy intersect.

entries.title: Celebrating the 40th anniversary of the first issue! Afternoon's first large-scale exhibition will be held in Ikebukuro in July.

The "25 Royal Roads" will be priced at 1,100 yen, and the "Gyakufuda Arc Vol. 1" will be priced at 200 yen per pack.

entries.title: Ami Koshimizu plays Haru in the second season of "Doro Hedoro"; the first season will be available for free on YouTube starting today.

entries.title: The anime "Vs. will air in July! Elementary school gamer Arisa Fujimiya is played by Maria Naganawa

entries.description: The TV anime by Eri Eshima, "Vs. ～The young lady doesn't play fighting games" will be aired in July. The key visual and new cast information have been released.

entries.title: The story of a very strong but zero-communicative otaku girl who unwillingly became a buzzkill and delivered a dungeon.
entries.title_ja: 不本意にバズってしまった、超強いけどコミュ力0なオタク少女のダンジョン配信物語
entries.description: Green "[Sad news] Otaku girl with zero comic power, sinks a dragon with one punch and helps a famous distributor, and the unwilling buzz doesn't stop" volume 1 was released today, March 25, by Nova Comics of Ichijisan Shobo. It is a comic adaptation based on a novel by Otokyu Fried Rice.

entries.title: From the game "Blue Archive" comes a Nendoroid of Kisaki, a member of the Sankai Sutra High School and gatemaster of the Genryu Gate!

entries.description:
From the game "Blue Archive," a Nendoroid of Kisaki, a member of the Sankai Sutra High School and the gatemaster of the Genryu Gate, will be released in August 2026. The following is an excerpt from the press release. You've come, Sensei. Hmmm, nice nerve to make the gatekeeper of the Genryumon gate wait […].
The post From the game "Blue Archive" comes a Nendoroid of Kisaki, a member of the Sankaikei High School and the Gate Lord of the Genryu Gate! appeared first on Amiami News.

entries.title: Masaki Gaillard" from "Tenshoku*Aisle Notes" has been sculpted! A "Smiling Face" face part is included in the "Amiami Limited Edition"!

entries.description:
Masaki Gaillard" from "Tenshoku*Aisle Notes" has been sculpted into a figure based on a pose designed by Haruka Komowata. The figure comes in an Amiami Limited Edition that comes with a "smiling" face part, as well as a can badge with illustration stand, both exclusive to Amiami.
The post "Masaki Gaillard" from "Tenshoku*Aisle Notes" is now available as a figure! Amiami Limited Edition" with "Smile" face parts included is also available! appeared first on Amiami News.

From "Zenless Zone Zero," "Masashi Hoshimi: Kiyosumi correcting the world Ver. 1/7 Scale Completed Figure" will be released in February 2027. The following is an excerpt from the press release. Product Overview "Zenless Zone Zero: Masashi Hoshimi Kiyosumu Ver.
The post "Masashi Hoshimi: Kiyosumi corrects the world Ver." figure from "Zenless Zone Zero" now available in 1/7th scale appeared first on Amiami News! appeared first on Amiami News.

entries.title: ［Play Report] Up to 4 Players Compete in a Heated Game! Sanrio Characters Smash Festa! is a new type of sports game with simple controls and fun strategy!
entries.title_ja: ［プレイレポ］白熱の最大4人対戦！ 「サンリオキャラクターズ スマッシュフェスタ！」はシンプル操作と戦略が楽しい新感覚スポーツゲーム
entries.description: Up to 4 players can enjoy heated battles in the "Sanrio Characters Smash Festa! where up to four players can enjoy heated battles!　The simple controls make it easy for anyone to play, while the gimmicks and power gauges provide a strategic element. We report on the appeal of this new type of sports game.

entries.title: Destiny 2's annual limited-time "Guardian Games" event. Limited items are also available in the "Magic: The Gathering" collaboration.
entries.title_ja: 「Destiny 2」恒例の期間限定イベント「ガーディアン・ゲーム」を開催。「マジック：ザ・ギャザリング」コラボで限定アイテムも登場
entries.description: Bungie today launched its annual limited-time "Guardian Games" event in the online action RPG "Destiny 2. This year's event is also a collaboration with "Magic: The Gathering," with armor decorations and various cosmetic items themed on the world of the game.

entries.title: Open World RPG "Wartales" Announces Second Large Expansion Pack "Fires in the Capital". Adds capital city Isandrine, new class "Arsonist" and more.
entries.title_ja: オープンワールドRPG「Wartales」，大型拡張パック第2弾「Fires in the Capital」を発表。首都イサンドリンや新クラス「放火魔」などを追加
entries.description: ShiroGames has announced that the second major expansion pack for its open-world RPG Wartales, FiresintheCapital, will be released during April 2026. The new capital city of Isandrine will be added to the game, and will involve various political forces in the city, including the Teaching Sacred Order and the Rebel Army. In addition, a new class, the Arsonist, will be added, centered on the use of fire.

entries.title: Console Archives Terra Cresta, a vertical scrolling STG released by Nichibutsu in 1986 for 8-bit home video game consoles, will be distributed on March 26.
entries.title_ja: 「コンソールアーカイブス テラクレスタ」，3月26日配信。1986年にニチブツから8ビット家庭用ゲーム機向けに発売された縦スクロールSTG
entries.description: Hamster announced today that it will begin distributing "Console Archive Terra Cresta" on March 26. Terra Cresta" is a vertical scrolling STG released by Nichibutsu in 1986 for 8-bit home video game consoles. The player's ship can combine with allied parts to make formation attacks, and the formation can be switched depending on the combination.

entries.title: An analog record box containing 64 songs from "Chrono Trigger" is released today. A code to obtain the songs in MP3 format is also included.
entries.title_ja: 「クロノ・トリガー」を彩る64曲を収録したアナログレコードBOXが本日発売。楽曲をMP3形式で入手できるコードも封入
entries.description: Square Enix released today (March 25, 2026) the music product "ChronoTriggerOriginalSoundtrackVinylLPBox". This product is a 4-LP box set containing 64 original soundtracks from the company's RPG "Chrono Trigger".

entries.title: Tomodachi Collection: Wakuwaku Seikatsu", a trial version of the game, was released today as a surprise. Become the caretaker of a small island and watch over the lives of up to three "Mii" characters.
entries.title_ja: 「トモダチコレクション わくわく生活」，体験版を本日サプライズ配信。小さな島の管理人となり，最大3人までの「Mii」たちの生活を見守れる
entries.description: Nintendo today (March 25, 2026) began distributing a demo version of "Tomodachi Collection Wakuwaku Seikatsu" for NintendoSwitch, which the company plans to release on April 16. The demo version allows users to create up to three Mii and see how they live their lives on a small island.

entries.title: Ultra Monster Zetton's Home Run Derby Game "Zetton's 1 Trillion Degree Home Run Competition" Now Open to the Public. Playable for free from your browser.
entries.title_ja: ウルトラ怪獣・ゼットンのホームランダービーゲーム「ゼットンの1兆度ホームラン競争」が公開に。ブラウザから無料プレイ可能
entries.description: Tsuburaya Productions today (March 25, 2026) released the baseball game "Zetton's 1 Trillion Degree Home Run Race". The game can be played for free from a browser. This is a so-called "home run derby" game in which players try to hit back the trillion-degree fireballs thrown by the Ultra monster Zetton.

entries.title: Urban Legend Dismantling Center" and illustration goods by Bukubu Okawa are now available. Pre-orders are now being accepted at the mail order site "empty.tokyo" and other sites.
entries.title_ja: 「都市伝説解体センター」，大川ぶくぶ氏による描き起こしイラストグッズが登場。通販サイト「empty.tokyo」などで予約受付を開始
entries.description: empty announced today the release of "Urban Legend Dismantling Center" goods featuring illustrations drawn by manga artist Bukubu Okawa, and began accepting reservations at the mail order site empty.tokyo and other sites. Some stores of Amiami and Kotobukiya are planning to start pre-sales from April 28th, and will also offer purchase benefits.

entries.title: Report on "18TRIP" live event "HAMA Tours presents "Omotenashi Live" -Sparkle-" #01. From duo songs to new songs, the audience was captivated all night long!
entries.title_ja: 「18TRIP」ライブイベント「HAMAツアーズpresents “おもてなしライブ” -Sparkle-」♯01レポート。デュオ曲から新曲まで，観客を魅了した一夜
entries.description: On February 21, 2026, "18TRIP" held its first live event "HAMA Tours presents 'Omotenashi Live' -Sparkle-" #01 at Pacifico Yokohama in Kanagawa. The following is a report on the night when the audience was excited by the "Omotenashi Duo Song" and the first performance of a new song.

entries.title: Buying and selling antiques and tarot readings will determine management. Fortune Seller, a roguelike strategy, launches April 6, 2026.
entries.title_ja: 骨董品の売買とタロット占いが経営を左右する。ローグライクストラテジー「Fortune Seller」，2026年4月6日に発売
entries.description: Indie development studio Kiwick has announced that its new roguelike strategy "FortuneSeller" will be released on April 6, 2026. The theme of the game is the management of an antique store, combining the buying and selling of antiques and the effects of tarot cards to create synergy. The game also supports Japanese-language display.

entries.title: Collaboration event between "Atsumare Animal Crossing" and "Tokyu Resort Town Tateshina" will be held from April 18 to July 20. Let's enjoy fishing for salmon, DIY, etc.!
entries.title_ja: 「あつまれ どうぶつの森」×「東急リゾートタウン蓼科」コラボイベント，4月18日〜7月20日に開催。サカナ釣りやDIYなどを楽しもう
entries.description: Tokyu Land Corporation and Tokyu Resorts & Stay today announced that they will hold a collaborative event with "Atsumare Animal's Forest" entitled "Atsumare Animal's Forest x Tokyu Resort Town Tateshina Nature Tour: Tateshina Forest" from April 18 to July 20. This event is open not only to overnight guests but also to day visitors.

entries.title: HOLOLOLIVE" Gundam and Zaku are now "HOSHI MACHI SUISEI SPECS"! CD with Gunpla and collaboration marking stickers finally on sale!
entries.title_ja: 「ホロライブ」ガンダムやザクが“星街すいせい仕様”に！ガンプラとコラボマーキングシール付きCD、いよいよ発売
entries.description: Single CD "No Matter What Happens Now (Gunpla Edition/Conti Edition)" will be released on March 25! Gunpla and "Hoshimachi Suisei Collaboration Marking Stickers" are included.

entries.title: Establishment of Hoshigai Suisei's Personal Office "Studio STELLAR" Media Conference Report - "Mr. Suisei" talks about the future of breaking out of the virtual shell.
entries.title_ja: 星街すいせい個人事務所「Studio STELLAR」設立 メディア発表会レポート―余所行きな「すいせいさん」が語る、バーチャルの殻を破る未来
entries.description: Hoshimachi Suisei announced the establishment of his personal office "Studio STELLAR" at the 8th anniversary distribution of his activities. While continuing to belong to HOLOLOLIVE, he will start arena tours and music activities in earnest, and begin a new challenge to reach Tokyo Dome on the 10th anniversary.

entries.title: Sanrio Characters" adult aprons are all cute! A total of 7 types, including Cinnamoroll & Pochakko & Pom Pom Pudding, are now available at Shimamura's online store!
entries.title_ja: 「サンリオキャラクターズ」大人エプロンがどれも可愛い！シナモロール＆ポチャッコ＆ポムポムプリンなど全7種が、しまむらオンラインストアにて展開

entries.description: A new collection of "Dracula" figures is now available! Pre-orders are now being accepted and will be released on March 28, 2026.

The title is a flight simulation game in which players take on the business of spraying pesticides with agricultural aircraft.

entries.title: Information on "Dragon Quest" 40th Anniversary Commemorative Merchandise Released. Slime plush toys, figures in a special "antique gold" color, etc.

entries.title: Boomer shooter "Starship Troopers: Ultimate Bug War!" that shows love for the original film (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)

entries.description: Today's "Almost Daily Indie PickUp!" introduces "StarshipTroopers:UltimateBugWar!", a boomer shooter in which players shoot hordes of bugs in the world of the movie "Starship Troopers". Players take on the role of Sammy, a soldier of the Mobile Infantry, as he goes on a bug sweep across the galaxy with the full throttle of Federation propaganda.

entries.title: NIKKE: Goddess of Victory" collaborates with Razer. Viper's limited edition costume is now available. Limited quantity boxes will be available on March 30.
entries.title_ja: 「勝利の女神：NIKKE」，Razerとのコラボを開催。バイパーの限定コスチュームが登場。数量限定ボックスは3月30日に販売開始
entries.description: LevelInfinite today announced a collaboration between "Goddess of Victory: NIKKE" and Razer, which will begin after the March 26, 2026 update with a limited edition Viper collaboration costume. In addition, a limited edition collaboration box will be available for purchase, which will include devices such as a headset and mouse, as well as an acrylic stand.

entries.title: Viper V4 Pro, Razer's highest spec e-sports professional wireless mouse ever, is now available. Five different mouse pads with different slipperiness are also available at the same time.
entries.title_ja: Razer史上最高スペックのeスポーツプロ向けワイヤレスマウス「Viper V4 Pro」が発売に。滑りやすさが異なる5種類のマウスパッドも同時に
entries.description: On March 24, 2026, Razer announced the release of the ViperV4Pro, a wireless and wired mouse for the high-end market, and the GigantusV2Pro, a cloth mouse pad, both of which are claimed to be for e-sports professionals. The ViperV4Pro features high specs, including the highest spec optical sensor and optical switches among the company's mice.

entries.title: The story of "Alley Drifters: Saeki Version," in which players move back and forth between reality and dream parts, is now available on Steam. A work drawn with low-poly graphics

This work is a prequel to "Alleyabout Drifters" (Kosho Matsuri version), which is currently available for early access. Players play as Sumire Saeki, a junior high school student, in the real and dream parts of the game.

entries.title: The new "Ichiban Kuji Lottery" commercial "Playlist" featuring Daisuke Sakuma of Snow Man starts airing today. Comments on the filming and highlights of the commercial have also arrived.

entries.title: ［Play Report] Zombies or Humans? Exploring the post-apocalypse soul in the alpha test of "NAKWON: LAST PARADISE," a new PvPvE action game from Nexon.

entries.title: A collaboration video with Ryogo Matsumaru's "RIDDLER" is now available on the "Ryusei no Mega Man Perfect Collection" website. Try to solve the riddles related to the works.

A countdown illustration by Masaya Itagaki, the creator of the comic book version of "Mega Man of the Meteor," has also been released.

entries.title: I have always been frustrated that existing tennis games do not adequately reproduce the tactical depth and variety of real-life rallies." "Tennis Elbow 4," an authentic tennis simulation [developer interview].

entries.description: This is a project in which we interview the developers of new indie games that we are interested in. This time, we present a mini interview with the developer of "Tennis Elbow 4," a full-fledged tennis simulation developed by Mana Games and released on January 23 for PC and Mac.

entries.title: Atlantis Model reissues the 1959 vintage kit of the Helios Nuclear Lunar Module, a spaceship proposed in the U.S. in the 1950s! Reproduction of nuclear-powered rocket, habitable space, etc. as conceived!

Models the romanticized spacecraft plan for a return trip to the moon and other planets and for landing! #Plastic model #AtlantisModel

entries.title: Collaboration between "Medarot S" and Go Nagai will be held again from March 26th. Mazinger Z, Mazinkaiser, Shin Getter Robo, and Devilman Medarot will appear.
entries.title_ja: 「メダロットS」×永井 豪氏コラボ，3月26日より復刻開催。マジンガーZ，マジンカイザー，真ゲッターロボ，デビルマンのメダロットが登場
entries.description: Imagineer announced today that a collaboration event between "Medarot S" and "Mazinger Z," "Mazinkaiser," "Shin Getter Robo," and "Devilman" by manga artist Go Nagai will be held again from March 26, 2026. A total of five collaboration Medalot machines featuring characters from each work, as well as Medalotters wearing limited collaboration costumes, will appear in the event.

entries.title: Pawapuro Adventures" Service Scheduled to Begin on March 26. Let's enjoy "Success," a well-known game in the Power Pro series, in a fantasy world!
entries.title_ja: 「パワプロアドベンチャーズ」，サービスを3月26日に開始予定。パワプロシリーズでおなじみの「サクセス」をファンタジー世界で楽しもう
entries.description: KONAMI announced today that the smartphone game "Power Pro Adventures" will begin service on March 26, 2026. The service format is free for basic play plus item charges. This title is a training simulation RPG that allows players to enjoy the well-known training mode "Success" in the Power Pro series in a fantasy world of swords and sorcery.

entries.title: Dark Cosmic World Created by a Commie God; Sci-Fi Fantasy Deck-Building Game "Voice of Belldona" Begins Beta Testing on March 31
entries.title_ja: ダークコスミックの世界を創り出したのはコミュ障の神。SFファンタジーデッキ構築ゲーム「Voice of Belldona」，ベータテストを3月31日に開始
entries.description: Okasan'sRecipe announced that a limited time beta test of VoiceofBelldona, a new title developed by StoryCropStudio, will begin on March 31, 2026. It is a roguelike deck-building strategy set in a sci-fi fantasy world with a dark cosmic aesthetic. The test will include a number of new cards and new systems.

entries.title: Hokusai Katsushika meets Cthulhu in the book "36 Views of Evil Gods", on sale today. Evil gods of the Cthulhu Mythos appeared in Fugaku Sanjurokkei (Thirty-six Views of Mt. Fuji)!
entries.title_ja: 葛飾北斎 meets クトゥルフの画集「邪神三十六景」，本日発売。冨嶽三十六景にクトゥルフ神話の邪神たちが現れた!?
entries.description: Two Virgins released today (March 24, 2026) the book "Thirty-six Views of Evil Gods". The price is 3080 yen (tax included). This is a collaborative book in which the evil gods of the Cthulhu Mythos are mixed in with the "Fugaku Sanjurokkei" (Thirty-six Views of Mt. Fuji), in which the ukiyoe artist Katsushika Hokusai depicted a magnificent view of Mt. In conjunction with the release of the book, original reproductions and T-shirts will also be on sale.

entries.title: Serekuto Kiss", an easy coupling ADV in which two people are locked in a "room they can't leave unless they kiss", is now available for free.
entries.title_ja: 「キスをしないと出られない部屋」に閉じ込める2人を選ぶお手軽カップリングADV「せれくとKiss」，無料で配信中
entries.description: On March 21, 2026, personal game developer nagainyu began distributing his novel game "Selekto Kiss" on BOOTH, Plicy, and Novel Game Collection. The price is free. The game is an easy coupling ADV in which the player chooses two people to be locked in a "room where they cannot leave without kissing". The player observes what happens to the two people locked in the room.

entries.title: PATLABOR the Case Files," a 3D action game that lets you relive famous scenes from "Mobile Police Patlabor," will be released in 2026.
entries.title_ja: 「機動警察パトレイバー」の名シーンを追体験する3Dアクション「PATLABOR the Case Files」，2026年内に発売決定
entries.description: Good Smile Company announced today (March 24, 2026) the release of its new title "PATLABORtheCaseFiles" for PC (Steam)/PlayStation5 and released a PV. The game is scheduled to be released in 2026. This 3D action game allows players to relive many famous scenes from "Mobile Police Patlabor".

entries.title: NTT DOCOMO releases "Influencer Nurturing Game Bakumore," a free browser game to learn about the risk of information leakage on SNS. Also provides educational materials for use in educational settings.
entries.title_ja: SNSの情報漏洩リスクを学べる無料ブラウザゲーム「インフルエンサー育成ゲーム ばくモレ」をNTTドコモが公開。教育現場で使える教材も提供
entries.description: NTT DOCOMO today released a free browser game "Influencer Nurturing Game Bakumore" on its official website. The game is a simulation game in which you, as a high school girl dreaming of becoming an influencer, increase your followers by posting on SNS. The game has educational and horror elements, and allows players to learn about the risks of leaking personal information that lurk in the photos they post.

entries.title: A true "God game. I Am Jesus Christ," an action-adventure game depicting the events from the birth to the resurrection of Jesus Christ, will be released on Steam on April 2.
entries.title_ja: まさに“神ゲー”。イエス・キリストの誕生から復活までを描くアクションADV「I Am Jesus Christ」，4月2日にSteamでリリース
entries.description: On March 23, 2026, PlayWay released an announcement trailer for IAmJesusChrist, a new title developed by SpaceBoatStudios and scheduled for release on April 2. The game is an action-adventure game inspired by the New Testament that allows players to experience the story of Jesus Christ from his birth to his resurrection from a first-person perspective.

entries.title: JR Tokai's "Guess Travel" and "Poco a Pokémon" collaboration campaign will start on April 17. Details of the implementation are also revealed.
entries.title_ja: JR東海の「推し旅」と「ぽこ あ ポケモン」のコラボキャンペーンが4月17日にスタート。実施内容も明らかに
entries.description: Tokai Railway announced on March 24, 2026, that it will hold a collaboration campaign between its "Guess Travel" and "Pokoa Pokemon" for Switch2 from April 17 to August 31. In this project, users will be able to create original smartphone wallpaper by accessing the campaign site from inside a Tokaido Shinkansen train, and posters will also be displayed.

entries.title: Dragon Quest X Spring Festival 2026" Report. At the stage, the connection with "IX" is officially revealed from the spoiler of version 7. Collaboration with the fourth boundary was also announced.
entries.title_ja: 「ドラゴンクエストX春祭り2026」レポート。ステージでは，バージョン7のネタバレから「IX」とのつながりが公式に明かされる。第四境界とのコラボも発表に
entries.description: Dragon Quest X Spring Festival 2026, a fan event for Dragon Quest X, was held at Tachikawa Stage Garden in Tokyo on March 20 and 21, 2026. This article reports on the first day of the event, which featured secret talks by development staff and guests, as well as the release of new information.

entries.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024" for PS5 to receive a free PS VR2-compatible update by the end of 2026.
entries.title_ja: PS5版「Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024」，PS VR2対応の無料アップデートを2026年内に配信
entries.description: MicrosoftFlightSimulator2024 for PS5, which is currently on sale, will support PSVR2 with a free update scheduled to be released in 2026. The update will also allow users to experience the various characteristics of each aircraft and the overwhelming sense of scale and realism that only VR can provide.

entries.title: MMORPG "Legend of YMIR" for Steam will be released on April 7. The new class "Rune Fighter," which manipulates ancient powers, will be implemented on the same day.
entries.title_ja: MMORPG「Legend of YMIR」，Steam版のリリース日が4月7日に決定。古代の力を操る新クラス「ルーンファイター」も同日に実装
entries.description: Wemade announced today that LegendofYMIR for Steam will be released on April 7. In conjunction with the Steam release, a new class, the Rune Fighter, which allows players to control ancient powers, will be implemented on April 7. A pre-order page for special limited rewards is also available now.

entries.title: Campaign on Amazon offering a 15,000 yen PlayStation Store Ticket and 1,100 yen discount for a set of products worth 1,100 yen.
entries.title_ja: プレイステーション ストアチケット 1万5000円分と1100円分のセット商品が1100円引きになるキャンペーンをAmazonで開催中
entries.description: A campaign to save on PlayStation Store tickets is now being held at Amazon.co.jp. The campaign will last until March 29, 23:59. In this campaign, a PlayStation Store ticket worth 15,000 yen and a PlayStation Store ticket worth 1,100 yen can be purchased at a discount of 1,100 yen. The discount is limited to one purchase per person and will end when the sales quantity is reached.

entries.title: Harukanaru toki no nakade: Ryugu no shinko (In the Midst of Time: The Divine Child of Tatsunomiya)" - A love story spun between Yorihisa Minamoto, who has lost his memory, and a love story. Report on the "Toki-Ku no Ukibashi" event for "Piece of Mind".
entries.title_ja: 「遙かなる時空の中で 龍宮の神子」記憶を失った源 頼久と紡がれる恋の行方。「心のかけら」を巡る「時空の浮橋」イベントレポート
entries.description: Minamoto no Yorihisa, the Blue Dragon of Heaven from the original "Haruka," appears in the "Floating Bridge of Time and Space" event in "Haruka 〜Beyond The Stream of Time〜The Divine Child of the Dragon Palace. We report on the appeal of the episode that depicts his battle with his feelings for the divine child despite his memory loss, the story of the "piece of heart," and his memories of love.

entries.title: Zenless Zone Zero", Ver. 2.7 "Heroes Do Not Die in the Past" was implemented today. Nangyu Hane, the leader of "Mousou Angel," appears as a new agent.

entries.title: 3COINS releases "Quick Shot Bow," a target shooting toy, today, March 23. Shooting Toy with Target" using soft sponge bullets also released on the same day.

entries.title: A newly produced pamphlet commemorating the revival screening of "Mobile Suit Gundam: Char of the Counterattack" is now available for pre-order at Chara-Ani.com, including a set of two A4 metal posters!
entries.title_ja: 『機動戦士ガンダム 逆襲のシャア』リバイバル上映を記念して新たに制作されたパンフレットがキャラアニ.comにて予約受付中！A4メタルポスター2枚セット付き！
entries.description: Commemorating the revival screening of "Mobile Suit Gundam: Char of the Counterattack"! A newly produced pamphlet featuring a story digest, introduction of the mecha, and interviews with the creators and cast is now available for pre-order at Chara-Ani.com! Includes a set of 2 metal posters #gundam #gundam

entries.title: Screamer, a battle racing game with anime-style graphics, launched today for advance access for pre-order purchasers.
entries.title_ja: アニメ風グラフィックスが特徴のバトルレースゲーム「Screamer」，予約購入者向けの先行アクセスを本日スタート
entries.description: Milestone today (March 23, 2026) released a launch trailer for "Screamer," which the company plans to release on March 26, 2026, with advance access for pre-order customers. In the trailer, you can see the characters and the intense racing scenes with the music of "Wagamama Rakia".

entries.title: 50% off "Metaphor: Refantaggio" and 60% off "Persona 3 Reloaded". Steam "Spring Sale" of Atlus titles is underway.
entries.title_ja: 「メタファー：リファンタジオ」が50％オフ，「ペルソナ3 リロード」が60％オフ。アトラスタイトルのSteam「Springセール」が開催中
entries.description: Atlus today (March 23, 2026) launched its Spring Sale for downloadable titles on Steam. During the Spring Sale, popular Atlus titles will be offered at heavily discounted prices, including a 50% discount on "Metaphor: Refantaggio".

entries.title: Iris Odyssey: Pandora's Girl" will be released on May 29. Fantasy ADV depicting the fateful encounter and adventures of a girl searching for her brother and a mage crime investigator.
entries.title_ja: 「アイリス・オデッセイ パンドラの少女」，5月29日に発売。兄を探す少女と魔導師犯罪捜査官の運命の出会いと冒険を描くファンタジーADV
entries.description: Ysnid announced today that Iris Odyssey Pandora's Girl will be released on Steam on May 29, 2026. This fantasy ADV depicts the fateful encounter and adventures of a girl, Fuka, who searches for her missing brother, and a mage crime investigator, Iris, in present-day Shibuya. An original ASMR drama will also be distributed on the same day.

entries.title: Xbox Play Anywhere Showcase report on ID@Xbox's hottest titles.
entries.title_ja: 「Spiritfarer」開発スタジオの新作「At Fate’s End」を初試遊。ID@Xbox注目作が集まったXbox Play Anywhere Showcaseレポート
entries.description: Report on the "XboxPlayAnywhereShowcase" held during the "GDCFestivalofGaming2026" in San Francisco, U.S.A. Let's take a look at the 13 exhibited titles, centering on the new "AtFate'sEnd" from ThunderLotusGames. ThunderLotusGames' new title "AtFate'sEnd" and 13 other exhibited titles.

entries.title: From game-related lectures to exhibits. Free event "OPEN GAME FEST 2026" will be held in Kyoto on July 11. Applications for indie/student works are now being accepted.
entries.title_ja: ゲーム関係の講演から作品の出展まで。無料イベント「OPEN GAME FEST 2026」，京都で7月11日開催。インディー/学生作品の応募も受付中
entries.description: Indie-usGames announced today (March 23, 2026) that it will hold OPENGAMEFEST2026, an offline event for all game developers, students who want to enter the game industry, and game fans, on July 11 in Kyoto.

entries.title: Marathon, the first end content zone, the Cryogenic Archive, is now available. Tense battles and desperate escapes await
entries.title_ja: 「Marathon」，初のエンドコンテンツゾーン「低温アーカイブ」が登場。緊迫感のある戦闘や一か八かの脱出が待ち受ける
entries.description: On March 20, 2026, Bungie unleashed its first end content zone, CryoArchive, in its PvPvE survival escape FPS, Marathon. Located on board the UESC Marathon, this zone awaits players for tense PvPvE combat, gear pursuit, and one-or-die escapes.

entries.title: DISSIDIA DUELM FINAL FANTASY" Advance Download Begins; Video Interviews with FF Series Creators Also Released
entries.title_ja: 「ディシディア デュエルム ファイナルファンタジー」，事前ダウンロードを開始。FFシリーズのクリエイター陣によるインタビュー映像も公開
entries.description: Square Enix today launched the smartphone game "Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy" for advance download. The service will begin on March 24. To commemorate the release of the game, a video interview with the creators of the previous titles has been released.

entries.title: BOATRACE FIGHTER," a collaboration project between "Street Fighter" and boat races, will be held. The first campaign has started.
entries.title_ja: 「ストリートファイター」×ボートレースのコラボ企画「BOATRACE FIGHTER」を開催。全9戦で展開，第1弾キャンペーンがスタート
entries.description: On March 20, 2026, the BOATRACE Promotion Association launched "BOATRACEFIGHTER," a collaboration project with the "Street Fighter" series. The event will be held nine times a year in conjunction with major races. In addition, a "Master-Disciple Match" event for "Street Fighter 6" is scheduled to be held on March 29.

entries.title: MACHINE CHILD," a girl-raising SLG by Asato Oyari, to be released on Steam on April 8
entries.title_ja: 大槍葦人氏による少女育成SLG「MACHINE CHILD（マシンチャイルド）」，Steam版を4月8日にリリース決定
entries.description: On March 21, 2026, Shoujo Knights announced the Steam version of "MACHINECHILD" for PC, currently available on DLsite, will be released on April 8 (Japan time). and other new features will be added to the Steam version.

entries.title: I-PRIVERSE", which is undergoing a major renewal of its live system, will go live on April 2, 2011. Team "Gallmageddon" from "Pripara" also makes an appearance.
entries.title_ja: ライブシステムを大幅にリニューアルする「アイプリバース」，おねがい1だんを4月2日に稼動。「プリパラ」のチーム「ガァルマゲドン」も登場
entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts announced today that the arcade game "I Preverse" will go live on April 2, 2026, with a please 1 dan. The live system will be significantly renewed, and the timing of when players can obtain codecs will also be changed. In addition, three members of the team "Gallmageddon" from "Pripara" will appear for the first time.

entries.title: 30 hours of "Persona 3" music streaming. No archive, one-night-only distribution event starts at 19:00 on March 27.
entries.title_ja: 「ペルソナ3」の楽曲を30時間連続配信。アーカイブなし，一夜限りの配信イベントを3月27日19：00にスタート
entries.description: Sega announced on March 23, 2026 that it will be offering "PersonaSoundStationVol.1:Persona3SeriesMusic30-hourLivestream" from March 27, 19:00 to 29, 1:00. This is an online event to enjoy Persona 3 music for 30 hours. No archived distribution is planned.

entries.title: Uma Musume Pretty Derby" new official program "Paka Live TV' #1" will be distributed on March 27, 20:00. A new corner introducing the racehorse that became the motif of the show will appear.
entries.title_ja: 「ウマ娘 プリティーダービー」新公式番組「ぱかライブTV' #1」 ，3月27日20：00に配信。モチーフとなった競走馬を紹介するコーナーが新登場
entries.description: Cygames announced today (March 23, 2026) that "Paka Live TV'#1," a new official program of the cross-media content "Uma Musume Pretty Derby," will be distributed on March 27, 20:00 on the official YouTube. In this program, the latest game information such as the next gacha update and story events will be shown.

entries.title: Align the marbles, erase them, and unleash your special moves! Now accepting crowdfunds for "Re;MATCH," a board game that combines falling puzzles and fighting games!
entries.title_ja: マーブルを揃えて消し，必殺技を放て！ 落ちものパズルと対戦格闘を組み合わせたボードゲーム「Re;MATCH」のクラファンを実施中
entries.description: A crowdfunding campaign is currently underway on Kickstarter for "Re;MATCH," a unique game that uses a fighting game motif and a console-like cabinet as the basis for a falling-puzzle battle. The game is based on a fighting game and uses a console-like cabinet.

entries.title: Kiln, a 4-on-4 online "pottery" battle game, will be released on April 23, with an open beta for the PC version scheduled to begin on April 9.
entries.title_ja: 4対4のオンライン“陶芸”バトルゲーム「Kiln」，4月23日に発売決定。4月9日からPC版のオープンβを開催予定
entries.description: XboxGameStudios announced that the release date for "Kiln," a new title in development by DoubleFine Productions, has been set for April 23. The game is an online multiplayer "pottery" battle game about creation and destruction, in which players build ceramic armor that changes in play style and abilities based on its shape.

entries.title: A live program to announce the first anniversary of "G-Genesis Eternal" will be distributed on March 24 at 20:00. Gauman Nobile distributed to commemorate the release of "Senko no Hathaway."
entries.title_ja: 「Gジェネ エターナル」1周年情報を発表する生番組を3月24日20：00に配信。「閃光のハサウェイ」公開記念でガウマン・ノビルを配布
entries.description: Namco Bandai Entertainment Inc. announced today that it will hold a "Roadmap Announcement Live Broadcast" at 20:00 on March 24th to release the latest information for the first anniversary of "SD Gundam Generation Eternal" service. In addition, new information on the campaign to commemorate the release of the movie "Senko no Hathaway" has also been released.

entries.title: Announced the establishment of "Studio STELLAR," a personal office of Suisei Hoshigai. While continuing to be supported by Cover, his solo activities will be managed independently.

entries.description:
VTuber Suisei Hoshimachi, a member of Hololive, has announced the establishment of his personal office "Studio STELLAR". From now on, while maintaining the support system of the cover company, his individual artist activities will be conducted independently in the above-mentioned office […].

entries.title: Production of the second season of the anime "Hana Zakari no Kimitachi e" has been decided; Mizuki's school life enters its second year.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「花ざかりの君たちへ」第2期制作が決定、瑞稀の学園生活は2年目へ
entries.description: The second season of the TV anime "Hana Zakari no Kimitachi To" written by Hisaya Nakajo has been decided to be produced. In addition, a PV was also released to announce the decision to produce the second season.

entries.title: Sendai Kaiwai PV and new cast revealed for the third and final season of "Jyujutsu Kaisen" "Shiketsu Kaiwai Part 1".

entries.description: The "Sendai Kaiwai PV" has arrived for the final episode of the third season of the TV anime "Jyujutsu Kaisen" (The Circumstances of Death and Destruction Part 1), written by Akutomi Gedo. It was also announced that Hiroki Toji will play the role of Ishigooriryu, Nana Mizuki will play the role of Takako Uro, and Yukihiro Notsuyama will play the role of Kuroururushi.

entries.title: Crabmeat" crabbing under near-death conditions (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)

entries.description: Today's "Almost a Day Indie PickUp!" introduces "Crabmeat," a first-person point-and-click survival horror game about a prisoner who is forced to go crabbing in the Antarctic Ocean to pay his debts. The game's unique control system, which allows the player to steer the ship and set and retrieve traps using only the mouse, and its unique horror storyline, in which monotonous labor itself becomes a source of fear, are highlights of the game.

entries.title: Turret operation and super-cinematic turning are also possible!　The RC "1/35RC German Tank Panther G Late Type (with dedicated radio system)" is a running scale model! Tamiya's newest photo shoot!

entries.description: The "1/35RC German Tank Panther G Late Type (with dedicated radio system)" on display at Tamiya Plastic Model Factory Tokyo is a product that allows you to "pilot" the "Panther Tank" that was active in World War II. The tank can not only move forward and backward, but can also perform a "super-clear turn," which is unique to tanks, as well as rotate its turret and raise and lower its gun barrel, allowing you to enjoy a variety of actions.

This article will introduce the "Trail Mini 4WD Easter Version (EZ Chassis)" that is currently on display. This product is scheduled to be released on April 18 and will be priced at 1,540 yen.

entries.description: Hasegawa reproduces the plastic model "School Desks and Chairs" which can be combined with 1/12 scale action figures and other items to recreate a classroom scene! The set of 3 desks and 3 chairs each costs 990 yen (tax included)! #hasegawa #plastic model

Includes five new collaboration monsters, including Omegamon: "G" Fusion Mode, which evolves with the Joggles function! Now accepting reservations at Premium Bandai! #Godzilla #Dezimon

Pre-orders are now being taken on Amazon! #jojo_anime

entries.title: Sosai Girl Garden 5th Anniversary Event "Sosai Fest 5th
entries.title_ja: 創彩少女庭園5周年記念イベント「創彩フェス5th」
entries.description:
Amiami News covered this event on March 19 (Thu), before it was open to the public, at KOTOBUKIYA-Hall from March 21 (Sat) to 22 (Sun), 2026.
The post Sosai Shoujo Teien 5th Anniversary Event "Sosai Fest 5th" appeared first on Amiami News.

entries.title: The smartphone app "Digimon UP", the latest in the "Digimon" series, will be released within 2026. Teaser trailer released.
entries.title_ja: 「デジモン」シリーズ最新作となるスマホアプリ「デジモンUP」を2026年内にリリース。ティザートレイラー公開
entries.description: Namco Bandai Entertainment Inc. has announced that it will release "Digimon UP," a new game in the "Digimon" series, an RPG for smartphones, within 2026, and has released a logo and a teaser trailer. The official site has already been opened, and various Digimon elements will appear in the game.

entries.title: Cat and Soup - Magical Recipes", a relaxing, neglected game for smartphones, begins accepting pre-registrations.
entries.title_ja: 癒し系のスマホ向け放置ゲーム「猫とスープ〜魔法のレシピ〜」，事前登録受付を開始
entries.description: Pre-registration is now open for "Cat and Soup - Magic Recipes," a smartphone application that will be a sequel to "Cat and Soup. The art style and atmosphere of the previous title is said to be maintained, while offering new gameplay that can be enjoyed by both fans of the previous title and new players.

entries.title: Interactive AI Buddy "Sulamy" Appears in Dragon Quest X. Report on the briefing session by SQUANI and Google Cloud
entries.title_ja: 「ドラゴンクエストX」に対話型AIバディ“スラミィ”が登場。スクエニ×Google Cloudによる説明会をレポート
entries.description: On March 18, Square Enix and GoogleCloud held a press briefing on the use of generative AI in the game industry, during which "Dragon Quest X's" interactive AI buddy "Sulamy" was announced. How will AI be used in the game industry? Here is a report on the briefing by Square Enix and GoogleCloud.

entries.title: From the Steam Spring Sale 2026, here's another roundup of titles under 500 yen, including Fallout: New Vegas for 110 yen, and many other can't-miss items.
entries.title_ja: 「Steamスプリングセール2026」から，500円以下のタイトルを改めておまとめ。110円で買えるFallout：New Vegasなど，見逃せないものてんこ盛りだ
entries.description: The Steam Spring Sale, the annual large-scale seasonal sale, is underway until 2:00AM Japan time on March 27, 2012. This time, we'll introduce some of the titles available for "under 500 yen". Also, be sure to check out the list of titles available for "under 1000 yen".

entries.title: Digimon Story: Time Stranger", Large DLC to be created. Distribution is scheduled for 2027.
entries.title_ja: 「デジモンストーリー タイムストレンジャー」，大型DLCの制作が決定。配信は2027年を予定
entries.description: Namco Bandai Entertainment Inc. has announced that it will release a major DLC for its training RPG "Digimon Story Time Stranger" in 2027, which was released in October 2025. It is not clear at this stage what the DLC will be about.

entries.title: KAKETEKEGURUI ALL IN" service will start on March 23, and a countdown campaign has started on social networking sites.
entries.title_ja: 「賭ケグルイ ALL IN」，サービス開始が3月23日に決定。SNSでカウントダウンキャンペーン開始
entries.description: CTW announced that "Gaket Kegurui ALLIN," a strategy sugoroku game based on the TV anime "Gaket Kegurui," will begin service on March 23, 2026. To commemorate the release date, a countdown campaign has begun on the official X account and official LINE.

entries.title: Soul of Sole, a new project to meet tap dancers, holds member auditions.
entries.title_ja: タップダンスと巡り合う新プロジェクト「Soul of Sole」、メンバーオーディション開催
entries.description: Soul of Sole," a crossover male voice actor unit project that combines elements of anime, music, manga, and tap dance, has begun. The "1st term member audition" has been announced.

entries.title: Chopper from the drama "ONE PIECE" becomes a fluffy figure, hat removable
entries.title_ja: ドラマ「ONE PIECE」のチョッパーがもふもふフィギュアに、帽子も着脱可能
entries.description: From the drama series "ONE PIECE" Season 2, written and executive produced by Eiichiro Oda, a Chopper figure has appeared in Hot Toys' "TV Masterpiece" series.

entries.title: 100 Kano" third season will start in July. Teaser PV to hear the voice of the new heroine whose cast has not yet been announced.
entries.title_ja: 「100カノ」第3期は7月から　キャスト未発表の新ヒロインの声聞けるティザーPV
entries.description: The third season of the TV anime "Kimi no koto dai dai dai dai dai dai 100 no kanojo" written by Rikito Nakamura and Yukiko Nozawa will be broadcast in July. The teaser PV for the third season has been released.

entries.title: Rena Ueda's request at the final "Censorman" speech: "Me and my mom will be happy."
entries.title_ja: 「チェンソーマン」最後の舞台挨拶で上田麗奈がとある要望「私とお母さんが喜びます」
entries.description: The "Bursting Gyoen" of the theatrical version of "Chainsaw Man: Rezhe Arc," written by Tatsuki Fujimoto, was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, 2012! The final stage greeting" was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, with Kikunosuke Toya as Denji, Shogo Sakata as Aki Hayakawa, Hanabayashi Takahashi as Kobeni Higashiyama, and Rena Ueda as Reze on stage.

entries.title: Seiichiro Yamashita of "Dr.STONE" was so pleased that Yusuke Kobayashi of "Piggya" praised him.
entries.title_ja: 「Dr.STONE」山下誠一郎が喜びのあまり「ピギャー」小林裕介に褒めちぎられて
entries.description: An advance screening of the third season of the TV anime "Dr. Stone Science Future" by Riichiro Inagaki and Boichi was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, 2012, with greetings from the stage. Yusuke Kobayashi as Senku Ishigami, Goshi Suzuki as Ryusui Nanami and Seiichiro Yamashita as SAI took the stage.

entries.title: Maebashi Witches" theater compilation film will be produced! Special video release and mini live performance at AJ!
entries.title_ja: 「前橋ウィッチーズ」劇場総集編の制作決定！特報映像公開　AJでミニライブも
entries.description: Production of the theater compilation of the original anime "Maebashi Witches" has been decided. A special trailer was released.

entries.title: Daily life is transformed over a transplanted giant penis in the comedy play "The King's Crotch Crown Shines," vol. 1.
entries.title_ja: 移植された巨チンを巡り日常が一変、コメディ活劇「王たる股冠の輝きよ」1巻
entries.description: Watanawa Watashiro Watashiro "Kings' Crowns Shine" volume 1, originally written by Mishiro Natsu, was released by Square Enix today, March 21, 2012. This is a comedy drama that begins when a giant penis implanted in an accident turns out to be that of the next head of a famous family that controls the world.

entries.title: Drama adaptation of "That night, I had the boss's child" to be broadcast in April, starring Mirei Sasaki and Masahiro Moritsugu of Super Express.
entries.title_ja: 「あの夜、社長の子供を授かりました」4月ドラマ化、佐々木美玲＆超特急・森次政裕が主演
entries.description: The TV drama "Ano Yoru, Boss no Kodomo wo Materu Shitakatta" by Shiromiya Esu, based on the original story by Natsuno Moisture, will be broadcast on MBS and other stations from April 16, 2012. The role of Shiori Hanai will be played by Mirei Sasaki, and the role of Takahito Seko will be played by Masahiro Moritsugu of Super Express.

entries.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!" 20 kinds of "Sealed Exodia" jackets, millennium puzzle pouches, etc.

entries.description: The TV anime "The case that the innocent and pretty girl who transferred to a new school was a childhood friend who I used to play with thinking she was a boy" will start airing from July on TOKYO MX, BS Fuji, and other stations. entries.title_ja: 「エースコンバット」30周年記念塗装の架空戦闘機「震電 II」をハセガワが1/72スケールでキット化！天神英貴氏によるデザインを新規デカールで再現した姿を完成見本写真で確認！
entries.description: Commemorating the 30th anniversary of "Ace Combat! Hasegawa has produced a limited 1/72 scale kit of the commemorative model of the fictional "Shinden II" designed by Shoji Kawamori and given a new color scheme by Hideki Tenjin! Check out the finished sample photo to see how it looks decorated with decals! #Ace Combat #Hasegawa

entries.title: Steam Spring Sale 2026" - First Sale and Lowest Priced Games. There are also some recommended picks for those who want to take this opportunity to explore new titles.
entries.title_ja: 「Steamスプリングセール2026」初セール＆最安値作品まとめ。この機会に新しい作品を探りたい人向けのオススメ作品ピックアップもあるよ
entries.description: Steam Spring Sale 2026, the first of the annual large-scale seasonal sales held on Steam in 2026, has begun. For those who want to stock up on games they can play at their leisure before their costly new lives begin, we've compiled a list of the lowest-priced and first-sale titles for you this time as well!

entries.title: Yui's HoaeHoae Game Speech: No.261 ""Paranoma Site FILE38: Ise Mermaid's Tale", Impressions up to the middle stage & I want to talk about what I'm interested in in the future" *Spoiler Alert!
entries.title_ja: 結のほえほえゲーム演説：第261回「『パラノマサイト FILE38 伊勢人魚物語』，中盤までの感想＆この先で気になることを話したい」※ネタバレ注意
entries.description: The new "FILE38 Ise Mermaid's Tale" by my favorite "Paranoma Site" is too interesting!　I think I'm probably in the middle of the story.　Yui-san, who has reached the halfway point of the story, will talk about his impressions so far and the mysteries and deductions that interest him in the future. (We recommend that you read this article after clearing the game.

entries.title: ［Interview] "Living on a Deserted Island Somewhere" - A Worldview Linked to Reality - "I.ADORE" R01 Cast Talks about the Story and New Song "ARCANA
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］「どこかの無人島で生きている」現実とリンクする世界観――「I.ADORE」R01キャストが語る物語と新曲「ARCANA」
entries.description: I.ADORE" is about nine young men reincarnated on a deserted island and living together to become idols. Kaoru Mitsuhashi, Katsuya Fukunishi, and Kaoto Udagawa, who play R01 in this work, talked about the world view, their thoughts on the characters, and the appeal of the new song "ARCANA.

entries.title: TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026" is held today. On-site report on an indie game event that connects with the city.
entries.title_ja: 「TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026」本日開催。街とつながるインディーゲームイベントを現地レポート
entries.description: TOKYOINDIEGAMESSUMMIT2026, an indie game event to be held today (March 21, 2026) in Koenji, Tokyo, will report on the atmosphere of the event through a look at the Business Day held the day before. The venue, a former elementary school, is filled with unique games from the first to third floors. Let's enjoy every inch of the venue so as not to miss out on any new gaming experiences.

entries.title: Kenji Iino's new "One-Dot Games" collection of five free games will be released on May 17.
entries.title_ja: 飯野賢治氏が着想した“1ドットゲーム”の新作「ONE-DOT GAMES」のリリースが5月17日に決定。5種類のタイトルを収録した無料ゲームコレクション
entries.description: From Yellow to Orange announced the release of its new smartphone app "ONE-DOTGAMES" on May 17. The price is free. The game collection is based on game creator Kenji Iino's 2009 "one-dotenemies" and includes five unique titles created from a single dot.

entries.title: Weekly Steam Square No. 145: Sandbox Survival "Everwind" and "DEATH STRANDING" for PC
entries.title_ja: 週刊Steam広場 第145号：サンドボックスサバイバル「Everwind」やPC版「DEATH STRANDING」が発売に
entries.description: This week's edition of "Weekly Steam Plaza" brings you information on notable Steam titles and sales that went on sale this week. This week, the PC versions of "Everwind," a sandbox survival RPG set in a skyworld where the sky meets the sea, and "DEATHSTRANDING2," an open world game in which you deliver packages and reconnect humanity in a world that has collapsed due to supernatural phenomena, were released.

entries.title: Customize "W Gundam" and "Zeta Plus"! The long-awaited re-release of the 14th Gashapon "Mobile Suit Ensemble
entries.title_ja: 「Wガンダム」や「ゼータプラス」らをカスタマイズ！ガシャポン「モビルスーツ アンサンブル」第14弾が待望の再販
entries.description: Resale reservations for Mobile Suit Gundam Mobile Suit Ensemble 14 are now available at Gashapon Online!

entries.description: POP UP PARADE Neo Universe L size" non-scale figure is now available for pre-order! The period is until March 25.

entries.title: Red Desert" sold more than 2 million units worldwide in less than a day after its release. Open world action ADV finally released.

entries.description: Available March 20 for PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.

entries.description: MODEROID ZABUNGLE" is now available for a second resale! Reservations will be accepted until March 25.

entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce today's March 21, 2026 book release. Click here to see the list of magazines on sale today.

entries.description: From March 12 to March 18, 2026, the most popular article in Comic Natalie was a news article about the new "Saint Seiya" "Heavenly Realm Arc.

entries.title_ja: 3月20日発売の「RG 1/144 ガンダムベース限定 ガンダムエピオン [スペシャルコーティング]」を撮り下ろし。メッキの輝きが映える！【ガンダムベース撮り下ろし】
entries.description: Gundam Base's limited item "RG 1/144 Gundam Base Limited Gundam Epion [Special Coating]" will be released on March 20. A sample of this item is on display at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.title: Plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Kamen Rider Shin-1" from "Kamen Rider" is released today!

entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release a plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Kamen Rider Shin-1" on March 21. The price is 4,180 yen.

entries.title: HG 1/144 MSN-04II Nightingale [Clear Color]" now on sale!　The large MS that appears in the novel is molded in bright clear red [Gundam Base photo].

entries.description: The limited item "HG 1/144 MSN-04II Nightingale [clear color]" released last August was reproduced, and a completed sample of it was displayed at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.description: From the movie "Mobile Suit Gundam: Senko no Hathaway Kilkee no Majo" currently in theaters, the "Ξ Gundam" that is the star of the movie will be released in April as a new "HG 1/144 Ξ Gundam (Mobile Suit Gundam: Senko no Hathaway Kilkee no Majo.jpg" with new sculpted parts. A sample of this model is on display at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.title_ja: 「遊☆戯☆王」よりプラモデル「Figure-rise Standard Amplified -三幻神降臨- オシリスの天空竜」本日発売！
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release a plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Amplified -Three Phantom Gods Descending- Sky Dragon of Osiris" on March 21. The price is 9,900 yen.

entries.description: Tamiya will release the plastic model "1/24 Porsche 934 Turbo RSR Vaillant" for resale around March 21. The price is 3,850 yen.

entries.title_ja: 「マクロスF」よりプラモデル「HG 1/100 VF-25F メサイアバルキリー（早乙女アルト機）」本日発売！専用水転写式デカールとアクスタ付きデラックスセットも同日発売
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release the plastic model "HG 1/100 VF-25F Messiah Valkyrie (by Alto Saotome)" on March 21. The price is 4,730 yen. The "HG 1/100 VF-25F Messiah Valkyrie (Alto Saotome) Water Transfer Decal" will be available for 770 yen, and the "HG 1/100 VF-25F Messiah Valkyrie (Alto Saotome) Deluxe Set" for 7,480 yen.

entries.title: Fumbari~nu 3" [Gacha Shooting] - Reproduction of doggies' fumbari scenes down to their butts! Huskies and popular small dog Pekinese appear!
entries.title_ja: 「ふんばり～ぬ3」【ガチャ撮り下ろし】ワンちゃんたちのふんばりシーンをお尻まで再現！ハスキーや人気の小型犬ペキニーズが登場
entries.description: The "Fumbari~nu 3" gacha will be released by Takara Tomy Arts in late March. The "Fumbari-Nu 3" mini-figures feature a variety of dogs in a "moment of gusto". This is the third in the popular "Fumbari-Nu 3" series, and is a new creation from the production team that has worked on "SR+," "Genshoku," and "Hobby Gacha.

entries.title: Supervised by a famous film director! Play Report of "John Carpenter's Toxic Commando," an armored car-driven zombie FPS
entries.title_ja: 有名映画監督が監修！装甲車が主体のどろんこゾンビFPS『John Carpenter's Toxic Commando』プレイレポ
entries.description: Kick the Sludge Gods to the curb.

entries.title: Pomeranians are too cute and can be a nervous wreck! New "Pome Awase" limited edition in white and black to go on sale - Pome's love will be tested...
entries.title_ja: 可愛すぎる“ポメラニアン”で神経衰弱!? ホワイト&ブラック限定の『ポメあわせ』新作発売へーポメ愛が試される…
entries.description: Pome Awase-White" and "Pome Awase-Black" are scheduled to be released in May 2026!

entries.title: No need to negotiate, solve everything with a shotgun!　Fight Six Violent Cases with "Seibu Keisatsu Game! Showa/Heisei Retro Board Game Encyclopedia Vol. 13
entries.title_ja: 交渉など不要，すべてショットガンで解決！　「西部警察ゲーム」で6つの凶悪事件に立ち向かえ　昭和・平成レトロボードゲーム大百科 第13回
entries.description: Seibu Keisatsu" is one of the most famous detective dramas by Ishihara Productions, along with "Taiyo ni Hoeero! and "Seibu Keisatsu," Ishihara Productions' classic detective drama. The show's board game based on the show was also flashy and dynamic, and will be introduced in this issue of "Showa/Heisei Retro Board Game Encyclopedia".

entries.title: Report on Nagino Mashiro 3D Talk Live Experience Evolved by Millimeter Wave Communication -- "Presence" Through AR Glasses
entries.title_ja: ミリ波通信で進化した、凪乃ましろ3Dトークライブ体験レポート――ARグラス越しの“存在感”
entries.description: Special 3D talk live by VTuber Mashiro Nagino was held. The talk event using next-generation AR glasses provided a high sense of realism thanks to a communication environment using the latest technology.

entries.title: New "Thomas" Game Can Cause Major Accidents if You Get the Controls Wrong! Become the pilot of the island of Sodor in "Thomas the Tank Engine: The Wonder of Sodor Island"!
entries.title_ja: 新作「トーマス」ゲーは操作を間違えると大事故も！？『きかんしゃトーマス：ソドー島の不思議』でソドー島の操縦士になろう
entries.description: On March 17, "Thomas: The Wonder of Sodor's Island" was released for PS4/5, XBox, and PC (PC version on March 18).

entries.title: ZETA DIVISION Holds Opening Ceremony for e-Sports Human Resource Development School. Why one of Japan's most talented and popular professional teams is venturing into the education industry.
entries.title_ja: ZETA DIVISION，eスポーツ人材育成専門スクールの開校発表会を開催。国内有数の実力と人気を誇るプロチームが教育産業に踏み出す理由
entries.description: On March 19, 2026, GANYMEDE and Vantan held the opening ceremony of "ZETADIVISIONGAMINGACADEMYPOWEREDBYVANTAN" in Tokyo. The school specializes in e-sports human resource development, and is operated by GANYMEDE.

entries.title: Hello Kitty becomes a Heisei gal! Limited edition goods wrapped in leopard print and butterflies are retro cute!
entries.title_ja: ハローキティが平成ギャルに！ヒョウ柄や蝶に包まれた限定グッズがレトロ可愛い
entries.description: Hello Kitty is a Heisei retro tanning gal!

entries.title: Cleaner Company, a space cleaning action game that allows up to four players to cooperate, is officially announced. The latest trailer is released.
entries.title_ja: 最大4人で協力できる宇宙お掃除アクション「Cleaner Company」，正式発表。最新トレイラーを公開
entries.description: Mythwright today (March 19, 2026) officially announced its new title "CleanerCompany" and released its latest trailer. In this first-person cleaning action game, players take on the role of "Star Wiper," an elite cleaning squad, and clean up abandoned space stations and other objects scattered across the galaxy until they look like new.

entries.title: Can AI be a "Pokémon Master? "What are the limits of next-generation AI challenged by 20 million battle data? ......[Topical Paper]
entries.title_ja: AIは「ポケモンマスター」になれる？2000万対戦データで挑む次世代AIの限界とは……【話題の論文】
entries.description: AI's ability to play Pokémon is still not up to the level of human elites, and incomplete information and difficulties in long-term planning are challenges, indicating the importance of complex abilities that cannot be measured by traditional evaluation systems.

entries.title: PARCO GAMES announces publishing of "Finding Polka. PARCO GAMES announced that "Finding Polka" will be published by PARCO GAMES and will be available for trial play at the TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT.
entries.title_ja: PARCO GAMES，「Finding Polka」のパブリッシングを発表。開催中のTOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMITで試遊可能
entries.description: PARCOGAMES announced today that it will be publishing "FindingPolka" by development studio lidlocks. The game is a walking simulator in which a young girl, Friendi, and her dog, Jazz, roam around a rustic world drawn with ballpoint pens in pursuit of a dog that resembles Friendi's childhood dog, Polka.

entries.title: The second edition of "Introduction to CG Design - Fundamentals of CG Production", a manual for 3DCG and video production, is now on sale. Electronic version will be available from mid-March.
entries.title_ja: 3DCG・映像制作の解説書『入門CGデザイン -CG制作の基礎-』第2版が販売中。電子版は3月中旬より発売予定
entries.description:
CG-ARTS releases the second edition of "Introduction to CG Design - Fundamentals of CG Production", a guide to 3DCG and video production techniques
Explains knowledge applicable to a wide range of environments, not limited to software types
Also covers visual expression, photography, knowledge of intellectual property rights, etc.

entries.title: Super Miniplat Battle Mecha Zabungle" released in 2016 has been renewed! The figure has been sculpted with "new armament" together with Walker Gallia!
entries.title_ja: 2016年発売の「スーパーミニプラ 戦闘メカ ザブングル」がリニューアル！ウォーカーギャリアと共に“新規武装”で立体化
entries.description: SMP Combat Mecha Zabungle Zabungle & Walker Gallia Set [Premium Bandai Limited] is available for reservation now!

entries.title: New "Shining Mega" pack for "POKEPOKE" to be released on March 26! New Mega Syncas such as Mega Gengar and Mega Lizardon X will appear for the first time in different colors!
entries.title_ja: 『ポケポケ』新パック「シャイニングメガ」3月26日追加！メガゲンガーやメガリザードンXなど、新たなメガシンカが“色ちがい”でも初登場
entries.description: Shining Mega, a new themed expansion pack for Poke Poke, will be implemented on March 26 at 10:00 a.m! Color-matched Mega-Sync Pokémon will appear for the first time.

entries.title: Persona 5: The Phantom X" and "P5R" original event "When Fates Intersect: Laboratory Arc Part I" are held. Kasumi Yoshizawa appears as a ★5 thief.
entries.title_ja: 「ペルソナ5: The Phantom X」，「P5R」オリジナルイベント「運命が交錯する時・研究所編 前半」を開催。★5怪盗として芳澤かすみが登場
entries.description: Sega today released the Ver. 3.4 update for the RPG "Persona 5: ThePhantomX". In this update, an original event with "Persona 5 The Royal", "When Fate Intersects: The First Half of the Laboratory Arc", will be held, and the ★5 thief "Kasumi Yoshizawa (Violet)" will appear.

entries.title: Cosplay] The flashing tail is too cute and devilish! The holo-live "Tokodome Toi" seduces you with a mischievous smile [8 photos].

entries.description: We pick up the beautiful female layers who participated in "acosta!@Ikebukuro Sunshine City" held on January 24-25.

entries.title: Solo developer tears up at the success of his game - "I don't have to worry about money any more" - as he shares his story of a "very successful" tower defense game.
entries.title_ja: 「もうお金の心配をしなくて済む」ソロ開発者がゲーム成功に感涙―“非常に好評”タワーディフェンスにまつわる一幕が大きな注目
entries.description: Tangy TD" was just launched in March 2026, and the developer shares his joy with his wife over its success.

entries.title: In the latest video from Washagana TV, we show you the LD software presented to us by the 4Gamer staff!
entries.title_ja: わしゃがなTVの最新動画では，4GamerのスタッフからプレゼントされたLDソフトを紹介する様子をお届け
entries.description: Today (March 19, 2026), the latest video of the web program "Washagana TV" featuring Yuichi Nakamura and Mafia Kajita was released. In this video, they introduce LD software presented to them by 4Gamer staff. Various LD softwares, from classic movies to geeky treasures, will be introduced.

entries.title: The Evolution of Dracula Remakes and RPG Storytelling as Seen in "Dragon Quest VII Reimagined"
entries.title_ja: 「ドラゴンクエストVII Reimagined」から見えるドラクエリメイクの進化とRPGのストーリーテリング
entries.description: Starting with "Dracula 3 HD-2D," followed by "Dracula 1 & 2," and now "Dracula 7 Reimagined," remakes of Dracula games continue to seek evolution in step with the times. Game developer Keima Iwasaki talks about the problems and methods he tried to overcome, and about Japanese RPGs.

entries.title: Sugar Butter Tree" and "PEANUTS" collaborated for the third time and will be on sale sequentially from April 1! Cute Snoopy design goods are also available!

entries.description: The third item in the Sugar Butter Tree x PEANUTS collaboration will go on sale sequentially from April 1.

entries.title: City builder "Overthrown" officially released for PS5/XSX|S/PC, where you become a monarch who can lift buildings, kick out outlaws, and run on water to build your kingdom.

entries.description: It also supports cooperative multiplayer for up to six players.

entries.title: Hello Kitty and Kuromi transform into "Ojamajo Doremi" style! Sanrio Characters" collaboration goods are now on sale at Abeille!

entries.description: Ojamajo Doremi" and "Sanrio Characters" collaboration items will go on sale at Abeille from March 20!

entries.title: Coffee Talk: Episode 1" is now available for smartphones, bringing the game that has been enjoyed on PC, Mac, and home consoles to smartphones.
entries.title_ja: 「Coffee Talk: Episode 1」，スマホ向けに配信開始。PCやMac，家庭用ゲーム機で楽しまれてきた作品がスマホでも遊べるように
entries.description: Corus Worldwide released "CoffeeTalk:Episode 1" on March 20, 2026 on the AppStore and Google Play. This is a smartphone version of the narrative game "CoffeeTalk," and the first story, "Day 1," can be enjoyed for free.

entries.title: Twelve songs from "Ongeki" appear in a "very popular" sound game! Collaboration DLC for "DJMAX RESPECT V" will be released on March 26 - 80% off sale on Steam!

entries.title: Finally Released AAA Open World "Red Desert" Steam's Largest Ties is About 240,000! Can the number increase further on Saturday and Sunday?

entries.title: Crane Game Research: Genealogy, Archeology, and Media Theory" (Book Guide for Gamers: No. 58)
entries.title_ja: クレーンゲーム100年の歴史をたどり直す労作「クレーンゲーム研究 系譜学・考現学・メディア論」（ゲーマーのためのブックガイド：第58回）
entries.description: The crane game, with its simple mechanism of manipulating an arm inside a box to drop a prize, has an indescribable appeal. Where did these machines, which are now the flower of arcade games, come from? This book, "Crane Game Research: Genealogy, Kogaku, and Media Theory," is a book that answers such questions.

The currency is batteries, and you are free to help or abandon your customers. The chaotic store creation awaits you, where goods are blown off the shelves by physics calculations.

entries.title: What is this "knowledge unlocking" that we hear so much about these days?　Why is it called that?　What are some of the best examples?　Let us try to explain all the questions that come to mind.

entries.description: If you have been following game information recently, you may have come across the term "knowledge unlocking" from time to time. Some people are vaguely familiar with it, while others may ask, "When did this term originate?　Is it a game genre? Some may even say, "When did this term originate? I've been thinking a lot about this extremely useful but not yet widely used term (genre name).
