entries.description: On March 19, 2026, Compile Heart announced that the latest in the Neptune series, "Super Dimension Neptune ∞ (Unlimited)," will be released on August 27, 2026. The game is compatible with Switch2, Switch, PS5, and PS4. Along with this announcement, information on the storyline and four new goddesses were also released.

entries.title: Vampire Crawlers, a new high-speed card battle spin-off of the original Vansaba spin-off, will be released on April 21 for $1,200!
entries.title_ja: ヴァンサバ本家スピンオフの高速カードバトル新作『Vampire Crawlers』4月21日に1,200円で発売決定！
entries.description: It will initially be released for PC/Xbox Series X|S/PS5/Nintendo Switch, followed by a mobile version.

entries.title: Six super machines completely transform and combine! AMAKUNI Chokigami Genesic GaoGaiGar" equipped with gimmicks all over its body is cool - and even has an "original combination" feature!
entries.title_ja: 6機の超マシンが完全変形合体！ギミックを全身に搭載した「AMAKUNI超機神 ジェネシックガオガイガー」がカッコ良い―さらに“オリジナル合体”も
entries.description: AMAKUNI Chokigami Genesic GaoGaiGar" from "King of Heroes GaoGaiGar FINAL" is now available! Pre-order is now available exclusively at Hobby Japan.

entries.title: Lineage 2M" reveals details of the 5th anniversary app "ETERNAL BOND: Fei Long Yuei," which will be implemented on March 25. Enjoy a historical reenactment of the battle against Lu Bu as Guan Yu.
entries.title_ja: 「リネージュ2M」，3月25日実装の5周年記念アプデ「ETERNAL BOND：飛龍結義」詳細を公開。関羽になって呂布と戦う歴史再現バトルを楽しめる
entries.description: NCSOFT today (March 19, 2026) released detailed information on the fifth anniversary update "ETERNALBOND: Flying Dragon Yueyi," scheduled for implementation on March 25 in the open world RPG "Lineage 2M. This time, events and dungeons related to the Three Kingdoms will be implemented, and players can enjoy historical reenactment battles in which they become Guan Yu and fight against Lu Bu.

entries.title: Gundam" high-detailed "head figures" are cool! Total 8 types of Unicorn and Stofuri series, and the secret one has a light-emitting gimmick!
entries.title_ja: 「ガンダム」ハイディティールな「ヘッドフィギュア」がカッコイイ！ユニコーン、ストフリ系の全8種、シークレットは発光ギミック付き
entries.description: The "GUNDAM HEAD COLLECTION," which was developed in China, is now available in Japan!

entries.title: Can the "Zero" series still be played today? We take a closer look at "Zero" that can be played today, which inherits the novelty of the time - the "feel of projector-like controls" makes for a more immersive experience.
entries.title_ja: 『零』シリーズって今も遊べるの？ 当時の斬新性を受け継ぐ“今も遊べる『零』”に迫る─「射影機さながらの操作感」で没入感もマシマシ
entries.description: Many of the works in the "Zero" series, which will celebrate its 25th anniversary in December 2026, can be played on current machines. Please don't miss out on the distinctive charm of this series.

entries.title: Pokemon": A "Kimawari" cushion so big you can hold it! New Flower Motif Goods, Including a Scented Mascot!
entries.title_ja: 『ポケモン』抱えるほどデカい「キマワリ」のクッション！香り付きマスコットなど、お花モチーフの新グッズに注目
entries.description: Cute "Midare-zaki" merchandise, which is inspired by a flower garden filled with Pokémon!

entries.title: World's Goodest Pup," a "Surespa"-style roguelike starring a pooch, is released - a deck-building game with a cute anime.
entries.title_ja: 『スレスパ』風ワンちゃん主役ローグライク『World's Goodest Pup』リリース―可愛いアニメも注目のデッキ構築型ゲーム
entries.description: Healing roguelike competing in a dog show - demo version available now!

entries.title: Free PC version of the electrician sim "Electrician Simulator" and free ship battle "World of Warships" items - on sale in the Epic Games store.
entries.title_ja: 【PC版無料配布開始】電気工事士シム『Electrician Simulator』本編＆基本無料の艦船対戦『World of Warships』アイテム―セール開催中のEpic Gamesストアにて
entries.description: The distribution period is one week starting at midnight on March 20.

entries.title: Meguri Witch", a game in which you turn the witch's eyes around to unlock her secrets, is now available on the Steam store page. The story is told by arranging objects and scenery.
entries.title_ja: 魔女の目をぐるぐる回して，秘密を開錠する「めくるりウィッチ」，Steamストアページを公開。オブジェクトや景色を揃えて，物語を進めていく
entries.description: SleepingMuseum today released the Steam store page for the PC game "Meguri Witch". This is a game in which the player turns the witch's eyes around and unlocks her secrets. The player, along with the heroine, creates scenes and advances the story by turning the witch's eyes and aligning the objects and scenery in front of and behind her to unlock the dial safe.

entries.title: The Witcher" and "Cyberpunk 2077", CDPR's third pillar of new IP "Hadar" is under dynamic development. Moving into the concept phase
entries.title_ja: 『ウィッチャー』『サイバーパンク2077』のCDPR第3の柱となる新規IP『Hadar』はダイナミックに開発進行中。コンセプト段階へ移行
entries.description: Multiple prototypes were created and implemented in the Unreal Engine for the verification phase.

entries.title: MSI announces its latest notebook PCs for 2026, including a model with the latest Core Ultra 200HX Plus CPU.
entries.title_ja: 最新CPU「Core Ultra 200HX Plus」搭載モデルなど，MSIが2026年の最新ノートPCを発表
entries.description: On March 19, 2026, MSI held a preview of its notebook PC models for 2026 and presented its notebook PCs for spring 2026. The highlight of the presentation was a lineup of high-specification products, including a PC for the high-end market that uses the newly announced "CoreUltra200HXPlus" for gamer PCs.

entries.title: Deathstroke 2" is a PC port of "Deathstroke 2", but the obsession with "expression" never ends! Creators' Interview & Office Tour Report

entries.description: The particulars of checking frame by frame.

entries.description: GEO stores offer discounts on new software as well as used software. Some of them are heavily discounted, and some of them are for recent titles. Here is a summary of information on such bargain new software.

The kit comes as a set of two figures, one in the blue Akira color and the other in the mint green Satoru color, with multiple arms that can be connected and extended! #Hasegawa #HelloWeGo

entries.title: Hobby Shop Visit] Model trains are the mainstay of the store!　Report on "Kuru Kuru Akihabara," a secondhand specialty store, with a large layout that can accommodate up to 15 cars and a variety of expressions of the railroad tracks, capturing the hearts of fans.

entries.description: Hobby is a hobby in which one is "surrounded by things. Figurines, plastic models, RC, model trains, dolls, and so on. Before the "I'm satisfied with all I have" tongue is even dry, the desire to search for and buy new products grows, and as a result, the number of new items in the house increases.

entries.title: Actual teacher of "Assassination Classroom" asks how Jun Fukuyama has interacted with the cast of "Class 3E.
entries.title_ja: 「暗殺教室」実際の教師から質問、福山潤は3年E組のキャストとどう接してきたのか
entries.description: The new anime "Assassination Classroom the Movie: Time for Everyone," based on the original story by Yuuki Matsui, opened in theaters today, March 20. The first day of the opening ceremony was held at Shinjuku Wald 9 in Tokyo, with Jun Fukuyama playing the role of Sensei, Mai Fuchigami playing Nagisa Ushioda and Hotaru, Nobuhiko Okamoto playing Gyo Akabane, Aya Suzaki playing Kaede Chino, and Ryota Osaka playing Yuma Isogai. During the photo session, a stuffed animal of Kakushi Sensei also made an appearance.

entries.title: New series of Koh Matsuzuki's "The Prince, the Witch, and the Princess" begins in Hanayume Ai, 12 years after his graduation.

entries.title: Free texture & material creation tool InstaMAT 2026 released, adds UV-independent and re-editable brushes

entries.description:
InstaMAT 2026, the latest version of InstaMAT 3D content authoring software, is now available
New features include "Curves Brushes" for drawing paths along mesh surfaces, image stabilization, and new mesh filters.
InstaMAT" is free for projects with annual revenues of less than $100,000.

entries.description: This article will provide you with a summary of releases and updates of tools and engines that we were unable to introduce in our usual news articles.

entries.title: picoCAD 2, a 3D model creation tool specializing in low-poly expression, is now available on Steam and itch.io.
entries.title_ja: ローポリ表現に特化した3Dモデル制作ツール「picoCAD 2」リリース。Steam、itch.ioにて販売中
entries.description:
picoCAD 2, a 3D Model Creation Tool Specializing in Low-Polygon Representation, Released on Steam and itch.io
Allows users to manipulate pixel art to create 3D models and textures
Priced at 1,700 yen (including tax) on Steam and 14.95 USD on itch.io

entries.title: Urgent need for game UI/UX designers! 2DCG PLANET STUDIO," which is involved in major titles such as the "Pokemon" series, is strengthening its recruitment. Free creator training courses for professional creators are also available.
entries.title_ja: ゲームUI/UXデザイナー急募！『ポケットモンスター』シリーズなど大型タイトルにも携わる「2DCGプラネットスタジオ」が採用強化中。プロ志向の無料クリエイター育成講座も
entries.description:
C&R Creative Studios, Japan's Largest Creative Development Studio, Expands Hiring of UI/UX Designers
Professional UI design team using Unreal Engine 5 has designers working on dozens of projects at all times
Free Academy education system for those who want to become professional game UI/UX designers with no experience is fully equipped within the company.

entries.title: Esports World Cup 2026" Announces Updated Rules for Club Championship to Determine Overall Standings. Participating players to be announced by 5:59 p.m. on May 1.
entries.title_ja: 「Esports World Cup 2026」，総合順位を決めるクラブチャンピオンシップのルール更新を発表。参加選手は5月1日5：59までに公表へ
entries.description: The EsportsWorldCupFoundation today (March 19, 2026) announced rule updates for the Club Championship of EsportsWorldCup2026, the world's largest eSports tournament to be held this summer in Saudi Arabia.

entries.title: DLSS 5: "This is a fake" - What is the strong sense of discomfort with the new technology held by animators involved in "GTA5" and "Deathstroke 2"?
entries.title_ja: DLSS 5に「これはフェイクです」―『GTA5』や『デススト2』など関わったアニメーターが抱く、新技術への強い違和感とは？
entries.description: While not a complete rejection, it is a strong negative response.

entries.title: Explore a mysterious world by blowing up your own body with the Bomb Caterpillar. Highly Acclaimed Puzzle-Action "Öoo" Available Today for Xbox
entries.title_ja: “爆弾いもむし”で自身の体を爆破し，不思議な世界を探索しよう。高評価パズルアクション「Öoo」，Xbox版を本日発売
entries.description: Today (March 19, 2026), the XboxSeriesX|S and XboxPlayAnywhere versions of "Öoo" were released, winning "overwhelmingly positive" Steam user reviews for the PC version and being named a finalist in the design category at the D.I.C.E. Awards. D.I.C.E. Awards" in the design category.

entries.description: Digging silently in the ground alone can be an engrossing activity. It may be that the act of "digging something out" is engraved in our DNA. ......

entries.title: A large volume of puzzles, all handmade... "The Artisan of Glimmith", a puzzle ADV in which you restore "stained glass" in a kingdom above the clouds, is now available on Steam.

entries.description: They can also create & share their own puzzles.

entries.title: "Yandere Satone-chan" locks up players! Bug in the working ADV "Chill with You" that prevents the game from ending - both officials and users are digesting it as a story.

entries.description: Users are also favorable to this new aspect of Satne.

entries.title: Akihiro Hino of Level-5, Naoki Yoshida of SQUAENI, and others took the stage! There will also be a talk show by Yoiko Arino. FUKUOKA Game Creators Next" will be held this weekend.
entries.title_ja: レベルファイブ日野 晃博氏、スクエニ吉田 直樹氏らが登壇！よゐこ有野氏によるトークショーも。『FUKUOKA ゲームクリエイターズ・ネクスト』今週末に開催
entries.description:
FUKUOKA Game Creators Next, an Event Aimed at Developing the Next Generation of Game Creators, to be Held on March 20, 2026 (Friday, National Holiday)
Akihiro Hino of Level-5 and Naoki Yoshida of Square Enix to speak at the event
The 19th Fukuoka Game Contest "GFF AWARD 2026" Award Ceremony will also be held.

entries.title: Transport the cursed cargo to its destination while avoiding the spiritual presence. Physics-based online cooperative horror "Cursed Cargo" trial version now available.
entries.title_ja: 霊的存在を回避しながら，呪われた貨物を目的地へ運搬せよ。物理演算ベースのオンライン協力ホラー「Cursed Cargo」，体験版を配信開始
entries.description: Indie development studio gogotgames has begun distributing a demo version of its in-development horror game "CursedCargo. The title features a unique concept of transporting cursed cargo to its destination and online cooperative play that takes advantage of physics.

entries.title: Little Kitty Big City" will be released by SEGA on June 18 for the Switch as a packaged version.
entries.title_ja: 「リトルキティ・ビッグシティ〜まいごの子猫の街さんぽ〜」，Switch向けパッケージ版が6月18日にセガからリリース
entries.description: On March 19, 2026, Sega announced that a packaged version of "Little Kitty Big City - Maigo no Kitten no Machi Sanpo" for Switch will be released on June 18. The price is 3980 yen (including tax). The game is a casual adventure game in which the main character, a black cat who has become separated from her owner, wanders around an open-world city, trying to return home.

entries.title: AYANEO Pocket S mini, a compact portable Android game console with an approx. 4.2-inch size display, goes on sale in Japan on March 26.
entries.title_ja: 約4.2インチサイズのディスプレイを採用したコンパクトな携帯型Androidゲーム機「AYANEO Pocket S mini」が3月26日に国内発売
entries.description: On March 19, 2026, Tenku announced the release of AYANEO's AYANEOPocketSmin "i portable Android gaming device on March 26. The highlight of this product is its small body with an LCD display of approximately 4.2 inches in size, with a resolution of 1280 x 960 dots and an aspect ratio of 4:3. The price, including tax, starts at 77,800 yen.

entries.title: First-person horror fishing sim "Out Fishing" demo version available! Take your time fishing by the lake where the disappearance took place. After sunset, an unidentifiable horror looms!
entries.title_ja: 一人称視点ホラー釣りシム『Out Fishing』デモ版配信！失踪事件現場の湖畔でじっくり魚釣り。日没後には得体の知れない恐怖が迫りくる
entries.description: According to the description on the store page, it also supports Japanese.

entries.title: ASUS' TUF Gaming brand launches a total of 12 notebook PCs for gamers with GeForce RTX 50.
entries.title_ja: GeForce RTX 50搭載のゲーマー向けノートPC計12モデルがASUSのTUF Gamingブランドから一挙に登場
entries.description: On March 19, 2026, ASUS announced the release of four new notebook PCs under the TUFGaming brand for gamers, totaling 12 models, on or after March 27. The highlight of the lineup is a wide variety of products, mainly in the middle class, ranging from 14 to 18 inches in size.

entries.title: KPOP Girls!" is the first game in the KPOP series. Demon Hunters" uses UE's real-time rendering for high-quality 3D scenes; Epic Games releases production interview article
entries.title_ja: 『KPOPガールズ! デーモン・ハンターズ』はUEのリアルタイムレンダリングで高品質の3Dシーンを実現。Epic Gamesが制作インタビュー記事を公開
entries.description:
3D Animated Film "KPOP Girls! Interview with the production team about the use of UE in "Demon Hunters," published by Epic Games.
UE's real-time rendering enables highly accurate pre-visualization. As a specific example, a case study of a battle scene in a public bathhouse created with Volumetric is presented.
The article also discusses efforts to automate the workflow of importing animation rigs created in Maya into UE.

entries.title: Sonniss to Give Away Free Sound Data Bundles Totaling Over 7GB, Celebrating GDC 2026 with GDC 2026 Game Audio Bundle
entries.title_ja: Sonniss、計7GB超のサウンドデータバンドルを無料で配布。GDC 2026の開催を記念した「GDC 2026 Game Audio Bundle」
entries.description:
Sonniss is giving away the GDC 2026 Game Audio Bundle for free
Bundle of sound data distributed free of charge in conjunction with the Game Developer Conference.
The total size of the sound files is over 7.47 GB. Royalty-free and can be used for commercial purposes.

entries.title: All the cast members of the first Yaoha gather together & Akram, the leader of demons, also plays a big role!　Report on two performances of "NeoRomance♡Festa Haruka Matsuri 2026 - 25th Anniversary Party" day and night.
entries.title_ja: 初代八葉キャスト全員集結＆鬼の首領アクラムも大活躍!?　「ネオロマンス♡フェスタ 遙か祭2026 〜二十五年の宴〜」昼夜2公演レポート
entries.description: On March 15, 2026, "NeoRomance♡Festa Haruka Festival 2026 - 25th Anniversary Party" was held at KTZeppYokohama in Kanagawa. The cast of the first eight leaves gathered to celebrate the 25th anniversary of the "Haruka" series. This article reports on the daytime and evening sessions.

entries.title: Scratchy Scratchy" is now available on Steam! Scritchy Scratchy" is now available on Steam!

entries.description: FundayGames released ScritchyScratchy, a new title developed by LunchMoneyGames, on Steam on March 18, 2026. The title is a clicker-like incremental game in which players earn money by challenging various scratch cards.

entries.title: Westerners don't understand that for Japanese people, it is more Japanese and nicer to have simple English words in the UI." It is not enough to translate all the English contained in the game... A lively discussion around social networking sites.
entries.title_ja: 「日本人にとって、UIに簡単な英単語が入ってるほうがより日本的で素敵だと、欧米人は理解してくれない」ゲーム内に含まれる英語は全部訳せばいいというものではない…SNSを中心に盛り上がる議論
entries.description: The extent to which the English in a game is translated into Japanese is also a matter of concern, but some platforms require virtually a direct translation of the entire game.

entries.title: Lead an interstellar freighter through the galaxy. New Sci-Fi Rogue RPG "Stellar Freight: Endless Horizon" to be Released in Q3 2026
entries.title_ja: 星間貨物船を率いて銀河を生き抜く。新作SFローグライクRPG「ステラ・フレート：エンドレス・ホライズン」，2026年第3四半期にリリース
entries.description: TwoCakesStudio today announced the release of "Stellar Freighter: Endless Horizon," a new title developed by Satellite235, for release in Q3 2026, with a Steam store page. The game is a sci-fi roguelike turn-based RPG in which players captain an interstellar freighter and lead their crew through the perils of space.

entries.title: Gameplay footage of "EXODUS," an epic sci-fi action RPG set 40,000 years in the future, scheduled for release in early 2027!
entries.title_ja: 4万年後の未来を描く壮大SFアクションRPG『EXODUS』ゲームプレイ映像！2027年初頭リリース予定

entries.title: Unity Studio, the official Unity editor for creating 3D apps in the browser, is officially released. Free trial is now available.
entries.title_ja: ブラウザで3Dアプリを作れるUnity公式エディター「Unity Studio」正式リリース。無料トライアルも提供中
entries.description:
Official Release of Unity Studio, an Official Unity Tool for Creating 3D Applications in the Browser
No-code animation application, UI creation, etc. are possible. In addition to paid licenses, free trials are also available.
Available for WebGPU compatible browsers (Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.). Mobile browsers are not supported at the time of the announcement.

entries.title: KAZUMA KANEKO'S TSUQUYOMI" reveals five playable characters and battle styles. Enjoy the story depicted from the viewpoints of the agent and the mastermind.
entries.title_ja: 「KAZUMA KANEKO’S ツクヨミ」，5人のプレイアブルキャラとバトルスタイルが公開に。エージェントと首謀者の視点で描かれる物語も楽しめる
entries.description: Coroplast today (March 19, 2026) revealed new information about "KAZUMAKANEKO'S Tsukuyomi" for Switch, which the company plans to release on April 23. This time, five playable characters including "Tsukuyomi of the Sixteen Nights Moon" and "Tsukuyomi of the New Moon," their battle styles, and the contents of the story mode were revealed.

entries.title: The official website for the rogue light action "Kunio's Hot-Blooded Journey to the West: Jersey Rampage" is now open. Sun Wukong, Inoha-kai, Sa-go-jyo, and Sanzo Houshi are all "Kunio".

entries.description: Arc System Works today unveiled the official website for "Kuniokun no Nekketsu Saiyuki Tenjiku Ranbutsu Hen," which the company plans to release within 2026. This is a roguelite action game based on the "Journey to the West," one of the four great Chinese classic books. The characters Sun Wukong, Inoha-kai, Sa-go-jyo, and Sanzo Houshi are all "Kunio" in the game.
entries.series: Kunio's Hot-Blooded Journey to the West: Jersey Rampage

entries.title: Introductory book for learning the basics of C++ from game programming, released by Impress on Tuesday, March 17.

entries.description:
Book, "Introduction to C++: Creator-Directed Knowledge and Practical Techniques for Enhancing Creativity," to be Released by Impress on March 17, 2026 (Tuesday)
A beginner's manual for learning how to use the C++ programming language in a practical way through game development
Over 250 sample files and other bonus data are included for book purchasers.

entries.title: Spooky Kawaii Sim "Spookitchen", a delivery kitchen in a Halloween world, is now open for playtesting. Up to 4 players can play cooperatively.

entries.title: NVIDIA Announces DLSS 5 AI Upscaling Technology. Scheduled to be available this fall.

entries.description:
NVIDIA Announces DLSS 5 AI Upscaling Technology
Technical demo by the company and sample videos of "DLSS 5" implemented in titles such as "Resident Evil: Requiem" are available.
Technical requirements were unknown at the time of the announcement; it is expected to be available in the fall of 2026.

entries.title: Over 700 free course videos for learning Houdini VFX, available for viewing and download until February 2027.

The description of the number of videos published has been corrected.

entries.title: Blender 5.1" is officially released. Bone Info" node for procedural rigging with enhanced linkage between armature and geometry nodes, etc. implemented.
entries.title_ja: 「Blender 5.1」正式リリース。アーマチュアとジオメトリノードの連携強化によりプロシージャルリギングを実現する「Bone Info」ノードなどが実装
entries.description:
March 17, 2026 (local time), the official release of Blender 5.1
Bone Info, an Input node that allows users to obtain transformation information from bones in armatures, has been added to the Geometry node.
Improved processing speed of shape keys and actions, and enhanced grease pencil fill functionality have also been implemented.

entries.title: GIMP 3.2, an open source image editing tool, is officially released. New non-destructive layers "Link Layer" and "Vector Layer" are implemented.
entries.title_ja: オープンソースの画像編集ツール「GIMP 3.2」正式リリース。新たな非破壊レイヤー「リンクレイヤー」「ベクターレイヤー」が実装
entries.description:
GIMP, an Open Source Image Editing Tool, Updated to Version 3.2
New non-destructive layers "Link Layer" and "Vector Layer" are implemented.
Enhanced color selection function and UI/UX improvements were also added.

entries.title: Restore Your Island," which cleans up an island full of trash, has a release date! You can also explore with your faithful dog!
entries.title_ja: ゴミだらけの島を綺麗に掃除する『Restore Your Island』配信日決定！忠実な愛犬との探索も可能
entries.description: Revive the beauty and watch the wildlife return as the ecosystem comes back to life.

entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts Inc. today released additional information on the first Dan of the arcade game "Onegai Ipuri," which is scheduled to go live sequentially on April 2 and will feature the new main characters "Inori" and "Aoi. According to the information released this time, in addition to Inori and Aoi, the game will also feature a bazillion codes for "Gumi".

entries.description: Chapter 02 further expands the story and adds new depth to the story with a new audio log, sophisticated environmental descriptions, and the long-awaited SCP-049 quest.

entries.title: UE5 rendering and optimization techniques, "Battlefield 6" development case study, and more. GPC 2025, a conference on graphics technology, with materials and archived videos of some of the presentations.
entries.title_ja: UE5のレンダリング・最適化手法や『Battlefield 6』開発事例など。グラフィックス技術のカンファレンス「GPC 2025」、一部講演の資料・アーカイブ動画が公開
entries.description:
Graphics Programming Conference 2025, a Conference Focusing on Graphics Technology, Presentation Materials and Archived Videos Now Available
Presentation materials are available for 30 lectures, including lectures on rendering and optimization techniques using Unreal Engine 5 and Cycles, the standard Blender renderer.
Eight archived videos are now available. including a lecture on "Battlefield 6" development case study.

entries.description: It has been revealed that ``Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba the Movie: Mugenjou Chapter 1: The Second Coming of the Myriad'' has attracted 27,455,968 viewers and box office revenue of 40,219,000 yen during its 266 days of release until April 9, 2026. entries.title: Exchanges with Kenshi Yonezu, Tatsuki Fujimoto, and Riku Oseto! The Weeknd talks about the impact anime has given him - The true face of a world-famous artist who resonates with Japanese anime will appear at the "Crunchyroll Anime Awards 2026"

entries.description: Grammy Award-winning artist The Weeknd will appear at the "Crunchyroll Anime Awards 2026" to be held in Tokyo on May 23, 2026, and will serve as a presenter in the "Anime of the Year" category. He uses anime as a source of creativity, and created his debut work ``House of Balloons'' under the influence of ``Samurai Champloo.'' He has also deepened his relationships with Kenshi Yonezu, Tatsuki Fujimoto, and Riku Oseto.

entries.description: The opening theme song for the spring anime ``Akane Banashi'', ``Hitonoshi'', is Keisuke Kuwata's first time writing an anime theme song at the age of 70. A passionate love letter from the production staff touched Kuwata's heart and led to this realization. The leading voice actress, Anna Nagase, has received rave reviews for her sincere attitude towards rakugo, such as sitting upright while dubbing.

entries.description: Stage events for the TV anime "Armor Shinden Samurai Trooper" were held at AnimeJapan 2026 on March 29, 2026, with Yosai Ishibashi as Gai, Junya Enoki as Kaito Uesugi, Ayumi Murase as Musashi Hojo, Kentaro Kumagai as Shion Ishida on the BLUE Stage and the TOKYO MX booth stage. Ishibashi, who plays Gai, and Takuya Sato, who plays Sasuke, took the stage at the TOKYO MX booth stage to look back on the first season and talk about their expectations for the second season, which will start airing and distributing in July. In this article, we will introduce the two "hot and crazy" stages.

In addition, the ending theme will be "Oath" by Leina, and the third trailer featuring the song has been unveiled. Additional cast members including Keno Horiuchi, Shuichiro Umeda, Shunsuke Sakino, and Ayumi Murase have also been announced.

entries.title: Japan's only "Sazae-san" store has been renewed! New products and reprinted goods are now available!
entries.title_ja: 「サザエさん」日本唯一のオンリーショップがリニューアル！新商品や復刻版グッズも登場
entries.description:
Sazae-san's Shop, which opened on the first floor of Fuji Television's headquarters in 2006 as the only store in Japan exclusively selling goods from the TV anime "Sazae-san," reopened on March 27, 2026.
To commemorate this event, an opening ceremony was held in front of the store, whose exciting exterior was designed in the image of the Isono family, and was attended by Kenji Shimizu, President and Representative Director of Fuji Television Network, and Junji Kawaguchi, Director of the Machiko Hasegawa Museum of Art. In addition, Sazae and Nampei also came to congratulate the guests.

entries.title: Where is the movie "Detective Conan: The Azure Coffin" available on DMM TV and U-NEXT?

entries.description:
The movie version of "Detective Conan: Jolly Roger in the Azure Coffin" will be available for unlimited viewing on DMM TV from March 28 onward and on U-NEXT from late March.
It will also be available on Hulu and Amazon Prime Video.
Highlights of the treasure hunt suspense in which the friendship between Ran and Sonoko shines will also be explained.
